## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

### TR-BUILD

```bash
pnpm --filter @insurtech/ai-estimation build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"
```

### TR-TYPECHECK

```bash
pnpm --filter @insurtech/ai-estimation tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || { ERR=$(grep -c "error TS" /tmp/tsc.log); append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "$ERR"; }
```

### TR-NO-EMOJI

```bash
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/ai-estimation/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"
```

### TR-DECISION-021-RATIFIED + CLARIFICATION 007

```bash
if [ -f "decisions/021-ai-vision-estimation-photos.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/021-ai-vision-estimation-photos.md && grep -qE "clarification decision-007|cas usage specific" decisions/021-ai-vision-estimation-photos.md; then
  append_to_report "TR-DECISION-021" "Decision-021 + clarification 007" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-DECISION-021" "Decision-021" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi
```

### TR-MODELS-ACCURACY-TARGETS (CRITIQUE)

```bash
DETECTION_MAP=$(cat repo/packages/ai-estimation/models/detection-yolov8/metrics.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.mAP' 2>/dev/null)
CLASS_ACC=$(cat repo/packages/ai-estimation/models/classification-resnet/metrics.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.accuracy' 2>/dev/null)
REG_MAE=$(cat repo/packages/ai-estimation/models/regression-lgbm/metrics.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.mae_percent' 2>/dev/null)
if [ "$(echo "$DETECTION_MAP > 0.75" | bc 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ] && [ "$(echo "$CLASS_ACC > 0.85" | bc 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ] && [ "$(echo "$REG_MAE < 20" | bc 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-MODELS-ACCURACY" "Models accuracy targets" "PASS" "All 3 OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-MODELS-ACCURACY" "Models accuracy" "FAIL" "mAP=$DETECTION_MAP Class=$CLASS_ACC MAE=$REG_MAE"
fi
```

### TR-ATLAS-CLOUD-SOUVERAIN (CRITIQUE)

```bash
if grep -qE "MA-1|Benguerir|atlas-cloud" repo/infrastructure/ai-estimation/terraform/*.tf 2>/dev/null; then
  # Verify no US/EU regions
  NON_MA=$(grep -rE "us-east|eu-west|asia-" repo/infrastructure/ai-estimation/terraform/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  [ "$NON_MA" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-ATLAS-CLOUD" "Souverain MA-1 strict" "PASS" "Atlas Cloud only" || append_to_report "TR-ATLAS-CLOUD" "Souverain" "FAIL" "$NON_MA non-MA references"
else
  append_to_report "TR-ATLAS-CLOUD" "Atlas Cloud" "FAIL" "Region MA-1 manquante"
fi
```

### TR-ETHICS-RECOMMENDATION-ONLY (CRITIQUE)

```bash
# No automatic decisions
NO_AUTO=$(grep -rE "auto.*decision|decision.*automatic" repo/packages/ai-estimation/src/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v "automatic.*human" | grep -v "// " | wc -l)
# Audit log present
AUDIT_PRESENT=$(grep -rE "audit_log|Sprint 7.*audit" repo/packages/ai-estimation/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
# Opt-out present
OPTOUT_PRESENT=$(grep -rE "ai_estimation_opt_out" repo/packages/ai-estimation/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
if [ "$NO_AUTO" = "0" ] && [ "$AUDIT_PRESENT" -ge 3 ] && [ "$OPTOUT_PRESENT" -ge 1 ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-ETHICS" "Recommendation-only + audit + opt-out" "PASS" "All ethics safeguards OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-ETHICS" "Ethics safeguards" "FAIL" "AutoDecisions=$NO_AUTO Audit=$AUDIT_PRESENT OptOut=$OPTOUT_PRESENT"
fi
```

### TR-INTEGRATION-SPRINT16-POLICEPROVIDER (CRITIQUE)

```bash
if [ -f "repo/packages/ai-estimation/src/services/police-estimation-provider-impl.service.ts" ] && grep -qE "PoliceEstimationProvider|estimateClaimAmount" repo/packages/ai-estimation/src/services/police-estimation-provider-impl.service.ts; then
  TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/ai-estimation vitest run tests/integration/sprint16-integration.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
  [ "$TESTS" -ge 12 ] && append_to_report "TR-INTEGRATION-S16" "PoliceProvider Sprint 16" "PASS" "$TESTS tests" || append_to_report "TR-INTEGRATION-S16" "Integration" "FAIL" "Tests insuffisants"
else
  append_to_report "TR-INTEGRATION-S16" "PoliceProvider" "FAIL" "Implementation manquante"
fi
```

### TR-PERFORMANCE-LATENCY-P95 (CRITIQUE DEMO DAY)

```bash
P95=$(cat repo/packages/ai-estimation/benchmarks/results.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.latency.p95_seconds' 2>/dev/null)
THROUGHPUT=$(cat repo/packages/ai-estimation/benchmarks/results.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.throughput_req_per_min' 2>/dev/null)
if [ "$(echo "$P95 < 5" | bc 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ] && [ "$(echo "$THROUGHPUT >= 100" | bc 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-PERF" "Performance targets" "PASS" "P95=${P95}s + ${THROUGHPUT}/min"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PERF" "Performance" "FAIL" "P95=$P95 / Throughput=$THROUGHPUT"
fi
```

### TR-PHASE-4-COMPLETE (CRITIQUE MILESTONE)

```bash
# All Phase 4 sprints closure reports exist
PHASE_4_REPORTS=0
for sprint in 16 17 18 19 20; do
  if [ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-${sprint}-closure-report.md" ]; then
    PHASE_4_REPORTS=$((PHASE_4_REPORTS+1))
  fi
done

if [ "$PHASE_4_REPORTS" = "5" ]; then
  # Verify Sprint 20 closure declares Phase 4 complete
  if grep -qE "Phase 4 SINISTRE CORE COMPLETE|pile verticale complete" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-20-closure-report.md 2>/dev/null; then
    append_to_report "TR-PHASE-4-COMPLETE" "Phase 4 SINISTRE CORE complete" "PASS" "5/5 sprints livres"
  else
    append_to_report "TR-PHASE-4-COMPLETE" "Phase 4 declaration" "WARN" "Sprint 20 closure incomplete"
  fi
else
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE-4-COMPLETE" "Phase 4" "FAIL" "Only $PHASE_4_REPORTS/5 sprints"
fi
```

### TR-DECISIONS-REFERENCED

```bash
REF=$(grep -rE "decision-00[1-9]|decision-0[12][0-9]" repo/packages/ai-estimation/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$REF" -ge 10 ] && append_to_report "TR-DECISIONS" "Decisions >=10" "PASS" "$REF" || append_to_report "TR-DECISIONS" "Decisions" "WARN" "$REF"
```

### TR-VARIABLES-ENV

```bash
VARS=(AI_ESTIMATION_TRITON_URL AI_ESTIMATION_GPU_NODES AI_ESTIMATION_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT AI_ESTIMATION_CRITICAL_CLAIM_THRESHOLD_MAD AI_ESTIMATION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS AI_ESTIMATION_CACHE_TTL_DAYS AI_ESTIMATION_AUDIT_RETENTION_YEARS)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "7 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "7 vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
SKIP=$(grep -cE "\| SKIP \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN + SKIP))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

CRITICAL_MODELS=$(grep -c "TR-MODELS-ACCURACY.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_ATLAS=$(grep -c "TR-ATLAS-CLOUD.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_ETHICS=$(grep -c "TR-ETHICS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_INTEGRATION=$(grep -c "TR-INTEGRATION-S16.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_PERF=$(grep -c "TR-PERF.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_PHASE4=$(grep -c "TR-PHASE-4-COMPLETE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_MODELS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- MODELS ACCURACY TARGETS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_ATLAS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ATLAS CLOUD SOUVERAIN FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_ETHICS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ETHICS SAFEGUARDS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_INTEGRATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- INTEGRATION SPRINT 16 FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_PERF" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PERFORMANCE TARGETS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_PHASE4" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PHASE 4 NON COMPLETE"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS DETECTED"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO -- PHASE 4 COMPLETE"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL -- PHASE 4 ALMOST COMPLETE"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
- Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN / SKIP : $SKIP

**Score** : ${SCORE}%
**Decision** : $DECISION
**SPRINT 20 STATUS** : $DECISION

## PHASE 4 SINISTRE CORE STATUS
- Sprint 16 (Sinistre Foundation) : LIVRE
- Sprint 17 (Police Lifecycle) : LIVRE
- Sprint 18 (Web Customer Portal) : LIVRE
- Sprint 19 (Mobile Portal) : LIVRE
- Sprint 20 (IA Estimation Photos) : $DECISION

EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-20 sprint 20 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%) -- PHASE 4 SINISTRE CORE STATUS"
```

---

## NOTES IMPORTANTES

**1** : TR-MODELS-ACCURACY **BLOCKING** -- mAP > 0.75 + Classification > 0.85 + Regression MAE < 20%.

**2** : TR-ATLAS-CLOUD **BLOCKING** -- souverainete data MA strict.

**3** : TR-ETHICS **BLOCKING** -- recommendation-only + audit + opt-out + decision-021 + ACAPS compliance.

**4** : TR-INTEGRATION-S16 **BLOCKING** -- PoliceEstimationProvider Sprint 16 interface critique.

**5** : TR-PERF **BLOCKING** -- Demo Day performance P95 < 5s + 100/min.

**6** : TR-PHASE-4-COMPLETE **BLOCKING** -- milestone Phase 4 complete declaration.

**7** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING**.

**8** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Phase 5 Sprint 21.

**9** : Coverage >= 85% acceptable Sprint 20 (ML custom libs).

---

**FIN DE V-20**

**SPRINT 20 = CLOTURE PHASE 4 SINISTRE CORE COMPLETE**

**Verification suivante** : V-21 Skalean Dispatch Foundation (Phase 5 Sprint 1).
```

## 23. V-21-sprint-21-verification.md

```md
# V-21 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 21 : DISPATCH UBER-STYLE

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 5 -- Skalean Dispatch Platform (Sprint 1)
**Sprint** : 21 / 37
**Reference** : `B-21`, `C-21`, `G-21`
**Total criteres** : 92 (74 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 21 = **premier marketplace Skalean**. Verifications strictes matching algorithm + real-time tracking PostGIS+Redis + notifications fanout multi-channel + acceptance race conditions + fallback rounds + integration Sprint 16 + garage onboarding + ratings.

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint21-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 21 : Dispatch Uber-Style (PHASE 5 SPRINT 1)

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 5 -- Skalean Dispatch Platform
**Sprint** : 21
**Reference B-21** : 12 taches, 92 criteres
**Executeur** : Claude Code

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details | Reparation |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|------------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 | ${5:-N/A} |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATION TACHE 6.1.2 -- Entites + PostGIS + RLS

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/dispatch/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package dispatch" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 5 tables + RLS
TABLES_RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "
  SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('garages','dispatch_offers','assignments','garage_ratings','garage_preferences') AND rowsecurity=true
" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES_RLS" = "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "5 tables + RLS" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables RLS" "FAIL" "$TABLES_RLS/5"

# PostGIS extension
POSTGIS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='postgis'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$POSTGIS" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "PostGIS installed" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "PostGIS" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# GIST spatial index
GIST=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "
  SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='garages' AND indexdef LIKE '%gist%'
" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$GIST" -ge 1 ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "GIST spatial index" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "GIST" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Seeds 50 garages
SEEDS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM garages" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$SEEDS" -ge 50 ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "Seeds 50+ garages" "PASS" "$SEEDS" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "Seeds" "WARN" "$SEEDS"

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/dispatch vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ "$TESTS" -ge 16 ] && append_to_report "T02-V6" "Tests entites >=16" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

## VERIFICATION TACHE 6.1.12 -- Tests E2E + Closure

```bash
TOTAL=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/dispatch vitest run tests/e2e/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge 30 ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=30" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

# Benchmark matching P95 < 500ms
P95_MATCH=$(bash repo/packages/dispatch/scripts/bench-matching.sh 2>&1 | grep -oP "P95.*\K\d+\.?\d*")
[ -n "$P95_MATCH" ] && [ "$(echo "$P95_MATCH < 500" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "P95 matching < 500ms" "PASS" "${P95_MATCH}ms" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "P95 matching" "FAIL" "${P95_MATCH}ms"

# Benchmark nearest query P95 < 50ms
P95_NEAR=$(bash repo/packages/dispatch/scripts/bench-nearest.sh 2>&1 | grep -oP "P95.*\K\d+\.?\d*")
[ -n "$P95_NEAR" ] && [ "$(echo "$P95_NEAR < 50" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V3" "P95 nearest < 50ms" "PASS" "${P95_NEAR}ms" || append_to_report "T12-V3" "P95 nearest" "FAIL" "${P95_NEAR}ms"

COV=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/dispatch vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V4" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V4" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

[ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-21-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Dispatch operational|Sprint 22" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-21-closure-report.md && append_to_report "T12-V5" "Sprint 21 closure" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V5" "Closure" "FAIL" "Manquant"
```

```bash
if [ -f "repo/packages/dispatch/src/services/matching.service.ts" ] && grep -qE "calculateProximityScore|calculateCapacityScore|calculateRatingScore|calculatePreferenceScore" repo/packages/dispatch/src/services/matching.service.ts; then
  TESTS_MATCH=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/dispatch vitest run tests/unit/matching.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)

else
  append_to_report "TR-MATCHING" "Matching" "FAIL" "Implementation manquante"
fi

### TR-REAL-TIME-TRACKING-POSTGIS-REDIS (CRITIQUE)

```bash
POSTGIS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='postgis'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
REDIS_GEO=$(grep -cE "GEOADD|GEORADIUSBYMEMBER" repo/packages/dispatch/src/ -r 2>/dev/null)
if [ "$POSTGIS" = "1" ] && [ "$REDIS_GEO" -ge 2 ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-TRACKING" "PostGIS + Redis Geo" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-TRACKING" "Tracking infrastructure" "FAIL" "PostGIS=$POSTGIS RedisGeo=$REDIS_GEO"
fi
```

```bash
if grep -qE "SELECT FOR UPDATE|setLock\\(.pessimistic" repo/packages/dispatch/src/services/offer-acceptance.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  TESTS_RACE=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/dispatch vitest run tests/integration/acceptance.test.ts -t "race condition\|concurrent" 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
  [ "$TESTS_RACE" -ge 4 ] && append_to_report "TR-RACE" "Race conditions handled" "PASS" "$TESTS_RACE tests" || append_to_report "TR-RACE" "Race conditions" "WARN" "Tests insufficient"
else
  append_to_report "TR-RACE" "Race conditions" "FAIL" "No locking detected"
fi
```

if grep -qE "MAX_FALLBACK_ROUNDS.*3|max.*3.*fallback" repo/packages/dispatch/src/services/fallback-orchestration.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then

[ "$LISTENERS" -ge 2 ] && append_to_report "TR-S16" "Sprint 16 listeners" "PASS" "$LISTENERS" || append_to_report "TR-S16" "Sprint 16 integration" "FAIL" "$LISTENERS listeners"

### TR-NOTIFICATION-FANOUT-MULTI-CHANNEL

```bash
CHANNELS=$(grep -cE "push.*native|SMS|email" repo/packages/dispatch/src/services/dispatch-notification-fanout.service.ts 2>/dev/null)
[ "$CHANNELS" -ge 3 ] && append_to_report "TR-FANOUT" "Multi-channel fanout" "PASS" "$CHANNELS" || append_to_report "TR-FANOUT" "Fanout" "WARN" "$CHANNELS channels"

### TR-DECISIONS-REFERENCED

REF=$(grep -rE "decision-00[1-9]|decision-0[12][0-9]" repo/packages/dispatch/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$REF" -ge 10 ] && append_to_report "TR-DECISIONS" "Decisions >=10" "PASS" "$REF" || append_to_report "TR-DECISIONS" "Decisions" "WARN" "$REF"

### TR-VARIABLES-ENV

```bash
VARS=(DISPATCH_RADIUS_KM_DEFAULT DISPATCH_TOP_N_GARAGES DISPATCH_OFFER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS DISPATCH_MAX_FALLBACK_ROUNDS DISPATCH_MATCHING_WEIGHT_PROXIMITY DISPATCH_MATCHING_WEIGHT_CAPACITY DISPATCH_MATCHING_WEIGHT_RATING DISPATCH_MATCHING_WEIGHT_PREFERENCE DISPATCH_SPEED_AVG_KMH REDIS_GEO_KEY_PREFIX)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "10 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "10 vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
SKIP=$(grep -cE "\| SKIP \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN + SKIP))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

CRITICAL_MATCHING=$(grep -c "TR-MATCHING.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_TRACKING=$(grep -c "TR-TRACKING.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_RACE=$(grep -c "TR-RACE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_FALLBACK=$(grep -c "TR-FALLBACK.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_S16=$(grep -c "TR-S16.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_MATCHING" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- MATCHING ALGORITHM FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_TRACKING" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- TRACKING POSTGIS+REDIS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_RACE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- RACE CONDITIONS UNHANDLED"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_FALLBACK" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FALLBACK LOGIC FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_S16" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 16 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS DETECTED"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
- Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN / SKIP : $SKIP

**Score** : ${SCORE}%
**Decision** : $DECISION
**SPRINT 21 STATUS** : $DECISION
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-21 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-MATCHING **BLOCKING** -- algorithm critical proof point marketplace.

**2** : TR-TRACKING **BLOCKING** -- real-time tracking core dispatch.

**3** : TR-RACE **BLOCKING** -- acceptance concurrent multiple assignments risk.

**4** : TR-FALLBACK **BLOCKING** -- escalation reviewer Sprint 22 critique.

**5** : TR-S16 **BLOCKING** -- integration Phase 4 + 5 proof point.

**6** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING**.

**7** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 22.

**8** : Coverage >= 85% acceptable.

---

**FIN V-21**

**Verification suivante** : V-22 Workflow Expertise Validation.
```

## 24. V-22-sprint-22-verification.md

```md
# V-22 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 22 : WORKFLOW EXPERTISE VALIDATION

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 5 -- Skalean Dispatch Platform (Sprint 2)
**Sprint** : 22 / 37
**Reference** : `B-22`, `C-22`, `G-22`
**Total criteres** : 88 (70 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 22 = **ferme cycle complete sinistre**. Verifications strictes assignment routing + checklist 8 items + IA override + signature + payouts Sprint 11 + compensation tiered + dispute 3 niveaux + Sprint 16 lifecycle finalization.

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint22-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 22 : Workflow Expertise (PHASE 5 SPRINT 2)

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 5 -- Skalean Dispatch Platform
**Sprint** : 22
**Reference B-22** : 12 taches, 88 criteres
**Executeur** : Claude Code

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details | Reparation |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|------------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 | ${5:-N/A} |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "12 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "12 vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
SKIP=$(grep -cE "\| SKIP \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN + SKIP))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

CRITICAL_PAYOUTS=$(grep -c "TR-PAYOUTS-S11.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_IA=$(grep -c "TR-IA-OVERRIDE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_DISPUTE=$(grep -c "TR-DISPUTE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_S16=$(grep -c "TR-S16-LIFECYCLE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_S21=$(grep -c "TR-S21-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_PAYOUTS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 11 PAYOUTS INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_IA" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- IA OVERRIDE FEEDBACK FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_DISPUTE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- DISPUTE 3 NIVEAUX FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_S16" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 16 LIFECYCLE FINALIZATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_S21" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 21 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS DETECTED"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
- Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN / SKIP : $SKIP

**Score** : ${SCORE}%
**Decision** : $DECISION
**SPRINT 22 STATUS** : $DECISION
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-22 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-PAYOUTS-S11 **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 11 BAM payouts proof point Demo Day.

**2** : TR-IA-OVERRIDE **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 20 feedback ethics safeguards complete.

**3** : TR-DISPUTE **BLOCKING** -- 3 niveaux escalation + SLA monitoring.

**4** : TR-S16-LIFECYCLE **BLOCKING** -- transitions finalisation complete.

**5** : TR-S21-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 21 listener critique.

**6** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING**.

**7** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 23.

**8** : Coverage >= 85% acceptable.

---

**FIN V-22**

**Verification suivante** : V-23 Garage Network Dispatch (Phase 5 Sprint 3).
```

## 25. V-23-sprint-23-verification.md

```md
# V-23 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 23 : GARAGE NETWORK DISPATCH

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 5 -- Skalean Dispatch Platform (Sprint 3 DERNIER -- CLOTURE)
**Sprint** : 23 / 37
**Reference** : `B-23`, `C-23`, `G-23`
**Total criteres** : 88 (70 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 23 = **cloture Phase 5 Dispatch Platform**. Verifications strictes networks + custom contracts + cross-tenant isolation + integrations Sprint 21+22 + tier auto-upgrade + Phase 5 closure complete.

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint23-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 23 : Garage Network Dispatch (PHASE 5 CLOTURE)

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 5 -- Skalean Dispatch Platform (Sprint 3 DERNIER)
**Sprint** : 23
**Reference B-23** : 12 taches, 88 criteres
**Executeur** : Claude Code

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details | Reparation |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|------------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 | ${5:-N/A} |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

TABLES_RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "
  SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('garage_networks','network_members','network_contracts') AND rowsecurity=true
" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES_RLS" = "3" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "3 tables + RLS" "PASS" "3/3" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables RLS" "FAIL" "$TABLES_RLS/3"

INDEXES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename IN ('garage_networks','network_members','network_contracts')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$INDEXES" -ge 6 ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "Indexes performance" "PASS" "$INDEXES" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "Indexes" "WARN" "$INDEXES"

# Seeds 3 fictional networks
SEEDS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM garage_networks WHERE name IN ('AssurMaghreb-network','Atlas-network','MediAssur-network')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$SEEDS" = "3" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "3 fictional networks" "PASS" "3" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "Seeds" "WARN" "$SEEDS"

[ "$TESTS" -ge 16 ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "Tests entites >=16" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"

```bash

# Benchmarks matching P95 < 600ms

COV=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-networks vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V3" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V3" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

```

### TR-PHASE-5-COMPLETE (CRITIQUE MILESTONE)

```bash
PHASE_5_REPORTS=0
for sprint in 21 22 23; do
  if [ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-${sprint}-closure-report.md" ]; then
    PHASE_5_REPORTS=$((PHASE_5_REPORTS+1))
  fi
done

if [ "$PHASE_5_REPORTS" = "3" ]; then
  if grep -qE "PHASE 5.*DISPATCH PLATFORM COMPLETE|pile dispatch complete" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-23-closure-report.md 2>/dev/null; then
    append_to_report "TR-PHASE-5-COMPLETE" "Phase 5 Dispatch Platform complete" "PASS" "3/3 sprints livres"
  else
    append_to_report "TR-PHASE-5-COMPLETE" "Phase 5 declaration" "WARN" "Sprint 23 closure incomplete"
  fi
else
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE-5-COMPLETE" "Phase 5" "FAIL" "Only $PHASE_5_REPORTS/3 sprints"
fi
```

### TR-DECISIONS-REFERENCED

```bash
REF=$(grep -rE "decision-00[1-9]|decision-0[12][0-9]" repo/packages/garage-networks/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$REF" -ge 10 ] && append_to_report "TR-DECISIONS" "Decisions >=10" "PASS" "$REF" || append_to_report "TR-DECISIONS" "Decisions" "WARN" "$REF"

### TR-VARIABLES-ENV

```bash
VARS=(NETWORK_PRIORITY_WEIGHT NETWORK_LEAVE_CANCELLATION_DAYS NETWORK_TIER_AUTO_UPGRADE_CRON NETWORK_ANALYTICS_REFRESH_CRON NETWORK_CONTRACT_MAX_VERSIONS_HISTORY NETWORK_MEMBER_MAX_PER_INSURER)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "6 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "6 vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
SKIP=$(grep -cE "\| SKIP \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN + SKIP))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

CRITICAL_CROSS_TENANT=$(grep -c "TR-CROSS-TENANT.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_S21=$(grep -c "TR-S21.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_S22=$(grep -c "TR-S22.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_PHASE5=$(grep -c "TR-PHASE-5-COMPLETE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_CROSS_TENANT" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CROSS-TENANT ISOLATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_S21" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 21 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_S22" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 22 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_PHASE5" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PHASE 5 NON COMPLETE"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO -- PHASE 5 COMPLETE"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
- Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN / SKIP : $SKIP

**Score** : ${SCORE}%
**Decision** : $DECISION
**SPRINT 23 STATUS** : $DECISION

## PHASE 5 SKALEAN DISPATCH PLATFORM STATUS
- Sprint 21 (Sinistre Workflow Uber-Style) : LIVRE
- Sprint 22 (Workflow Expertise Validation) : LIVRE
- Sprint 23 (Garage Networks) : $DECISION
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-23 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%) -- PHASE 5 DISPATCH PLATFORM STATUS"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-CROSS-TENANT **BLOCKING** -- multi-tenant isolation strict critique.

**2** : TR-S21 **BLOCKING** -- integration Sprint 21 matching priority.

**3** : TR-S22 **BLOCKING** -- integration Sprint 22 compensation override.

**4** : TR-PHASE-5-COMPLETE **BLOCKING** -- milestone Phase 5 declaration.

**5** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING**.

**6** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Phase 6 Sprint 24.

**7** : Coverage >= 85% acceptable.

---

**FIN V-23**

**SPRINT 23 = CLOTURE PHASE 5 SKALEAN DISPATCH PLATFORM COMPLETE**

**Verification suivante** : V-24 Apps Sinistre Foundation (Phase 6 Sprint 1).
```

## 26. V-24-sprint-24-verification.md

```md
# V-24 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 24 : GARAGE APP FOUNDATION

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 6 -- Apps Sinistre (Sprint 1)
**Sprint** : 24 / 37
**Reference** : `B-24`, `C-24`, `G-24`
**Total criteres** : 90 (72 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 24 = **premier sprint Phase 6 Apps Sinistre**. Verifications strictes garage app web + mobile + shared library + design tokens + cross-app SSO + multi-app deployment + multi-actor proof point.

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint24-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 24 : Garage App Foundation (PHASE 6 SPRINT 1)

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 6 -- Apps Sinistre
**Sprint** : 24
**Reference B-24** : 12 taches, 90 criteres
**Executeur** : Claude Code

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details | Reparation |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|------------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 | ${5:-N/A} |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATION TACHE 7.1.12 -- Tests + Closure

```bash
TOTAL=$(pnpm vitest run tests/e2e/sprint-24/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge 30 ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=30" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

# Performance web TTI < 3s
TTI=$(node repo/apps/garage-portal/scripts/measure-tti.js 2>&1 | grep -oP "TTI.*\K\d+\.?\d*")
[ -n "$TTI" ] && [ "$(echo "$TTI < 3" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Web TTI < 3s" "PASS" "${TTI}s" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "Web TTI" "WARN" "${TTI}s"

# Mobile cold start < 2s
COLD=$(node repo/apps/garage-mobile-portal/scripts/measure-cold-start.js 2>&1 | grep -oP "ColdStart.*\K\d+\.?\d*")
[ -n "$COLD" ] && [ "$(echo "$COLD < 2" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V3" "Mobile cold start < 2s" "PASS" "${COLD}s" || append_to_report "T12-V3" "Cold start" "WARN" "${COLD}s"

COV=$(pnpm vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V4" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V4" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

[ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-24-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 25|multi-actor" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-24-closure-report.md && append_to_report "T12-V5" "Sprint 24 closure" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V5" "Closure" "FAIL" "Manquant"
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

### TR-BUILD

```bash
pnpm turbo run build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build all apps" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"
```

### TR-TYPECHECK

```bash
pnpm turbo run typecheck 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck all" "PASS" "Clean" || { ERR=$(grep -c "error TS" /tmp/tsc.log); append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "$ERR"; }
```

### TR-NO-EMOJI

```bash
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/apps/garage-portal/src/ repo/apps/garage-mobile-portal/ repo/packages/ui-shared/src/ repo/packages/design-tokens/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"
```

### TR-DECISION-025

```bash
[ -f "decisions/025-multi-app-architecture-shared-ui.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/025-multi-app-architecture-shared-ui.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-025" "Decision-025" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-025" "Decision-025" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"
```

### TR-SHARED-LIBRARY (CRITIQUE)

```bash
if [ -f "repo/packages/ui-shared/package.json" ] && [ -d "repo/packages/ui-shared/src/components" ]; then
  COMPONENTS=$(ls repo/packages/ui-shared/src/components/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  [ "$COMPONENTS" -ge 20 ] && append_to_report "TR-UI-SHARED" "Shared lib operational" "PASS" "$COMPONENTS components" || append_to_report "TR-UI-SHARED" "Shared lib" "FAIL" "$COMPONENTS components"
else
  append_to_report "TR-UI-SHARED" "Shared lib" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi
```

### TR-CROSS-APP-SSO (CRITIQUE)

```bash
TESTS_SSO=$(pnpm vitest run tests/e2e/sso.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
if [ "$TESTS_SSO" -ge 8 ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-SSO" "Cross-app SSO" "PASS" "$TESTS_SSO tests"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SSO" "SSO" "FAIL" "Tests insufficient"
fi
```

### TR-MULTI-ACTOR-PROOF-POINT (CRITIQUE)

```bash
# Verify 2 customer apps + 2 garage apps + 2 placeholders
APPS=$(ls repo/apps/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$APPS" -ge 4 ] && append_to_report "TR-MULTI-ACTOR" "Multi-actor apps" "PASS" "$APPS apps" || append_to_report "TR-MULTI-ACTOR" "Multi-actor" "FAIL" "$APPS apps"
```

### TR-DECISIONS-REFERENCED

```bash
REF=$(grep -rE "decision-00[1-9]|decision-0[12][0-9]" repo/apps/garage-portal/src/ repo/apps/garage-mobile-portal/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$REF" -ge 8 ] && append_to_report "TR-DECISIONS" "Decisions >=8" "PASS" "$REF" || append_to_report "TR-DECISIONS" "Decisions" "WARN" "$REF"
```

### TR-VARIABLES-ENV

```bash
VARS=(GARAGE_PORTAL_PORT GARAGE_MOBILE_BUNDLE_ID UI_SHARED_VERSION DESIGN_TOKENS_VERSION CROSS_APP_DOMAIN TURBO_CACHE_DIR)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "6 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "6 vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
SKIP=$(grep -cE "\| SKIP \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN + SKIP))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

CRITICAL_UI=$(grep -c "TR-UI-SHARED.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_SSO=$(grep -c "TR-SSO.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_MULTI=$(grep -c "TR-MULTI-ACTOR.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_UI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SHARED UI LIBRARY FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_SSO" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CROSS-APP SSO FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_MULTI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- MULTI-ACTOR PROOF POINT FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
- Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN / SKIP : $SKIP

**Score** : ${SCORE}%
**Decision** : $DECISION
**SPRINT 24 STATUS** : $DECISION
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-24 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-UI-SHARED **BLOCKING** -- foundation Phase 6.

**2** : TR-SSO **BLOCKING** -- cross-app authentication.

**3** : TR-MULTI-ACTOR **BLOCKING** -- proof point Demo Day.

**4** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING**.

**5** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 25.

**6** : Coverage >= 85% acceptable.

---

**FIN V-24**

**Verification suivante** : V-25 Cross-Tenant Framework (Phase 6 Sprint 2).
```

## 27. V-25-sprint-25-verification.md

```md
# V-25 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 25 : CROSS-TENANT FRAMEWORK

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 6 -- Apps Sinistre (Sprint 2)
**Sprint** : 25 / 37
**Reference** : `B-25`, `C-25`, `G-25`
**Total criteres** : 88 (70 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 25 = **proof point ACAPS-grade security cross-tenant**. Verifications strictes framework + guard + super-admin RBAC + 2FA + anonymization + ACAPS reports + audit reinforced + isolation strict.

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint25-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 25 : Cross-Tenant Framework (PHASE 6 SPRINT 2)

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 6 -- Apps Sinistre
**Sprint** : 25
**Reference B-25** : 12 taches, 88 criteres
**Executeur** : Claude Code

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details | Reparation |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|------------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 | ${5:-N/A} |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATION TACHE 7.2.1 -- Decision-026

```bash
[ -f "decisions/026-cross-tenant-framework-super-admin.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/026-cross-tenant-framework-super-admin.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-026" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-026" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/cross-tenant-framework-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/cross-tenant-framework-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1000 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=20p" "PASS" "$LINES" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES"
```

TABLES_RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "
  SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('cross_tenant_operations','cross_tenant_policies','anonymization_rules')
" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES_RLS" = "3" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "3 tables" "PASS" "3/3" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES_RLS/3"

# ESLint rule custom

[ "$TESTS" -ge 16 ] && append_to_report "T02-V6" "Tests framework >=16" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"

## VERIFICATION TACHE 7.2.12 -- Tests + Closure

```bash
TOTAL=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/cross-tenant-framework vitest run tests/e2e/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge 30 ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=30" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

# Benchmarks

[ -n "$P95" ] && [ "$(echo "$P95 < 2" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Query P95 < 2s" "PASS" "${P95}s" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "P95" "WARN" "${P95}s"

COV=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/cross-tenant-framework vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V3" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V3" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

[ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-25-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 26|ACAPS-grade" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-25-closure-report.md && append_to_report "T12-V4" "Sprint 25 closure" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V4" "Closure" "FAIL" "Manquant"
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

### TR-BUILD

```bash
pnpm --filter @insurtech/cross-tenant-framework build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"
```

### TR-TYPECHECK

```bash
pnpm --filter @insurtech/cross-tenant-framework tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || { ERR=$(grep -c "error TS" /tmp/tsc.log); append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "$ERR"; }
```

### TR-NO-EMOJI

```bash
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/cross-tenant-framework/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"
```

### TR-DECISION-026

```bash
[ -f "decisions/026-cross-tenant-framework-super-admin.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/026-cross-tenant-framework-super-admin.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-026" "Decision-026" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-026" "Decision-026" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"
```

### TR-FRAMEWORK-OPERATIONAL (CRITIQUE)

```bash
DECORATOR=$([ -f "repo/packages/cross-tenant-framework/src/decorators/cross-tenant.decorator.ts" ] && echo "OK" || echo "FAIL")
GUARD=$([ -f "repo/packages/cross-tenant-framework/src/guards/cross-tenant.guard.ts" ] && echo "OK" || echo "FAIL")
if [ "$DECORATOR" = "OK" ] && [ "$GUARD" = "OK" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FRAMEWORK" "Framework operational" "PASS" "Decorator + Guard"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FRAMEWORK" "Framework" "FAIL" "Manquants"
fi
```

### TR-2FA-MANDATORY (CRITIQUE SECURITY)

```bash
if grep -qE "2FA|TOTP|two_factor.*required" repo/packages/auth/src/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-2FA" "2FA mandatory" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-2FA" "2FA" "FAIL" "Non implemente"
fi
```

### TR-ANONYMIZATION-STRATEGIES (CRITIQUE PRIVACY)

[ "$STRATEGIES" -ge 5 ] && append_to_report "TR-ANONYMIZATION" "5 strategies anonymization" "PASS" "$STRATEGIES" || append_to_report "TR-ANONYMIZATION" "Anonymization" "FAIL" "$STRATEGIES strategies"

### TR-AUDIT-7-YEARS (CRITIQUE COMPLIANCE)

```bash
if grep -qE "CROSS_TENANT_AUDIT_RETENTION_YEARS=7|7.*years.*audit" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-AUDIT-7Y" "Audit 7+ years" "PASS" "OK"

### TR-CROSS-TENANT-ISOLATION (CRITIQUE)

```bash
TESTS_NEG=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/cross-tenant-framework vitest run tests/integration/cross-tenant-isolation.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
if [ "$TESTS_NEG" -ge 4 ]; then

### TR-VARIABLES-ENV

```bash
VARS=(CROSS_TENANT_SUPER_ADMIN_2FA_REQUIRED CROSS_TENANT_SESSION_TIMEOUT_MINUTES CROSS_TENANT_MAX_QUERIES_PER_HOUR CROSS_TENANT_QUERY_TIMEOUT_SECONDS CROSS_TENANT_AUDIT_RETENTION_YEARS ANONYMIZATION_K_MIN_RECORDS ANONYMIZATION_EPSILON_DP_DEFAULT ACAPS_REPORT_CRON)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "8 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "8 vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
SKIP=$(grep -cE "\| SKIP \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN + SKIP))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

CRITICAL_FRAMEWORK=$(grep -c "TR-FRAMEWORK.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_2FA=$(grep -c "TR-2FA.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_ANON=$(grep -c "TR-ANONYMIZATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_AUDIT=$(grep -c "TR-AUDIT-7Y.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_ISO=$(grep -c "TR-ISOLATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_FRAMEWORK" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FRAMEWORK FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_2FA" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- 2FA SECURITY FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_ANON" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ANONYMIZATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_AUDIT" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- AUDIT RETENTION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_ISO" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CROSS-TENANT ISOLATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
- Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN / SKIP : $SKIP

**Score** : ${SCORE}%
**Decision** : $DECISION
**SPRINT 25 STATUS** : $DECISION
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-25 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FRAMEWORK **BLOCKING** -- decorator + guard foundation.

**2** : TR-2FA **BLOCKING** -- security super-admin critique.

**3** : TR-ANONYMIZATION **BLOCKING** -- privacy 5 strategies.

**4** : TR-AUDIT-7Y **BLOCKING** -- compliance retention 7+ years.

**5** : TR-ISOLATION **BLOCKING** -- multi-tenant strict.

**6** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING**.

**7** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 26.

**8** : Coverage >= 85% acceptable.

---

**FIN V-25**

**Verification suivante** : V-26 Admin Foundation (Phase 6 Sprint 3).
```

## 28. V-26-sprint-26-verification.md

```md
# V-26 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 26 : ADMIN FOUNDATION

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 6 -- Apps Sinistre (Sprint 3)
**Sprint** : 26 / 37
**Reference** : `B-26`, `C-26`, `G-26`
**Total criteres** : 90 (72 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 26 = **completion multi-actor experience**. Verifications strictes admin-portal + reviewer-portal + 2FA enforcement + reviewer workflow migration + cross-tenant integration + audit viewer + multi-app deployment + multi-actor proof point Demo Day.

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint26-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 26 : Admin Foundation (PHASE 6 SPRINT 3)

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 6 -- Apps Sinistre
**Sprint** : 26
**Reference B-26** : 12 taches, 90 criteres
**Executeur** : Claude Code

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details | Reparation |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|------------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 | ${5:-N/A} |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATION TACHE 7.3.12 -- Tests + Closure

```bash
TOTAL=$(pnpm vitest run tests/e2e/sprint-26/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge 30 ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=30" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

# Performance admin + reviewer TTI < 3s
TTI_ADMIN=$(node repo/apps/admin-portal/scripts/measure-tti.js 2>&1 | grep -oP "TTI.*\K\d+\.?\d*")
[ -n "$TTI_ADMIN" ] && [ "$(echo "$TTI_ADMIN < 3" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Admin TTI < 3s" "PASS" "${TTI_ADMIN}s" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "Admin TTI" "WARN" "${TTI_ADMIN}s"

TTI_REV=$(node repo/apps/reviewer-portal/scripts/measure-tti.js 2>&1 | grep -oP "TTI.*\K\d+\.?\d*")
[ -n "$TTI_REV" ] && [ "$(echo "$TTI_REV < 3" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V3" "Reviewer TTI < 3s" "PASS" "${TTI_REV}s" || append_to_report "T12-V3" "Reviewer TTI" "WARN" "${TTI_REV}s"

COV=$(pnpm vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V4" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V4" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

[ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-26-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 27|multi-actor.*complete" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-26-closure-report.md && append_to_report "T12-V5" "Closure" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V5" "Closure" "FAIL" "Manquant"
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

### TR-BUILD

```bash
pnpm turbo run build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build all" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"
```

### TR-TYPECHECK

```bash
pnpm turbo run typecheck 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || { ERR=$(grep -c "error TS" /tmp/tsc.log); append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "$ERR"; }
```

### TR-NO-EMOJI

```bash
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/apps/admin-portal/src/ repo/apps/reviewer-portal/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"
```

### TR-DECISION-027

```bash
[ -f "decisions/027-admin-foundation-apps-2fa-enforcement.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/027-admin-foundation-apps-2fa-enforcement.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-027" "Decision-027" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-027" "Decision-027" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"
```

### TR-ADMIN-PORTAL (CRITIQUE)

if [ -f "repo/apps/admin-portal/package.json" ] && [ -d "repo/apps/admin-portal/src/app" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-ADMIN" "admin-portal operational" "PASS" "OK"

### TR-2FA-ENFORCEMENT (CRITIQUE SECURITY)

```bash
if grep -qE "ADMIN_2FA_REQUIRED_ROLES.*super_admin" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "2FA.*middleware|two_factor.*required" repo/apps/admin-portal/src/middleware.ts 2>/dev/null; then

### TR-REVIEWER-MIGRATION (CRITIQUE)

```bash
TESTS_MIGRATION=$(pnpm --filter reviewer-portal vitest run tests/e2e/migration.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
if [ "$TESTS_MIGRATION" -ge 5 ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-MIGRATION" "Reviewer migration" "PASS" "$TESTS_MIGRATION tests"
else

### TR-MULTI-ACTOR-COMPLETE (CRITIQUE PROOF POINT)

```bash
# 4 apps proof point (customer + garage + admin + reviewer)
APPS_PRODUCTION=0
for app in customer-portal garage-portal admin-portal reviewer-portal; do
  if [ -d "repo/apps/${app}/src" ]; then
    APPS_PRODUCTION=$((APPS_PRODUCTION+1))
  fi
done
[ "$APPS_PRODUCTION" -ge 4 ] && append_to_report "TR-MULTI-ACTOR" "Multi-actor 4 apps" "PASS" "$APPS_PRODUCTION/4" || append_to_report "TR-MULTI-ACTOR" "Multi-actor" "FAIL" "$APPS_PRODUCTION/4"
```

### TR-VARIABLES-ENV

```bash
VARS=(ADMIN_PORTAL_PORT REVIEWER_PORTAL_PORT ADMIN_2FA_REQUIRED_ROLES REVIEWER_AUTO_SAVE_INTERVAL_SECONDS REVIEWER_LOCK_TIMEOUT_HOURS MIGRATION_REVIEWER_GRACE_PERIOD_DAYS)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "6 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "6 vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
SKIP=$(grep -cE "\| SKIP \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN + SKIP))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

CRITICAL_ADMIN=$(grep -c "TR-ADMIN.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_REVIEWER=$(grep -c "TR-REVIEWER.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_2FA=$(grep -c "TR-2FA.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_MIGRATION=$(grep -c "TR-MIGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_MULTI=$(grep -c "TR-MULTI-ACTOR.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_ADMIN" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ADMIN-PORTAL FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_REVIEWER" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- REVIEWER-PORTAL FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_2FA" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- 2FA ENFORCEMENT FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_MIGRATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- REVIEWER MIGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_MULTI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- MULTI-ACTOR FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
- Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN / SKIP : $SKIP

**Score** : ${SCORE}%
**Decision** : $DECISION
**SPRINT 26 STATUS** : $DECISION
**MULTI-ACTOR COMPLETE** : 4 apps production-grade dedicated
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-26 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-ADMIN-PORTAL **BLOCKING**.
**2** : TR-REVIEWER-PORTAL **BLOCKING**.
**3** : TR-2FA **BLOCKING** -- security critique.
**4** : TR-MIGRATION **BLOCKING** -- reviewer Sprint 22 parity.
**5** : TR-MULTI-ACTOR **BLOCKING** -- proof point Demo Day.
**6** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING**.
**7** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 27.

---

**FIN V-26**

**Verification suivante** : V-27 Tenants Management (Phase 6 Sprint 4).
```

## 29. V-27-sprint-27-verification.md

```md
# V-27 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 27 : TENANTS MANAGEMENT

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 6 -- Apps Sinistre (Sprint 4)
**Sprint** : 27 / 37
**Reference** : `B-27`, `C-27`, `G-27`
**Total criteres** : 85 (67 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 27 = **tenants lifecycle complete commercial enablement**. Verifications strictes creation + KYC + configuration + branding + suspension safeguards + deletion cascade + billing foundation + admin UI.

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint27-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 27 : Tenants Management

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 6 -- Apps Sinistre
**Sprint** : 27
**Reference B-27** : 12 taches, 85 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/tenants-management build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/tenants-management tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/tenants-management/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-028
[ -f "decisions/028-tenants-lifecycle-management.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/028-tenants-lifecycle-management.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-028" "Decision-028" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-028" "Decision-028" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-LIFECYCLE (CRITIQUE)
LIFECYCLE_SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/tenants-management/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$LIFECYCLE_SERVICES" -ge 7 ] && append_to_report "TR-LIFECYCLE" "7 services lifecycle" "PASS" "$LIFECYCLE_SERVICES" || append_to_report "TR-LIFECYCLE" "Services" "FAIL" "$LIFECYCLE_SERVICES"

# TR-KYC-ACAPS (CRITIQUE COMPLIANCE)
if grep -qE "RC|IF|ICE|acaps_license|bank_certificate" repo/packages/tenants-management/src/services/tenant-kyc.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-KYC" "KYC ACAPS-grade 5 docs" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-KYC" "KYC" "FAIL" "5 docs manquants"
fi

# TR-SUSPENSION-SAFEGUARDS (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "active.*sinistres|verify.*in_progress" repo/packages/tenants-management/src/services/tenant-suspension.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SAFEGUARDS" "Suspension safeguards" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SAFEGUARDS" "Safeguards" "FAIL" "Manquants"
fi

# TR-DELETION-CASCADE (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "soft-delete.*7.*years|AnonymizationService" repo/packages/tenants-management/src/services/tenant-deletion.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-DELETION" "Deletion cascade safe" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-DELETION" "Deletion" "FAIL" "Cascade unsafe"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(TENANT_SUSPENSION_GRACE_DAYS TENANT_DELETION_RETENTION_YEARS TENANT_DELETION_CONFIRM_TOKEN_TTL_MINUTES TENANT_KYC_REQUIRED_DOCUMENTS TENANT_ACAPS_LICENSE_REGEX)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "5 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "5 vars" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

CRITICAL_LIFECYCLE=$(grep -c "TR-LIFECYCLE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_KYC=$(grep -c "TR-KYC.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_SAFE=$(grep -c "TR-SAFEGUARDS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_DEL=$(grep -c "TR-DELETION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_LIFECYCLE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- LIFECYCLE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_KYC" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- KYC ACAPS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_SAFE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SAFEGUARDS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_DEL" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- DELETION UNSAFE"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-27 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-LIFECYCLE **BLOCKING** -- 7 services lifecycle.
**2** : TR-KYC **BLOCKING** -- ACAPS-grade compliance.
**3** : TR-SAFEGUARDS **BLOCKING** -- suspension active sinistres.
**4** : TR-DELETION **BLOCKING** -- soft + anonymize + 7 years.
**5** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING**.
**6** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 28.

---

**FIN V-27**

**Verification suivante** : V-28 Admin Reports + Compliance.
```

# V-28 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 28 : ADMIN REPORTS + CLOTURE PHASE 6

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 6 -- Apps Sinistre (Sprint 5 DERNIER -- CLOTURE PHASE 6)
**Sprint** : 28 / 37
**Reference** : `B-28`, `C-28`, `G-28`
**Total criteres** : 88 (70 taches + 18 globaux)

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint28-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 28 : Admin Reports + Compliance (CLOTURE PHASE 6)

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 6 -- Apps Sinistre (Sprint 5 DERNIER)
**Sprint** : 28
**Reference B-28** : 12 taches, 88 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/reports-framework build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/reports-framework tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/reports-framework/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-029
[ -f "decisions/029-admin-reports-framework.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/029-admin-reports-framework.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-029" "Decision-029" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-029" "Decision-029" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-REPORTS-FRAMEWORK (CRITIQUE)
if [ -d "repo/packages/reports-framework/src/services" ] && [ "$(ls repo/packages/reports-framework/src/services/ | wc -l)" -ge 5 ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FRAMEWORK" "Reports framework operational" "PASS" "5 services"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FRAMEWORK" "Framework" "FAIL" "Services manquants"
fi

# TR-CATALOG (CRITIQUE)
CATALOG=$(ls repo/packages/reports-framework/src/catalog/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$CATALOG" -ge 8 ] && append_to_report "TR-CATALOG" "8 system reports catalog" "PASS" "$CATALOG" || append_to_report "TR-CATALOG" "Catalog" "FAIL" "$CATALOG/8"

# TR-SQL-SANDBOX (CRITIQUE SECURITY)
if grep -qE "whitelist|sandbox|no.*DELETE" repo/packages/reports-framework/src/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SQL-SANDBOX" "SQL sandbox safe" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SQL-SANDBOX" "SQL sandbox" "FAIL" "Non securise"
fi

# TR-PHASE-6-COMPLETE (CRITIQUE MILESTONE)
PHASE_6_REPORTS=0
for sprint in 24 25 26 27 28; do
  if [ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-${sprint}-closure-report.md" ]; then
    PHASE_6_REPORTS=$((PHASE_6_REPORTS+1))
  fi
done

if [ "$PHASE_6_REPORTS" = "5" ]; then
  if grep -qE "PHASE 6.*APPS SINISTRE.*COMPLETE|ecosystem apps complete" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-28-closure-report.md 2>/dev/null; then
    append_to_report "TR-PHASE-6-COMPLETE" "Phase 6 Apps Sinistre complete" "PASS" "5/5 sprints livres"
  else
    append_to_report "TR-PHASE-6-COMPLETE" "Phase 6 declaration" "WARN" "Sprint 28 closure incomplete"
  fi
else
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE-6-COMPLETE" "Phase 6" "FAIL" "Only $PHASE_6_REPORTS/5 sprints"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(REPORTS_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS REPORTS_EXECUTION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS REPORTS_S3_RETENTION_DAYS REPORTS_DAILY_CRON REPORTS_WEEKLY_CRON REPORTS_MONTHLY_CRON REPORTS_QUARTERLY_CRON)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "7 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "7 vars" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

CRITICAL_FRAMEWORK=$(grep -c "TR-FRAMEWORK.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_CATALOG=$(grep -c "TR-CATALOG.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_SANDBOX=$(grep -c "TR-SQL-SANDBOX.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_PHASE6=$(grep -c "TR-PHASE-6-COMPLETE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_FRAMEWORK" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FRAMEWORK FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_CATALOG" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CATALOG FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_SANDBOX" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SQL SANDBOX SECURITY FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_PHASE6" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PHASE 6 INCOMPLETE"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO -- PHASE 6 COMPLETE"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## PHASE 6 APPS SINISTRE STATUS
- Sprint 24 (Garage App + Multi-App) : LIVRE
- Sprint 25 (Cross-Tenant Framework) : LIVRE
- Sprint 26 (Admin Foundation) : LIVRE
- Sprint 27 (Tenants Management) : LIVRE
- Sprint 28 (Admin Reports + Compliance) : $DECISION
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-28 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%) -- PHASE 6 APPS SINISTRE STATUS"
```

**2** : TR-CATALOG **BLOCKING** -- 8 system reports.
**3** : TR-SQL-SANDBOX **BLOCKING** -- security custom builder.
**4** : TR-PHASE-6-COMPLETE **BLOCKING** -- milestone declaration.
**5** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING**.
**6** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Phase 7 Garage Vertical.

---

**FIN V-28**

**SPRINT 28 = CLOTURE PHASE 6 APPS SINISTRE COMPLETE**

**Verification suivante** : V-29 Phase 7 Garage Vertical (Sprint 29).
```

## 31. V-29-sprint-29-verification.md

```md
# V-29 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 29 : GARAGE VERTICAL FOUNDATION + DIRECT CUSTOMER BOOKING

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprint 1)
**Sprint** : 29 / 37
**Reference** : `B-29`, `C-29`, `G-29`
**Total criteres** : 88 (70 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 29 = **PREMIER sprint Phase 7 Garage Vertical** + **pivot commercial expansion 2-sided platform** + **Sprint 11 payment integration direct flow**. Verifications strictes 5 entites + RLS strict garage_id + indexes + UNIQUE constraints + 5 services + Sprint 11 adapter + Sprint 18+24 extensions + SEO Schema.org + reviews verified_purchase + analytics vertical split.

5 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 5 services foundation
- TR-SPRINT11-INTEGRATION : payment direct flow adapter
- TR-VERIFIED-PURCHASE : reviews authenticity enforced
- TR-SEO-SCHEMA-ORG : public profile structured data valid
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint29-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 29 : Garage Vertical Foundation + Direct Customer Booking

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprint 1 PREMIER)
**Sprint** : 29
**Reference B-29** : 12 taches, 88 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

---

## VERIFICATION TACHES

### 8.1.1 Decision-030 + Design Doc

```bash
[ -f "decisions/030-garage-vertical-direct-customer.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/030-garage-vertical-direct-customer.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-030 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-030" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/garage-vertical-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/garage-vertical-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1000 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=20 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

# Roadmap Phase 7+ + Phase 8+
grep -qE "Sprint 30|Sprint 31|Sprint 32|Sprint 33|Phase 8\+" decisions/030-garage-vertical-direct-customer.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "Roadmap Phase 7+ 8+" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "Roadmap" "WARN" "Verify"
```

### 8.1.2 Entites

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/garage-vertical/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package garage-vertical" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 5 tables
TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('garage_services','direct_bookings','direct_customers','garage_public_profiles','direct_reviews')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "5 tables" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/5"

# UNIQUE slug_seo global
UNIQUE_SLUG=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='garage_public_profiles' AND indexname LIKE '%slug_seo%' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_SLUG" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE slug_seo global" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE slug" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# UNIQUE (garage_id, phone) DirectCustomer
UNIQUE_CUST=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='direct_customers' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%' AND indexdef LIKE '%garage_id%' AND indexdef LIKE '%phone%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_CUST" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE (garage_id, phone)" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE customer" "WARN" "Verify"

# UNIQUE booking_id DirectReview
UNIQUE_REV=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='direct_reviews' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%' AND indexdef LIKE '%booking_id%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_REV" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "UNIQUE booking_id review" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "UNIQUE review" "WARN" "Verify"

# RLS strict toutes 5 tables
RLS_COUNT=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('garage_services','direct_bookings','direct_customers','garage_public_profiles','direct_reviews') AND rowsecurity=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS_COUNT" = "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V6" "RLS strict 5 tables" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS_COUNT/5"

# RLS special public profile bypass active=true
grep -qE "public_read.*active.*true|active.*true.*public" repo/packages/garage-vertical/migrations/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T02-V7" "Public profile RLS bypass" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V7" "Public RLS" "WARN" "Verify"

# Seeds garages demos
SEEDS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM garage_services WHERE active=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$SEEDS" -ge "45" ] && append_to_report "T02-V8" "Seeds services >=45" "PASS" "$SEEDS" || append_to_report "T02-V8" "Seeds" "WARN" "$SEEDS"

# Tests entites
TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-vertical vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 14 ] && append_to_report "T02-V9" "Tests >=14" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V9" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

### 8.1.4 DirectBookingService Sprint 11 Integration CRITIQUE

```bash
[ -f "repo/packages/garage-vertical/src/services/direct-booking.service.ts" ] && append_to_report "T04-V1" "DirectBookingService" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T04-V1" "Service" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Sprint 11 PayoutInstantService integration
grep -qE "PayoutInstantService|preAuthorize|capture|refund.*Sprint 11" repo/packages/garage-vertical/src/services/direct-booking.service.ts 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T04-V2" "Sprint 11 integration" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T04-V2" "Sprint 11" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Workflow methods
METHODS=$(grep -cE "bookDirectGarage|completeBooking|cancelBooking" repo/packages/garage-vertical/src/services/direct-booking.service.ts 2>/dev/null)
[ "$METHODS" -ge "3" ] && append_to_report "T04-V3" "3 workflow methods" "PASS" "$METHODS" || append_to_report "T04-V3" "Methods" "FAIL" "$METHODS/3"

# 4 payment methods
PAYS=$(grep -cE "mwallet|bank_transfer|cashplus|cash_on_delivery" repo/packages/garage-vertical/src/services/direct-booking.service.ts 2>/dev/null)
[ "$PAYS" -ge "4" ] && append_to_report "T04-V4" "4 payment methods" "PASS" "$PAYS" || append_to_report "T04-V4" "Payments" "WARN" "$PAYS"

# Availability optimistic locking
grep -qE "optimistic|transaction.*availability|SELECT.*conflicting" repo/packages/garage-vertical/src/services/direct-booking.service.ts 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T04-V5" "Availability locking" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T04-V5" "Locking" "WARN" "Verify"

# Cancellation penalty 10% < 24h
grep -qE "DIRECT_BOOKING_CANCELLATION_PENALTY_PERCENT=10|cancellation.*penalty.*10|< 24h" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T04-V6" "Cancellation penalty" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T04-V6" "Penalty" "WARN" "Verify"

# Sprint 9 notifications
grep -qE "Sprint 9|notify.*garage_owner|notify.*customer|booking_confirmed" repo/packages/garage-vertical/src/services/direct-booking.service.ts 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T04-V7" "Sprint 9 notifications" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T04-V7" "Notifications" "WARN" "Verify"

# Tests
TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-vertical vitest run tests/unit/direct-booking.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 16 ] && append_to_report "T04-V8" "Tests >=16" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T04-V8" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"

# Tests stress concurrent
STRESS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-vertical vitest run tests/stress/concurrent-booking.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$STRESS" ] && [ "$STRESS" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T04-V9" "Tests stress concurrent" "PASS" "$STRESS" || append_to_report "T04-V9" "Stress" "WARN" "Verify"
```
