### 8.1.12 Tests + Closure

```bash
TOTAL=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-vertical vitest run tests/e2e/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge "30" ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=30" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

COV=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-vertical vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

# Benchmark profile load
PROFILE_P95=$(bash repo/packages/garage-vertical/scripts/bench-profile.sh 2>&1 | grep -oP "P95.*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$PROFILE_P95" ] && [ "$(echo "$PROFILE_P95 < 1000" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V3" "Profile load P95 < 1s" "PASS" "${PROFILE_P95}ms" || append_to_report "T12-V3" "Profile perf" "WARN" "${PROFILE_P95}ms"

# Closure
[ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-29-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 30|commercial differentiation|2-sided platform" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-29-closure-report.md && append_to_report "T12-V4" "Closure + Sprint 30 prereqs" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V4" "Closure" "FAIL" "Manquant"
```

---

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-vertical build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-vertical tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/garage-vertical/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-030
[ -f "decisions/030-garage-vertical-direct-customer.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/030-garage-vertical-direct-customer.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-030" "Decision-030" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-030" "Decision-030" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE) -- 5 services
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/garage-vertical/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
[ "$SERVICES" -ge "5" ] && append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "5 services foundation" "PASS" "$SERVICES" || append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "$SERVICES/5"

# TR-SPRINT11-INTEGRATION (CRITIQUE) -- payment direct flow
if grep -qE "PayoutInstantService|preAuthorize.*capture.*refund" repo/packages/garage-vertical/src/services/direct-booking.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT11-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 11 payment direct" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT11-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 11" "FAIL" "Non integre"
fi

# TR-VERIFIED-PURCHASE (CRITIQUE) -- reviews authenticity
if grep -qE "verified_purchase.*true|booking.status.*completed" repo/packages/garage-vertical/src/services/direct-review.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-VERIFIED-PURCHASE" "verified_purchase enforced" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-VERIFIED-PURCHASE" "Verified" "FAIL" "Non verifie"
fi

# TR-SEO-SCHEMA-ORG (CRITIQUE) -- structured data
if grep -qE "Schema\.org|LocalBusiness|AutomotiveBusiness|application/ld\+json" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SEO-SCHEMA-ORG" "Schema.org JSON-LD" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SEO-SCHEMA-ORG" "Schema.org" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(DIRECT_BOOKING_COMMISSION_PERCENT DIRECT_BOOKING_CANCELLATION_PENALTY_PERCENT DIRECT_BOOKING_CANCELLATION_PENALTY_WINDOW_HOURS PUBLIC_PROFILE_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS DIRECT_REVIEW_MIN_DAYS_AFTER_BOOKING DIRECT_REVIEW_MAX_DAYS_AFTER_BOOKING DIRECT_REVIEW_MAX_PHOTOS GARAGE_SERVICES_MAX_PHOTOS_PER_SERVICE GARAGE_PUBLIC_PROFILE_PHOTOS_GALLERY_MAX DIRECT_BOOKING_REMINDER_HOURS_BEFORE DIRECT_BOOKING_AVAILABILITY_CHECK_BUFFER_MINUTES)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "11 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

CRITICAL_FOUNDATION=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_SPRINT11=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT11-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_VERIFIED=$(grep -c "TR-VERIFIED-PURCHASE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_SCHEMA=$(grep -c "TR-SEO-SCHEMA-ORG.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_FOUNDATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_SPRINT11" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 11 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_VERIFIED" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- VERIFIED_PURCHASE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_SCHEMA" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SCHEMA.ORG SEO FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 30 Garage Inventory + Mechanic Tools
- Garage vertical foundation Sprint 29 complete
- DirectBooking workflow Sprint 11 integration operational
- GaragePublicProfile + reviews foundation
- Sprint 18+24 extensions UX validees
- Foundation Sprint 30 (inventory tracking + work orders integration Sprint 29 direct booking) OK si Decision=GO
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-29 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 5 services foundation.

**2** : TR-SPRINT11-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- payment direct flow adapter critique pour Sprint 30+ accounting Sprint 31.

**3** : TR-VERIFIED-PURCHASE **BLOCKING** -- reviews authenticity enforce.

**4** : TR-SEO-SCHEMA-ORG **BLOCKING** -- structured data SEO indexing.

**5** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**6** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 30 Garage Inventory + Mechanic Tools.

**7** : Iterate corrections sur taches FAIL avant re-verification.

---

**FIN V-29**

**Verification suivante** : V-30 Sprint 30 Garage Inventory + Mechanic Tools.
```

## 32. V-30-sprint-30-verification.md

```md
# V-30 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 30 : GARAGE INVENTORY + MECHANIC TOOLS

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprint 2)
**Sprint** : 30 / 37
**Reference** : `B-30`, `C-30`, `G-30`
**Total criteres** : 88 (70 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 30 = **garage internal operations management** + **Sprint 22+29 event handlers critique**. Verifications strictes 6 entites + RLS + indexes + 6 services + 2 event handlers Sprint 22/29 + Sprint 24 garage-portal extensions + analytics + endpoints + permissions.

5 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 6 services foundation
- TR-INTEGRATION : Sprint 22+29 event handlers
- TR-RLS : multi-tenant garage_id strict
- TR-OPTIMISTIC-LOCKING : inventory concurrent updates safety
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint30-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 30 : Garage Inventory + Mechanic Tools

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprint 2)
**Sprint** : 30
**Reference B-30** : 12 taches, 88 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

### 8.2.2 Entites

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/garage-internal/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package garage-internal" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 6 tables
TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('inventory_items','inventory_movements','work_orders','mechanics','suppliers','purchase_orders')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "6" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "6 tables" "PASS" "6/6" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/6"

# UNIQUE constraints
UNIQUE_SKU=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE indexname LIKE '%garage_id_sku%' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_SKU" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE (garage_id, sku)" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE sku" "WARN" "Verify"

# RLS strict toutes tables
RLS_COUNT=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('inventory_items','inventory_movements','work_orders','mechanics','suppliers','purchase_orders') AND rowsecurity=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS_COUNT" = "6" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "RLS strict 6 tables" "PASS" "6/6" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS_COUNT/6"

# Version column optimistic locking
grep -qE "version.*INTEGER|version.*NUMBER" repo/packages/garage-internal/migrations/001-create-inventory-items.* 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T02-V5" "Version column items" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "Version" "WARN" "Verify"

# Seeds
SEEDS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_items WHERE active=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$SEEDS" -ge "60" ] && append_to_report "T02-V6" "Seeds inventory items >=60" "PASS" "$SEEDS" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "Seeds" "WARN" "$SEEDS"

# Tests entites
TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-internal vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 16 ] && append_to_report "T02-V7" "Tests entites >=16" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V7" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-internal build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-internal tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/garage-internal/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-031
[ -f "decisions/031-garage-internal-operations-foundation.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/031-garage-internal-operations-foundation.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-031" "Decision-031" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-031" "Decision-031" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE) -- 6 services minimum
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/garage-internal/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
[ "$SERVICES" -ge "6" ] && append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "6 services foundation" "PASS" "$SERVICES" || append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "$SERVICES/6"

# TR-INTEGRATION (CRITIQUE) -- Sprint 22+29 handlers
HANDLERS_22=$([ -f "repo/packages/garage-internal/src/handlers/sinistre-work-submitted.handler.ts" ] && echo "1" || echo "0")
HANDLERS_29=$([ -f "repo/packages/garage-internal/src/handlers/direct-booking-confirmed.handler.ts" ] && echo "1" || echo "0")
if [ "$HANDLERS_22" = "1" ] && [ "$HANDLERS_29" = "1" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 22+29 handlers" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-INTEGRATION" "Integration handlers" "FAIL" "Sprint22=$HANDLERS_22 Sprint29=$HANDLERS_29"
fi

# TR-RLS (CRITIQUE) -- RLS strict toutes tables
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('inventory_items','inventory_movements','work_orders','mechanics','suppliers','purchase_orders') AND rowsecurity=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" = "6" ] && append_to_report "TR-RLS" "RLS strict 6/6 tables" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-RLS" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/6"

# TR-OPTIMISTIC-LOCKING (CRITIQUE) -- version column inventory
LOCKING=$(grep -cE "version|optimistic" repo/packages/garage-internal/src/services/inventory.service.ts 2>/dev/null)
[ "$LOCKING" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "TR-OPTIMISTIC-LOCKING" "Optimistic locking" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-OPTIMISTIC-LOCKING" "Locking" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Variables env
VARS=(INVENTORY_LOW_STOCK_ALERT_DEDUP_HOURS INVENTORY_LOW_STOCK_CRON WORK_ORDER_MAX_DAYS_OPEN MECHANIC_WORKLOAD_ALERT_THRESHOLD_FACTOR MECHANIC_WORKLOAD_CRON MATERIALS_BILLING_DEFAULT_MARKUP_PERCENT INVENTORY_PHOTOS_S3_BUCKET PURCHASE_ORDER_FOUNDATION_ONLY)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "8 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical checks
CRITICAL_FOUNDATION=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_INTEGRATION=$(grep -c "TR-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_RLS=$(grep -c "TR-RLS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_LOCKING=$(grep -c "TR-OPTIMISTIC-LOCKING.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_FOUNDATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_INTEGRATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 22+29 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_RLS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- RLS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_LOCKING" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- OPTIMISTIC LOCKING FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 31 Garage Accounting + Marketing
- Materials cost data tracked accurately (Sprint 30 InventoryMovement + WorkOrder.materials_used)
- Suppliers data available (Sprint 30 Supplier entity)
- Mechanic time tracked (Sprint 30 Mechanic.work_hours_current_period)
- Foundation Sprint 31 invoices generation OK si Decision=GO
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-30 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 6 services foundation.

**2** : TR-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 22+29 event handlers critique pour foundation Sprint 31+.

**3** : TR-RLS **BLOCKING** -- multi-tenant garage_id strict propagation.

**4** : TR-OPTIMISTIC-LOCKING **BLOCKING** -- concurrent inventory updates safety prevention over-consumption.

**5** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**6** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 31 Garage Accounting + Marketing.

**7** : Iterate corrections sur taches FAIL avant re-verification.

---

**FIN V-30**

**Verification suivante** : V-31 Sprint 31 Garage Accounting + Marketing.
```

## 33. V-31-sprint-31-verification.md

```md
# V-31 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 31 : GARAGE ACCOUNTING + MARKETING

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprint 3)
**Sprint** : 31 / 37
**Reference** : `B-31`, `C-31`, `G-31`
**Total criteres** : 90 (72 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 31 = **garage business operations complete** (accounting + marketing + compensation) + **Sprint 22+29 invoicing handlers critique** + **Sprint 30 compensation integration**. Verifications strictes 5 entites + RLS + indexes + 6 services + 2 event handlers + 2 workers + Sprint 24 3 tabs + analytics Sprint 13 + endpoints + permissions.

6 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 6 services foundation
- TR-INTEGRATION : Sprint 22+29 event handlers invoicing
- TR-COMPENSATION-INTEG : Sprint 30 compensation integration
- TR-ATOMIC-NUMBERING : invoice sequential atomic Redis
- TR-CNDP-COMPLIANCE : campaigns opt-out mandatory
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint31-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 31 : Garage Accounting + Marketing

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprint 3)
**Sprint** : 31
**Reference B-31** : 12 taches, 90 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-accounting-marketing build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-accounting-marketing tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/garage-accounting-marketing/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-032
[ -f "decisions/032-garage-accounting-marketing-foundation.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/032-garage-accounting-marketing-foundation.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-032" "Decision-032" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-032" "Decision-032" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE) -- 6 services
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/garage-accounting-marketing/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
[ "$SERVICES" -ge "6" ] && append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "6 services foundation" "PASS" "$SERVICES" || append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "$SERVICES/6"

# TR-INTEGRATION (CRITIQUE) -- Sprint 22+29 handlers
HANDLERS_22=$([ -f "repo/packages/garage-accounting-marketing/src/handlers/sinistre-work-submitted-completed.handler.ts" ] && echo "1" || echo "0")
HANDLERS_29=$([ -f "repo/packages/garage-accounting-marketing/src/handlers/direct-booking-completed.handler.ts" ] && echo "1" || echo "0")
if [ "$HANDLERS_22" = "1" ] && [ "$HANDLERS_29" = "1" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 22+29 handlers" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-INTEGRATION" "Integration" "FAIL" "Sprint22=$HANDLERS_22 Sprint29=$HANDLERS_29"
fi

# TR-COMPENSATION-INTEG (CRITIQUE) -- Sprint 30 integration
if grep -qE "Sprint 30|work_orders.*completed|assigned_mechanic_id" repo/packages/garage-accounting-marketing/src/services/mechanic-compensation.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-COMPENSATION-INTEG" "Sprint 30 integration" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-COMPENSATION-INTEG" "Sprint 30" "FAIL" "Non integre"
fi

# TR-ATOMIC-NUMBERING (CRITIQUE) -- invoice sequential Redis atomic
if grep -qE "SETNX|atomic.*invoice|Redis.*incr" repo/packages/garage-accounting-marketing/src/services/invoicing.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-ATOMIC-NUMBERING" "Atomic numbering Redis" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-ATOMIC-NUMBERING" "Atomic" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-CNDP-COMPLIANCE (CRITIQUE) -- campaigns opt-out mandatory
if grep -qE "CNDP|opt.out|suppress.*list" repo/packages/garage-accounting-marketing/src/services/campaign.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-CNDP-COMPLIANCE" "CNDP opt-out" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CNDP-COMPLIANCE" "CNDP" "FAIL" "Non conforme"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(TAX_TVA_RATE_DEFAULT_PERCENT INVOICE_NUMBER_PREFIX_FORMAT INVOICE_DUE_DAYS_DEFAULT INVOICE_PDF_S3_BUCKET CAMPAIGN_SMS_RATE_LIMIT_PER_HOUR CAMPAIGN_EMAIL_RATE_LIMIT_PER_HOUR CAMPAIGN_OPENS_TRACKING_PIXEL_URL CAMPAIGN_CLICKS_TRACKING_REDIRECT_URL CAMPAIGN_OPT_OUT_LINK_FORMAT MECHANIC_COMPENSATION_COMMISSION_PERCENT_DEFAULT MECHANIC_COMPENSATION_CRON FINANCIAL_DASHBOARD_REFRESH_CRON)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "12 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical checks
CRITICAL_FOUNDATION=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_INTEGRATION=$(grep -c "TR-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_COMPENSATION=$(grep -c "TR-COMPENSATION-INTEG.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_ATOMIC=$(grep -c "TR-ATOMIC-NUMBERING.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_CNDP=$(grep -c "TR-CNDP-COMPLIANCE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_FOUNDATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_INTEGRATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 22+29 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_COMPENSATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 30 COMPENSATION INTEG FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_ATOMIC" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ATOMIC NUMBERING FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_CNDP" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CNDP COMPLIANCE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 32 Garage Online + Loyalty
- Garage operations Sprint 30 complete
- Garage accounting + marketing + compensation Sprint 31 complete
- Foundation Sprint 32 (loyalty programs + customer outreach already established) OK si Decision=GO
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-31 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 6 services foundation.

**2** : TR-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 22+29 invoicing handlers critique pour business operations.

**3** : TR-COMPENSATION-INTEG **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 30 work_orders.completed integration critique.

**4** : TR-ATOMIC-NUMBERING **BLOCKING** -- invoice sequential atomic Redis prevention violations UNIQUE.

**5** : TR-CNDP-COMPLIANCE **BLOCKING** -- campaigns opt-out mandatory legal compliance Morocco.

**6** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**7** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 32 Garage Online + Loyalty.

**8** : Iterate corrections sur taches FAIL avant re-verification.

---

**FIN V-31**

**Verification suivante** : V-32 Sprint 32 Garage Online + Loyalty.
```

## 34. V-32-sprint-32-verification.md

```md
# V-32 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 32 : GARAGE ONLINE + LOYALTY

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprint 4)
**Sprint** : 32 / 37
**Reference** : `B-32`, `C-32`, `G-32`
**Total criteres** : 92 (74 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 32 = **customer retention** (loyalty + referrals) + **online presence advanced** (SEO + content marketing + testimonials showcase) + **Sprint 29 integration earn points CRITIQUE**. Verifications strictes 8 entites + RLS + indexes + 6 services + 2 event handlers + 1 worker + Sprint 18+24 extensions.

6 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 6 services foundation
- TR-SPRINT29-INTEGRATION : event handlers Sprint 29 earn points + referral
- TR-ATOMIC-BALANCE : loyalty points balance race conditions safe
- TR-SCHEMA-ORG-VALID : structured data Schema.org valid JSON-LD
- TR-RLS-STRICT : multi-tenant garage_id propagation
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint32-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 32 : Garage Online + Loyalty

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprint 4)
**Sprint** : 32
**Reference B-32** : 12 taches, 92 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

---

## VERIFICATION TACHES

### 8.4.1 Decision-033 + Design Doc

```bash
[ -f "decisions/033-garage-online-loyalty-foundation.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/033-garage-online-loyalty-foundation.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-033 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-033" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/garage-online-loyalty-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/garage-online-loyalty-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1000 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=20 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

# Roadmap Phase 8+
grep -qE "Phase 8\+|multi-garage|partner rewards|gamification|mobile native" decisions/033-garage-online-loyalty-foundation.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "Roadmap Phase 8+" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "Roadmap" "WARN" "Verify"
```

### 8.4.2 Entites

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/garage-online-loyalty/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package garage-online-loyalty" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 8 tables
TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('loyalty_programs','loyalty_points','loyalty_points_transactions','loyalty_tiers','rewards','referrals','blog_posts','testimonials')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "8" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "8 tables" "PASS" "8/8" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/8"

# UNIQUE constraints critiques
UNIQUE_POINTS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='loyalty_points' AND indexname LIKE '%customer_id_garage_id%' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_POINTS" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE (customer_id, garage_id) points" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE points" "FAIL" "Manquant"

UNIQUE_REF=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='referrals' AND indexname LIKE '%referral_code%' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_REF" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE referral_code global" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE referral" "FAIL" "Manquant"

UNIQUE_BLOG=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='blog_posts' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%' AND indexdef LIKE '%garage_id%' AND indexdef LIKE '%slug_seo%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_BLOG" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "UNIQUE (garage_id, slug_seo)" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "UNIQUE blog" "WARN" "Verify"

# Version column optimistic locking loyalty_points
grep -qE "version.*INTEGER|version.*NUMBER" repo/packages/garage-online-loyalty/migrations/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T02-V6" "Version column optimistic" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "Version" "WARN" "Verify"

# RLS strict 8 tables
RLS_COUNT=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('loyalty_programs','loyalty_points','loyalty_points_transactions','loyalty_tiers','rewards','referrals','blog_posts','testimonials') AND rowsecurity=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS_COUNT" = "8" ] && append_to_report "T02-V7" "RLS strict 8 tables" "PASS" "8/8" || append_to_report "T02-V7" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS_COUNT/8"

# Seeds
SEEDS_REWARDS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rewards WHERE active=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$SEEDS_REWARDS" -ge "30" ] && append_to_report "T02-V8" "Seeds rewards >=30" "PASS" "$SEEDS_REWARDS" || append_to_report "T02-V8" "Seeds" "WARN" "$SEEDS_REWARDS"

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-online-loyalty vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 16 ] && append_to_report "T02-V9" "Tests >=16" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V9" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

```bash

# Benchmark sitemap

# Closure
[ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-32-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 33|DERNIER Phase 7|customer retention" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-32-closure-report.md && append_to_report "T12-V5" "Closure + Sprint 33 prereqs" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V5" "Closure" "FAIL" "Manquant"

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-online-loyalty build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-online-loyalty tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/garage-online-loyalty/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-033
[ -f "decisions/033-garage-online-loyalty-foundation.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/033-garage-online-loyalty-foundation.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-033" "Decision-033" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-033" "Decision-033" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE) -- 6 services
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/garage-online-loyalty/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
[ "$SERVICES" -ge "6" ] && append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "6 services foundation" "PASS" "$SERVICES" || append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "$SERVICES/6"

# TR-SPRINT29-INTEGRATION (CRITIQUE) -- event handlers points + referral
HANDLER_POINTS=$([ -f "repo/packages/garage-online-loyalty/src/handlers/direct-booking-completed-points.handler.ts" ] && echo "1" || echo "0")
HANDLER_REFERRAL=$([ -f "repo/packages/garage-online-loyalty/src/handlers/direct-booking-completed-referral.handler.ts" ] && echo "1" || echo "0")
if [ "$HANDLER_POINTS" = "1" ] && [ "$HANDLER_REFERRAL" = "1" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT29-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 29 handlers points + referral" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT29-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 29" "FAIL" "Points=$HANDLER_POINTS Referral=$HANDLER_REFERRAL"
fi

# TR-ATOMIC-BALANCE (CRITIQUE) -- loyalty points balance race conditions
if grep -qE "optimistic.*locking|version.*column|SERIALIZABLE|atomic.*UPDATE" repo/packages/garage-online-loyalty/src/services/loyalty-points.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-ATOMIC-BALANCE" "Atomic balance" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-ATOMIC-BALANCE" "Atomic" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-SCHEMA-ORG-VALID (CRITIQUE) -- structured data valid JSON-LD
if grep -qE "@context.*schema\.org|@type.*BlogPosting|@type.*Review|@type.*AutomotiveBusiness" repo/packages/garage-online-loyalty/src/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SCHEMA-ORG-VALID" "Schema.org JSON-LD valid" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SCHEMA-ORG-VALID" "Schema.org" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-RLS-STRICT (CRITIQUE)
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('loyalty_programs','loyalty_points','loyalty_points_transactions','loyalty_tiers','rewards','referrals','blog_posts','testimonials') AND rowsecurity=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" = "8" ] && append_to_report "TR-RLS-STRICT" "RLS strict 8/8 tables" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-RLS-STRICT" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/8"

# Variables env
VARS=(LOYALTY_POINTS_EARN_RATE_PER_MAD_DEFAULT LOYALTY_POINTS_EXPIRY_DAYS_DEFAULT LOYALTY_POINTS_EXPIRY_CHECK_CRON LOYALTY_TIER_BRONZE_THRESHOLD LOYALTY_TIER_SILVER_THRESHOLD LOYALTY_TIER_GOLD_THRESHOLD REFERRAL_REWARD_POINTS REFERRAL_REFERRED_DISCOUNT_PERCENT REFERRAL_CODE_LENGTH BLOG_POST_MIN_WORD_COUNT BLOG_POST_FEATURED_IMAGE_REQUIRED SITEMAP_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS SEO_CANONICAL_URL_BASE)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "13 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical checks BLOCKING
CRITICAL_FOUNDATION=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_SPRINT29=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT29-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_ATOMIC=$(grep -c "TR-ATOMIC-BALANCE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_SCHEMA=$(grep -c "TR-SCHEMA-ORG-VALID.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_RLS=$(grep -c "TR-RLS-STRICT.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_FOUNDATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_SPRINT29" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 29 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_ATOMIC" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ATOMIC BALANCE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_SCHEMA" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SCHEMA.ORG FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_RLS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- RLS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 33 Garage AI Optimization (DERNIER Phase 7)
- Garage vertical foundation Sprint 29 complete
- Garage operations Sprint 30 complete
- Garage accounting + marketing Sprint 31 complete
- Garage online + loyalty Sprint 32 complete
- Training data foundation : DirectBookings + LoyaltyPoints + Referrals + Reviews + Campaigns + Compensations (Phase 8+ AI)
- Foundation Sprint 33 AI OK si Decision=GO
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-32 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 6 services.

**2** : TR-SPRINT29-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- handlers points + referral critique.

**3** : TR-ATOMIC-BALANCE **BLOCKING** -- race conditions safe loyalty points.

**4** : TR-SCHEMA-ORG-VALID **BLOCKING** -- SEO structured data valid JSON-LD.

**5** : TR-RLS-STRICT **BLOCKING** -- multi-tenant garage_id.

**6** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**7** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 33 (DERNIER Phase 7).

---

**FIN V-32**

**Verification suivante** : V-33 Sprint 33 Garage AI Optimization (DERNIER Phase 7).
```

## 35. V-33-sprint-33-verification.md

```md
# V-33 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 33 : GARAGE AI OPTIMIZATION

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprint 5 -- DERNIER PHASE 7)
**Sprint** : 33 / 37
**Reference** : `B-33`, `C-33`, `G-33`
**Total criteres** : 94 (76 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 33 = **CLOTURE Phase 7 Garage Vertical** + **6 AI services rule-based foundation** + **Sprint 30+29+32 training data integration** + **Sprint 13 ClickHouse 6 MV**.

7 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 6 AI services foundation
- TR-CHURN-SPRINT32 : Sprint 32 LoyaltyPoints integration churn
- TR-FRAUD-REAL-TIME : 4 event handlers fraud Sprint 32
- TR-RLS-STRICT : multi-tenant garage_id strict 7 tables
- TR-NO-EXTERNAL-LLM : Sprint 33 foundation rule-based no OpenAI/Vertex AI (Phase 8+)
- TR-PHASE7-CLOTURE : closure rapport phase 7 complete
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint33-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 33 : Garage AI Optimization (DERNIER PHASE 7)

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 7 -- Garage Vertical (Sprint 5 -- CLOTURE)
**Sprint** : 33
**Reference B-33** : 12 taches, 94 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-ai-optimization build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/garage-ai-optimization tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/garage-ai-optimization/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-034
[ -f "decisions/034-garage-ai-optimization-foundation.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/034-garage-ai-optimization-foundation.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-034" "Decision-034" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-034" "Decision-034" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE) -- 6 AI services
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/garage-ai-optimization/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
[ "$SERVICES" -ge "6" ] && append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "6 AI services" "PASS" "$SERVICES" || append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "$SERVICES/6"

# TR-CHURN-SPRINT32 (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 32|LoyaltyPoints|last_activity_at" repo/packages/garage-ai-optimization/src/services/ai-churn-prediction.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-CHURN-SPRINT32" "Sprint 32 churn integration" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CHURN-SPRINT32" "Churn Sprint 32" "FAIL" "Non integre"
fi

# TR-FRAUD-REAL-TIME (CRITIQUE) -- 4 handlers
HANDLERS=$(ls repo/packages/garage-ai-optimization/src/handlers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "fraud-check\.handler\.ts$" | wc -l)
[ "$HANDLERS" -ge "4" ] && append_to_report "TR-FRAUD-REAL-TIME" "4 fraud handlers real-time" "PASS" "$HANDLERS" || append_to_report "TR-FRAUD-REAL-TIME" "Fraud handlers" "FAIL" "$HANDLERS/4"

# TR-RLS-STRICT (CRITIQUE) -- 7 tables
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('ai_models','ai_recommendations','ai_churn_scores','ai_pricing_recommendations','ai_predicted_maintenance','ai_fraud_flags','ai_content_suggestions') AND rowsecurity=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" = "7" ] && append_to_report "TR-RLS-STRICT" "RLS strict 7/7" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-RLS-STRICT" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/7"

# TR-NO-EXTERNAL-LLM (CRITIQUE) -- Sprint 33 foundation rule-based no OpenAI/Vertex AI
if grep -qE "openai|Vertex AI|Anthropic.*Claude" repo/packages/garage-ai-optimization/src/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-NO-EXTERNAL-LLM" "No external LLMs (Phase 8+ defer)" "FAIL" "External LLM detected"
else
  append_to_report "TR-NO-EXTERNAL-LLM" "Rule-based foundation" "PASS" "OK"
fi

# TR-PHASE7-CLOTURE (CRITIQUE) -- rapport Phase 7 complete
if [ -f "00-pilotage/reports/phase-7-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 29|Sprint 30|Sprint 31|Sprint 32|Sprint 33" 00-pilotage/reports/phase-7-closure-report.md; then
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE7-CLOTURE" "PHASE 7 CLOTURE rapport" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE7-CLOTURE" "Phase 7 Cloture" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(AI_PREDICTIVE_MAINTENANCE_CRON AI_CHURN_PREDICTION_CRON AI_RECOMMENDATIONS_CRON AI_PRICING_OPTIMIZATION_CRON AI_CHURN_RISK_LOW_THRESHOLD AI_CHURN_RISK_HIGH_THRESHOLD AI_RECOMMENDATIONS_TOP_N_PER_CUSTOMER AI_RECOMMENDATIONS_EXPIRY_DAYS AI_PRICING_MAX_CHANGE_PERCENT AI_PRICING_CONFIDENCE_MIN AI_FRAUD_RISK_THRESHOLD_FLAG AI_FRAUD_RISK_THRESHOLD_CRITICAL AI_PREDICTIVE_MAINTENANCE_CONFIDENCE_MIN AI_PREDICTIVE_MAINTENANCE_NOTIFICATION_DAYS_BEFORE AI_TRAINING_DATA_MIN_BOOKINGS_PER_CUSTOMER)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "15 vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical checks BLOCKING
CRITICAL_FOUNDATION=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_CHURN=$(grep -c "TR-CHURN-SPRINT32.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_FRAUD=$(grep -c "TR-FRAUD-REAL-TIME.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_RLS=$(grep -c "TR-RLS-STRICT.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_LLM=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EXTERNAL-LLM.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_PHASE7=$(grep -c "TR-PHASE7-CLOTURE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRITICAL_FOUNDATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_CHURN" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CHURN SPRINT 32 FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_FRAUD" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FRAUD REAL-TIME FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_RLS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- RLS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_LLM" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EXTERNAL LLM DETECTED"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_PHASE7" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PHASE 7 CLOTURE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRITICAL_NO_EMOJI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## PHASE 7 CLOTURE GARAGE VERTICAL
- Sprint 29 Garage Vertical Foundation + Direct Booking : OK
- Sprint 30 Garage Inventory + Mechanic Tools : OK
- Sprint 31 Garage Accounting + Marketing : OK
- Sprint 32 Garage Online + Loyalty : OK
- Sprint 33 Garage AI Optimization : evaluation = $DECISION
- Decisions 030-034 ratifiees
- Commercial differentiation premium tier enterprise SaaS proof point
- Demo Day 30 juin 2026 narrative ready

## Pre-requis Phase 8 Integration Stubs Sprint 34
- Phase 7 Garage Vertical CLOTURE complete
- Foundation Phase 8+ (advanced AI/ML LLMs + connecteurs externes insurers)
- GO Phase 8 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-33 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%) -- PHASE 7 CLOTURE"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 6 AI services.

**2** : TR-CHURN-SPRINT32 **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 32 integration critique.

**3** : TR-FRAUD-REAL-TIME **BLOCKING** -- 4 event handlers Sprint 32+29+31.

**4** : TR-RLS-STRICT **BLOCKING** -- 7 tables.

**5** : TR-NO-EXTERNAL-LLM **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 33 foundation rule-based only (Phase 8+ defer OpenAI/Vertex AI/Anthropic).

**6** : TR-PHASE7-CLOTURE **BLOCKING** -- rapport Phase 7 5 sprints complete.

**7** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**8** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Phase 8 Sprint 34.

---

**FIN V-33**

**PHASE 7 CLOTURE GARAGE VERTICAL COMPLETE.**

**Verification suivante** : V-34 Sprint 34 Phase 8 Integration Stubs Connecteurs Externes Insurers.
```

## 36. V-34-sprint-34-verification.md

```md
# V-34 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 34 : INTEGRATION STUBS INSURERS CONNECTEURS

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 8 -- Integration Stubs (Sprint 1)
**Sprint** : 34 / 37
**Reference** : `B-34`, `C-34`, `G-34`
**Total criteres** : 96 (78 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 34 = **12 connecteurs stubs** + **circuit breaker + retry resilience** + **Sprint 9 SMS routing migration** + **Demo Day end-to-end credibility**.

7 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 5 services + 12 stubs
- TR-CIRCUIT-BREAKER : state machine correctness
- TR-FICTIONAL-BRANDS : decision-027 fictional credible brand names strict
- TR-CREDENTIALS-ENCRYPTION : Sprint 10 strict
- TR-WEBHOOK-HMAC : SHA-256 verification strict
- TR-SPRINT9-SMS-MIGRATION : backward-compatible refactor
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint34-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 34 : Integration Stubs Insurers Connecteurs

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 8 -- Integration Stubs (Sprint 1)
**Sprint** : 34
**Reference B-34** : 12 taches, 96 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

---

## VERIFICATION TACHES

### 9.1.1 Decision-035 + Design Doc

```bash
[ -f "decisions/035-integration-stubs-framework-connecteurs.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/035-integration-stubs-framework-connecteurs.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-035 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-035" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/integration-connectors-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/integration-connectors-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1000 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=20 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

# Decision-027 fictional brand names reference
grep -qE "decision-027|fictional.*credible|AssurMaghreb|Atlas Insurance|MediAssur" decisions/035-integration-stubs-framework-connecteurs.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "Decision-027 fictional brands reference" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "Decision-027 ref" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Roadmap Phase 9 production swap
grep -qE "Phase 9|production swap|INTEGRATION_CONNECTORS_MODE" decisions/035-integration-stubs-framework-connecteurs.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V4" "Roadmap Phase 9" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V4" "Roadmap" "WARN" "Verify"
```

### 9.1.2 Entites

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/integration-connectors/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package integration-connectors" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 5 tables
TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('external_connectors','connector_requests','connector_events','connector_mappings','connector_webhooks')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "5 tables" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/5"

# UNIQUE constraints
UNIQUE_CONN=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='external_connectors' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%connector_type%provider_name%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_CONN" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE (type, provider)" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE connector" "FAIL" "Manquant"

UNIQUE_IDEM=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='connector_requests' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%idempotency_key%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_IDEM" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE idempotency_key" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE idempotency" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Indexes performance
INDEX_CORR=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='connector_requests' AND indexdef LIKE '%correlation_id%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$INDEX_CORR" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "Index correlation_id" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "Index correlation" "WARN" "Verify"

# Seeds 12 connecteurs
SEEDS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM external_connectors WHERE active=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$SEEDS" -ge "12" ] && append_to_report "T02-V6" "Seeds 12 connecteurs" "PASS" "$SEEDS" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "Seeds" "FAIL" "$SEEDS/12"

# Verify 3 insurers + 3 banks + 3 government + 3 telecom
for type in insurer bank government telecom; do
  COUNT=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM external_connectors WHERE connector_type='${type}' AND active=true" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
  [ "$COUNT" -ge "3" ] && append_to_report "T02-V-${type}" "3+ ${type}" "PASS" "$COUNT" || append_to_report "T02-V-${type}" "${type}" "FAIL" "$COUNT/3"
done

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/integration-connectors vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 18 ] && append_to_report "T02-V11" "Tests >=18" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V11" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 14 ] && append_to_report "T10-V5" "Tests E2E >=14" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T10-V5" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"

# Benchmark latency stubs < 100ms

[ -n "$STUB_P95" ] && [ "$(echo "$STUB_P95 < 100" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Stub P95 < 100ms" "PASS" "${STUB_P95}ms" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "Stub perf" "WARN" "${STUB_P95}ms"

# Sprint 34 closure

```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/integration-connectors build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/integration-connectors tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/integration-connectors/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-035
[ -f "decisions/035-integration-stubs-framework-connecteurs.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/035-integration-stubs-framework-connecteurs.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-035" "Decision-035" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-035" "Decision-035" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION -- 5 services + 12 stubs
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/integration-connectors/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
STUBS=$(find repo/packages/integration-connectors/src/stubs/ -name "*.stub.ts" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "5" ] && [ "$STUBS" -ge "12" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "5 services + 12 stubs" "PASS" "$SERVICES + $STUBS"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "Services=$SERVICES Stubs=$STUBS"
fi

# TR-CIRCUIT-BREAKER
if grep -qE "circuit_breaker_state|closed|open|half-open|recordFailure|recordSuccess" repo/packages/integration-connectors/src/services/external-connector.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-CIRCUIT-BREAKER" "Circuit breaker state machine" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CIRCUIT-BREAKER" "Circuit breaker" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-FICTIONAL-BRANDS -- decision-027 strict
if grep -qE "AssurMaghreb|Atlas Insurance|MediAssur" repo/packages/integration-connectors/src/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  # Verify NO real brand names
  if grep -qE "Wafa Assurance|RMA|AXA Maroc|Saham" repo/packages/integration-connectors/src/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
    append_to_report "TR-FICTIONAL-BRANDS" "No real brands" "FAIL" "Real brands detected"
  else
    append_to_report "TR-FICTIONAL-BRANDS" "Fictional credible brands" "PASS" "OK"
  fi
else
  append_to_report "TR-FICTIONAL-BRANDS" "Fictional brands" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-CREDENTIALS-ENCRYPTION
if grep -qE "credentials_encrypted|Sprint 10.*encrypt|encrypt.*credentials" repo/packages/integration-connectors/src/services/external-connector.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-CREDENTIALS-ENCRYPTION" "Credentials encrypted" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CREDENTIALS-ENCRYPTION" "Encryption" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-WEBHOOK-HMAC
if grep -qE "HMAC|sha256|computeHMAC" repo/packages/integration-connectors/src/webhooks/connector-webhook-receiver.controller.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-WEBHOOK-HMAC" "Webhook HMAC SHA-256" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-WEBHOOK-HMAC" "HMAC" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-SPRINT9-SMS-MIGRATION
if grep -qE "telecomConnectorService\.sendSMS|Sprint 34.*TelecomConnectorService" repo/packages/notifications/src/services/notification.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT9-SMS-MIGRATION" "Sprint 9 SMS refactor" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT9-SMS-MIGRATION" "SMS migration" "FAIL" "Non migre"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(INTEGRATION_CONNECTORS_MODE CONNECTOR_HEALTH_CHECK_CRON CONNECTOR_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_FAILURE_THRESHOLD CONNECTOR_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_RECOVERY_TIMEOUT_SECONDS CONNECTOR_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS CONNECTOR_RETRY_BACKOFF_BASE_SECONDS CONNECTOR_STUBS_SUCCESS_RATE CONNECTOR_WEBHOOK_HMAC_ALGORITHM)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FOUNDATION=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CB=$(grep -c "TR-CIRCUIT-BREAKER.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_FB=$(grep -c "TR-FICTIONAL-BRANDS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CE=$(grep -c "TR-CREDENTIALS-ENCRYPTION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_WH=$(grep -c "TR-WEBHOOK-HMAC.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_SMS=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT9-SMS-MIGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FOUNDATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_CB" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CIRCUIT BREAKER FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_FB" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FICTIONAL BRANDS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_CE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CREDENTIALS ENCRYPTION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_WH" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- WEBHOOK HMAC FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_SMS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 9 SMS MIGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 35 Phase 8 Sprint 2
- 12 connecteurs stubs operationnels Phase 8 Sprint 1
- Circuit breaker + retry + HMAC + observability
- Sprint 13 MV + Sprint 14 events + Sprint 28 admin-portal
- Foundation Phase 9 production swap stubs -> real APIs
- GO Sprint 35 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-34 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 5 services + 12 stubs (3 insurers + 3 banks + 3 government + 3 telecom).

**2** : TR-CIRCUIT-BREAKER **BLOCKING** -- state machine correctness critique.

**3** : TR-FICTIONAL-BRANDS **BLOCKING** -- decision-027 strict (AssurMaghreb + Atlas + MediAssur fictional credible only).

**4** : TR-CREDENTIALS-ENCRYPTION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 10 encrypt strict jamais plain text.

**5** : TR-WEBHOOK-HMAC **BLOCKING** -- SHA-256 verification strict.

**6** : TR-SPRINT9-SMS-MIGRATION **BLOCKING** -- backward-compatible refactor.

**7** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**8** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 35.

---

**FIN V-34**

**Verification suivante** : V-35 Sprint 35 Phase 8 Sprint 2 (Pentest + Security Hardening).
```

## 37. V-35-sprint-35-verification.md

```md
# V-35 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 35 : PENTEST + SECURITY HARDENING

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 8 -- Integration Stubs + Security (Sprint 2 -- DERNIER PHASE 8)
**Sprint** : 35 / 37
**Reference** : `B-35`, `C-35`, `G-35`
**Total criteres** : 98 (80 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 35 = **CLOTURE Phase 8** + **9 security services** + **pentest OWASP Top 10 2021 + ASVS Level 2** + **compliance audits 4 frameworks** + **production readiness Phase 9**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 9 services + 8 workers
- TR-PENTEST-COMPLETE : OWASP Top 10 + ASVS Level 2
- TR-COMPLIANCE-DOCS : CNDP + ACAPS + PCI-DSS + GDPR
- TR-BACKUP-VERIFIED : restoration tested
- TR-DR-TESTED : DR scenarios executed RTO/RPO measured
- TR-PHASE8-CLOTURE : rapport Phase 8 complete
- TR-RLS-AUDIT : RLS where applicable + audit comprehensive
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint35-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 35 : Pentest + Security Hardening (DERNIER PHASE 8)

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 8 -- Integration Stubs + Security (Sprint 2 -- CLOTURE)
**Sprint** : 35
**Reference B-35** : 12 taches, 98 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/security-hardening build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/security-hardening tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/security-hardening/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-036
[ -f "decisions/036-security-hardening-pentest-production-readiness.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/036-security-hardening-pentest-production-readiness.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-036" "Decision-036" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-036" "Decision-036" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE) -- 9 services + 8 workers
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/security-hardening/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/security-hardening/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "9" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "8" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "9 services + 8 workers" "PASS" "$SERVICES + $WORKERS"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS"
fi

# TR-PENTEST-COMPLETE (CRITIQUE)
PENTEST_OK=0
[ -f "docs/pentest-report-internal.md" ] && PENTEST_OK=$((PENTEST_OK+1))
OWASP_COUNT=$(grep -cE "A0[1-9]:2021|A10:2021" docs/pentest-report-internal.md 2>/dev/null)
[ "$OWASP_COUNT" -ge "10" ] && PENTEST_OK=$((PENTEST_OK+1))
grep -qE "ASVS Level 2|ASVS L2" docs/pentest-report-internal.md 2>/dev/null && PENTEST_OK=$((PENTEST_OK+1))
if [ "$PENTEST_OK" -ge "3" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-PENTEST-COMPLETE" "Pentest OWASP Top 10 + ASVS" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PENTEST-COMPLETE" "Pentest" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-COMPLIANCE-DOCS (CRITIQUE) -- 4 compliance docs
COMPLIANCE=0
for doc in cndp-self-assessment acaps-pre-audit pci-dss-gap-analysis gdpr-alignment; do
  if [ -f "docs/compliance/${doc}.md" ]; then COMPLIANCE=$((COMPLIANCE+1)); fi
done
[ "$COMPLIANCE" = "4" ] && append_to_report "TR-COMPLIANCE-DOCS" "4 compliance docs" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-COMPLIANCE-DOCS" "Compliance" "FAIL" "$COMPLIANCE/4"

# TR-BACKUP-VERIFIED (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "backup-verification|automated.*restore|verification_status.*verified" repo/packages/security-hardening/src/services/backup-management.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-BACKUP-VERIFIED" "Backup verification" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-BACKUP-VERIFIED" "Backup verified" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-DR-TESTED (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/security-hardening/src/workers/dr-test-quarterly-cron.worker.ts" ] && grep -qE "rto.*actual|rpo.*actual|measure" repo/packages/security-hardening/src/services/disaster-recovery.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-DR-TESTED" "DR tested RTO/RPO" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-DR-TESTED" "DR" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-PHASE8-CLOTURE (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "00-pilotage/reports/phase-8-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 34|Sprint 35" 00-pilotage/reports/phase-8-closure-report.md; then
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE8-CLOTURE" "PHASE 8 CLOTURE rapport" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE8-CLOTURE" "Phase 8 Cloture" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(SECURITY_SCAN_DEPENDENCY_CRON SECURITY_SCAN_CONTAINER_CRON SECRETS_ROTATION_CRON BACKUP_POSTGRES_FULL_CRON BACKUP_CLICKHOUSE_FREEZE_CRON BACKUP_VERIFICATION_CRON DR_TEST_QUARTERLY_CRON VULNERABILITY_SLA_CRITICAL_DAYS SECRETS_ROTATION_DB_PASSWORD_DAYS BACKUP_RETENTION_DAILY_DAYS DR_RTO_TARGET_SECONDS DR_RPO_TARGET_SECONDS)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FOUNDATION=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_PENTEST=$(grep -c "TR-PENTEST-COMPLETE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_COMPLIANCE=$(grep -c "TR-COMPLIANCE-DOCS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_BACKUP=$(grep -c "TR-BACKUP-VERIFIED.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_DR=$(grep -c "TR-DR-TESTED.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_PHASE8=$(grep -c "TR-PHASE8-CLOTURE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FOUNDATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_PENTEST" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PENTEST FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_COMPLIANCE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- COMPLIANCE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_BACKUP" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- BACKUP FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_DR" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- DR FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_PHASE8" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PHASE 8 CLOTURE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## PHASE 8 CLOTURE
- Sprint 34 Integration Stubs Insurers Connecteurs : OK
- Sprint 35 Pentest + Security Hardening : evaluation = $DECISION
- Decisions 035-036 ratifiees
- Demo Day production readiness + security posture
- Foundation Phase 9 production deployment

## Pre-requis Phase 9 Production Deployment Sprint 36
- Phase 8 CLOTURE complete
- Security hardening + compliance audits foundation
- Backup + DR + incidents response framework
- GO Phase 9 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-35 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%) -- PHASE 8 CLOTURE"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 9 services + 8 workers.

**2** : TR-PENTEST-COMPLETE **BLOCKING** -- OWASP Top 10 2021 + ASVS Level 2 + CVSS + rapport remediation.

**3** : TR-COMPLIANCE-DOCS **BLOCKING** -- 4 compliance docs (CNDP + ACAPS + PCI-DSS + GDPR).

**4** : TR-BACKUP-VERIFIED **BLOCKING** -- automated restore verification.

**5** : TR-DR-TESTED **BLOCKING** -- DR scenarios executed + RTO/RPO measured.

**6** : TR-PHASE8-CLOTURE **BLOCKING** -- rapport Phase 8 2 sprints complete.

**7** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**8** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Phase 9 Production Deployment Sprint 36.

---

**FIN V-35**

**PHASE 8 CLOTURE INTEGRATION + SECURITY COMPLETE.**

**Verification suivante** : V-36 Sprint 36 Phase 9 Production Deployment.
```

## 38. V-36-sprint-36-verification.md

```md
# V-36 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 36 : PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT INFRASTRUCTURE

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 9 -- Production Deployment (Sprint 1)
**Sprint** : 36 / 37
**Reference** : `B-36`, `C-36`, `G-36`
**Total criteres** : 96 (78 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 36 = **production deployment infrastructure foundation** + **Kubernetes EKS Multi-AZ** + **CI/CD GitHub Actions canary** + **observability Datadog/Prometheus/Grafana** + **database production Multi-AZ** + **Vault production cluster** + **Sprint 37 Go-Live readiness mandatory**.

7 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 6 services + 2 workers + 8 Terraform modules
- TR-EKS-CLUSTER : Multi-AZ + 3 node pools + auto-scaling
- TR-CICD-CANARY : GitHub Actions + canary + rollback automated
- TR-DATABASE-PRODUCTION : RDS Multi-AZ + ClickHouse cluster + Redis
- TR-OBSERVABILITY-OPERATIONAL : Datadog/ELK + APM + dashboards
- TR-VAULT-PRODUCTION : cluster Multi-AZ + Sprint 35 deployment
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint36-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 36 : Production Deployment Infrastructure

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 9 -- Production Deployment (Sprint 1)
**Sprint** : 36
**Reference B-36** : 12 taches, 96 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

[ -d "repo/packages/production-deployment/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package production-deployment" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 5 tables
TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('deployment_releases','infrastructure_resources','production_alerts','capacity_forecasts','service_health_snapshots')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "5 tables" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/5"

# UNIQUE deployment version + environment
UNIQUE_DEP=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='deployment_releases' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%version%environment%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_DEP" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE (version, environment)" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE deployment" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Indexes
INDEX_SEV=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='production_alerts' AND indexdef LIKE '%severity%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$INDEX_SEV" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "Index severity alerts" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "Index alerts" "WARN" "Verify"

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/production-deployment vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 18 ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "Tests >=18" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

```bash
# Terraform modules
for tf in eks-cluster networking iam; do
  if [ -f "infrastructure/terraform/${tf}.tf" ]; then
    append_to_report "T03-V-TF-${tf}" "Terraform ${tf}.tf" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T03-V-TF-${tf}" "Terraform ${tf}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# Multi-AZ verification
grep -qE "availability_zones.*3|multi.*az.*3|Multi-AZ" infrastructure/terraform/networking.tf 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T03-V1" "Multi-AZ 3 zones" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T03-V1" "Multi-AZ" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Node pools 3 types

[ "$NODE_POOLS" -ge "3" ] && append_to_report "T03-V2" "3 node pools" "PASS" "$NODE_POOLS" || append_to_report "T03-V2" "Node pools" "FAIL" "$NODE_POOLS/3"

# Encryption secrets

# Cluster Autoscaler + HPA
grep -qE "cluster-autoscaler|HorizontalPodAutoscaler" infrastructure/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T03-V4" "Autoscaling" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T03-V4" "Autoscaling" "WARN" "Verify"

# Pod Security Standards
grep -qE "PodSecurityStandards|pod.*security.*standard|restricted" infrastructure/kubernetes/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T03-V5" "Pod Security Standards" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T03-V5" "PSS" "WARN" "Verify"

# Tests Terratest
TESTS=$(cd infrastructure/terraform && go test -v ./... 2>&1 | grep -c "PASS:" 2>/dev/null)
[ "$TESTS" -ge "12" ] && append_to_report "T03-V6" "Terratest >=12" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T03-V6" "Terratest" "WARN" "$TESTS"

[ "$TOTAL" -ge "30" ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=30" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

# Sprint 28 admin-portal 4 tabs production
