```

---

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/production-deployment build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/production-deployment tsc --noEmit 2>&1 > /tmp/tsc.log
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/production-deployment/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-037
[ -f "decisions/037-production-deployment-framework-iac.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/037-production-deployment-framework-iac.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-037" "Decision-037" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-037" "Decision-037" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/production-deployment/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/production-deployment/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
TF_MODULES=$(ls infrastructure/terraform/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.tf$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "6" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "2" ] && [ "$TF_MODULES" -ge "8" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "6 services + 2 workers + 8 TF modules" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS+$TF_MODULES"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS TF=$TF_MODULES"
fi

# TR-EKS-CLUSTER
if grep -qE "aws_eks_cluster" infrastructure/terraform/eks-cluster.tf 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "Multi-AZ|multi_az.*=.*true" infrastructure/terraform/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-EKS-CLUSTER" "EKS Multi-AZ" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-EKS-CLUSTER" "EKS" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-CICD-CANARY
if [ -f "ci-cd/.github/workflows/deploy-production-canary.yml" ] && [ -f "ci-cd/.github/workflows/rollback.yml" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-CICD-CANARY" "CI/CD canary + rollback" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CICD-CANARY" "CI/CD" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-DATABASE-PRODUCTION
DB_OK=0
[ -f "infrastructure/terraform/rds-postgres.tf" ] && DB_OK=$((DB_OK+1))
[ -f "infrastructure/terraform/clickhouse-cluster.tf" ] && DB_OK=$((DB_OK+1))
[ -f "infrastructure/terraform/redis-elasticache.tf" ] && DB_OK=$((DB_OK+1))
if [ "$DB_OK" = "3" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-DATABASE-PRODUCTION" "DB production 3 stores" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-DATABASE-PRODUCTION" "DB production" "FAIL" "$DB_OK/3"
fi

# TR-OBSERVABILITY-OPERATIONAL
if [ -f "repo/packages/production-deployment/src/integrations/datadog-integration.ts" ] && grep -qE "OpenTelemetry|distributed.*tracing|APM" repo/packages/production-deployment/src/services/observability.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-OBSERVABILITY-OPERATIONAL" "Datadog + APM + tracing" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-OBSERVABILITY-OPERATIONAL" "Observability" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-VAULT-PRODUCTION
if [ -f "infrastructure/terraform/vault-cluster.tf" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 35|automated.*rotation" repo/packages/production-deployment/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-VAULT-PRODUCTION" "Vault production + Sprint 35" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-VAULT-PRODUCTION" "Vault" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(AWS_REGION_PRIMARY EKS_CLUSTER_NAME RDS_INSTANCE_CLASS CLICKHOUSE_CLUSTER_NODES REDIS_INSTANCE_CLASS OBSERVABILITY_PROVIDER CAPACITY_FORECASTING_CRON SERVICE_HEALTH_SNAPSHOT_CRON CANARY_TRAFFIC_INITIAL_PERCENT SLA_UPTIME_TARGET_PERCENT VAULT_CLUSTER_NODES)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FOUNDATION=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_EKS=$(grep -c "TR-EKS-CLUSTER.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CICD=$(grep -c "TR-CICD-CANARY.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_DB=$(grep -c "TR-DATABASE-PRODUCTION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_OBS=$(grep -c "TR-OBSERVABILITY-OPERATIONAL.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_VAULT=$(grep -c "TR-VAULT-PRODUCTION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FOUNDATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_EKS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EKS CLUSTER FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_CICD" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CI/CD CANARY FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_DB" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- DATABASE PRODUCTION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_OBS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- OBSERVABILITY FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_VAULT" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- VAULT PRODUCTION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 37 Phase 9 Sprint 2 Go-Live (DERNIER SPRINT)
- Production infrastructure foundation Sprint 36 complete
- Kubernetes EKS Multi-AZ + CI/CD canary + observability + database production
- Vault production + Sprint 35 secrets deployment
- CDN + WAF + ALB + edge security
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 4 tabs production + Sprint 13 production_metrics_mv
- GO Sprint 37 Go-Live + Demo Day si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-36 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 6 services + 2 workers + 8 Terraform modules.

**2** : TR-EKS-CLUSTER **BLOCKING** -- Multi-AZ + 3 node pools + encryption.

**3** : TR-CICD-CANARY **BLOCKING** -- GitHub Actions canary + rollback automated.

**4** : TR-DATABASE-PRODUCTION **BLOCKING** -- RDS Multi-AZ + ClickHouse cluster + Redis.

**5** : TR-OBSERVABILITY-OPERATIONAL **BLOCKING** -- Datadog/ELK + APM + tracing + dashboards.

**6** : TR-VAULT-PRODUCTION **BLOCKING** -- cluster Multi-AZ + Sprint 35 secrets production deployment.

**7** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**8** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 37 Phase 9 Sprint 2 Go-Live (DERNIER SPRINT).

---

**FIN V-36**

**Verification suivante** : V-37 Sprint 37 Phase 9 Sprint 2 Go-Live + Demo Day (DERNIER SPRINT).
```

# V-37 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 37 : GO-LIVE + DEMO DAY MARRAKECH

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 9 -- Production Deployment (Sprint 2 -- **DERNIER SPRINT + PROGRAMME CLOTURE**)
**Sprint** : 37 / 37
**Reference** : `B-37`, `C-37`, `G-37`
**Total criteres** : 100 (82 taches + 18 globaux + 4 PROGRAMME CLOTURE)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 37 = **DERNIER SPRINT** + **Go-Live execution all services Sprint 36 canary** + **Demo Day Marrakech 30 juin 2026 ACAPS** + **commercial launch foundation Phase 10+** + **PROGRAMME GLOBAL CLOTURE rapport comprehensive**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 5 services + 6 smoke tests + 2 load tests
- TR-SPRINT36-INTEGRATION : DeploymentService final deployments canary
- TR-DEMO-DAY-MATERIALS : 10 slides + 5 demos + Q&A 50+
- TR-DRY-RUNS : 5+ rehearsals completed
- TR-COMMERCIAL-LAUNCH : pricing + onboarding + early adopters
- TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE : 37 sprints + 38 decisions + 9 phases comprehensive rapport
- TR-PHASE10-ROADMAP : multi-vertical + cross-country + Anthropic AI vision documented
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint37-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 37 : Go-Live + Demo Day Marrakech (DERNIER SPRINT)

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 9 -- Production Deployment (Sprint 2 -- DERNIER SPRINT + PROGRAMME CLOTURE)
**Sprint** : 37
**Reference B-37** : 12 taches, 100 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

[ -f "closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md" ] && append_to_report "T12-V3" "PROGRAMME GLOBAL CLOTURE rapport" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V3" "PROGRAMME CLOTURE" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 37 sprints documented
SPRINTS_DOC=$(grep -cE "Sprint 0[1-9]|Sprint [1-3][0-9]" closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md 2>/dev/null)
[ "$SPRINTS_DOC" -ge "37" ] && append_to_report "T12-V4" "37 sprints documented" "PASS" "$SPRINTS_DOC" || append_to_report "T12-V4" "Sprints" "FAIL" "$SPRINTS_DOC/37"

# 38 decisions documented
DECISIONS_DOC=$(grep -cE "decision-0[0-2][0-9]|decision-03[0-8]" closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md 2>/dev/null)
[ "$DECISIONS_DOC" -ge "38" ] && append_to_report "T12-V5" "38 decisions documented" "PASS" "$DECISIONS_DOC" || append_to_report "T12-V5" "Decisions" "FAIL" "$DECISIONS_DOC/38"

# 9 phases documented
PHASES_DOC=$(grep -cE "Phase [1-9]" closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md 2>/dev/null)
[ "$PHASES_DOC" -ge "9" ] && append_to_report "T12-V6" "9 phases documented" "PASS" "$PHASES_DOC" || append_to_report "T12-V6" "Phases" "FAIL" "$PHASES_DOC/9"

# Lessons learned + retrospective
grep -qE "lessons learned|retrospective|Start.*Stop.*Continue|appreciations" closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T12-V7" "Lessons + retrospective" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V7" "Lessons" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Roadmap Phase 10+
grep -qE "Phase 10\+|multi-vertical|cross-country|Anthropic AI partnership|horizontal platform" closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T12-V8" "Roadmap Phase 10+" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V8" "Roadmap" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Tests E2E
TOTAL=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/go-live-execution vitest run tests/e2e/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge "25" ] && append_to_report "T12-V9" "Tests E2E >=25" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V9" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

COV=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/go-live-execution vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V10" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V10" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"
```

---

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/go-live-execution build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/go-live-execution tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/go-live-execution/src/ demo-day/ commercial-launch/ post-go-live/ closure-reports/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-038
[ -f "decisions/038-go-live-execution-demo-day-commercial-launch.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/038-go-live-execution-demo-day-commercial-launch.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-038" "Decision-038 FINAL" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-038" "Decision-038" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/go-live-execution/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
SMOKE=$(ls repo/packages/go-live-execution/src/smoke-tests/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.test\.ts$" | wc -l)
LOAD=$(ls repo/packages/go-live-execution/src/load-tests/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.(js|yml)$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "5" ] && [ "$SMOKE" -ge "6" ] && [ "$LOAD" -ge "2" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "5 services + 6 smoke + 2 load" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$SMOKE+$LOAD"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES SM=$SMOKE LD=$LOAD"
fi

# TR-SPRINT36-INTEGRATION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 36|DeploymentService|executeCanaryDeployment" repo/packages/go-live-execution/src/services/go-live-execution.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT36-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 36 integration" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT36-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 36" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-DEMO-DAY-MATERIALS (CRITIQUE)
SLIDES=$(ls demo-day/slides/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.md$" | wc -l)
DEMOS=$(ls demo-day/live-demos/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "demo-.*\.md$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SLIDES" -ge "10" ] && [ "$DEMOS" -ge "5" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-DEMO-DAY-MATERIALS" "10 slides + 5 demos" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-DEMO-DAY-MATERIALS" "Demo Day" "FAIL" "S=$SLIDES D=$DEMOS"
fi

# TR-DRY-RUNS (CRITIQUE)
DRY_RUNS=$(grep -cE "rehearsal|dry.run|J-[0-9]" demo-day/dry-runs-schedule.md 2>/dev/null)
[ "$DRY_RUNS" -ge "5" ] && append_to_report "TR-DRY-RUNS" "5+ rehearsals" "PASS" "$DRY_RUNS" || append_to_report "TR-DRY-RUNS" "Dry runs" "FAIL" "$DRY_RUNS/5"

# TR-COMMERCIAL-LAUNCH (CRITIQUE)
COMMERCIAL=0
[ -f "commercial-launch/pricing-tier-model.md" ] && COMMERCIAL=$((COMMERCIAL+1))
[ -f "commercial-launch/onboarding-workflows.md" ] && COMMERCIAL=$((COMMERCIAL+1))
[ -f "commercial-launch/early-adopter-program-10-garages.md" ] && COMMERCIAL=$((COMMERCIAL+1))
[ -f "commercial-launch/skalean-com-production-deployment.md" ] && COMMERCIAL=$((COMMERCIAL+1))
[ "$COMMERCIAL" = "4" ] && append_to_report "TR-COMMERCIAL-LAUNCH" "Commercial 4 docs" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-COMMERCIAL-LAUNCH" "Commercial" "FAIL" "$COMMERCIAL/4"

# TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md" ]; then
  SPRINTS=$(grep -cE "Sprint 0[1-9]|Sprint [1-3][0-9]" closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md 2>/dev/null)
  DECISIONS=$(grep -cE "decision-0[0-2][0-9]|decision-03[0-8]" closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md 2>/dev/null)
  PHASES=$(grep -cE "Phase [1-9]" closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md 2>/dev/null)
  if [ "$SPRINTS" -ge "37" ] && [ "$DECISIONS" -ge "38" ] && [ "$PHASES" -ge "9" ]; then
    append_to_report "TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE" "PROGRAMME GLOBAL 37+38+9" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE" "Programme" "FAIL" "S=$SPRINTS D=$DECISIONS P=$PHASES"
  fi
else
  append_to_report "TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE" "Programme" "FAIL" "Rapport manquant"
fi

# TR-PHASE10-ROADMAP (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "multi-vertical|cross-country|Anthropic AI partnership|horizontal platform.*Studio.*Automatisation.*Assistant.*Modele" closure-reports/PROGRAMME-GLOBAL-CLOTURE-REPORT.md 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE10-ROADMAP" "Roadmap Phase 10+" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE10-ROADMAP" "Roadmap" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(GO_LIVE_MONITORING_WINDOW_HOURS LOAD_TEST_BASELINE_RPS DEMO_DAY_DATE DEMO_DAY_LOCATION DEMO_DAY_DRY_RUNS_MINIMUM COMMERCIAL_EARLY_ADOPTERS_TARGET SKALEAN_PUBLIC_URL)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FOUNDATION=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S36=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT36-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_DEMO=$(grep -c "TR-DEMO-DAY-MATERIALS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_DRY=$(grep -c "TR-DRY-RUNS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_COMMERCIAL=$(grep -c "TR-COMMERCIAL-LAUNCH.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_PROGRAMME=$(grep -c "TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_P10=$(grep -c "TR-PHASE10-ROADMAP.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FOUNDATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S36" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 36 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_DEMO" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- DEMO DAY MATERIALS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_DRY" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- DRY RUNS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_COMMERCIAL" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- COMMERCIAL LAUNCH FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_PROGRAMME" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PROGRAMME CLOTURE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_P10" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PHASE 10+ ROADMAP FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO -- DEMO DAY READY"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL -- DEMO DAY READY WITH FIXES"
else DECISION="NO-GO -- DEMO DAY POSTPONE"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume FINAL
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## DERNIER SPRINT 37 -- DEMO DAY MARRAKECH 30 JUIN 2026

### Production Go-Live execution status
- 5 services operational
- Sprint 36 DeploymentService integration final canary
- Smoke tests + Load tests baseline
- Monitoring 48h continuous

### Demo Day Marrakech readiness
- 10 slides decks production-grade
- 5 live demos scripted
- Q&A 50+ anticipated questions
- 5+ dry runs rehearsals
- Backup environment + offline videos fallback

### Commercial launch foundation
- Pricing tier Basic + Premium + Enterprise
- Onboarding workflows automated
- Early adopters 10 garages Marrakech
- skalean.com/fr production push
- Marketing materials professionnels

### PROGRAMME GLOBAL CLOTURE
- 37 sprints livres 9 phases
- 38 decisions ratifiees registry
- Demo Day execute proof point ACAPS Programme Emergence
- Commercial launch foundation Phase 10+
- Lessons learned + retrospective comprehensive
- Roadmap Phase 10+ (multi-vertical + cross-country + Anthropic AI + horizontal platform)

### FIN PROGRAMME SKALEAN ASSURFLOW PHASE 1-9 COMPLETE
- Phase 1-9 livres
- Demo Day Marrakech execute
- Commercial launch foundation
- Foundation Phase 10+ vision strategique
EOF

echo "Score FINAL : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-37 FINAL run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%) -- PROGRAMME CLOTURE"
```

---

**2** : TR-SPRINT36-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- DeploymentService final deployments.

**3** : TR-DEMO-DAY-MATERIALS **BLOCKING** -- 10 slides + 5 demos + Q&A 50+.

**4** : TR-DRY-RUNS **BLOCKING** -- 5+ rehearsals minimum.

**5** : TR-COMMERCIAL-LAUNCH **BLOCKING** -- pricing + onboarding + early adopters + skalean.com.

**6** : TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE **BLOCKING** -- 37 sprints + 38 decisions + 9 phases comprehensive.

**7** : TR-PHASE10-ROADMAP **BLOCKING** -- multi-vertical + cross-country + Anthropic AI + horizontal platform vision.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO -- Demo Day execution + commercial launch reportes.

---

**FIN V-37**

**DERNIERE VERIFICATION PROGRAMME SKALEAN ASSURFLOW.**

**PROGRAMME GLOBAL CLOTURE COMPLETE.**
```

## 40. V-40-sprint-40-verification.md

```md
# V-40 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 40 : INSURANCE BROKER FOUNDATION

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 1 -- OUVERTURE)
**Sprint** : 40 / 50
**Reference** : `B-40`, `C-40`, `G-40`
**Total criteres** : 102 (84 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 40 = **OUVERTURE Phase 10 Insurance Broker Vertical** + **foundation Policy domain** + **state machine 12 etats** + **multi-compagnies integration framework** + **Sprint 34 AssurMaghreb activation premier connecteur** + **ACAPS compliance broker-side** + **commercial vertical premier post-Demo Day**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 7 services + 5 workers + 8 entites
- TR-RLS-MULTITENANT : RLS strict tenant_id all 8 tables + tests negatives
- TR-STATE-MACHINE : 12 etats + transitions validated + tests scenarios
- TR-SUBSCRIPTION-SAGA : Sprint 10/11/34 integration + compensations
- TR-ASSURMAGHREB-INTEGRATION : Sprint 34 stub activated + pattern documented
- TR-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE : Sprint 35 broker-side foundation
- TR-ADMIN-PORTAL-4TABS : Sprint 28 4 tabs insurance
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint40-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 40 : Insurance Broker Foundation

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 1 -- OUVERTURE)
**Sprint** : 40
**Reference B-40** : 12 taches, 102 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

### 10.1.1 Decision-039 + Design Doc + Plan

[ -f "decisions/039-insurance-broker-vertical-foundation-multi-compagnies-integration.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/039-insurance-broker-vertical-foundation-multi-compagnies-integration.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-039 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-039" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/insurance-broker-foundation-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/insurance-broker-foundation-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1250 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=25 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

for doc in insurance-broker-plan.md policy-state-machine.md; do
  if [ -f "docs/${doc}" ]; then
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Roadmap Sprints 41-50
grep -qE "Sprint 41|Sprint 42|Sprint 43|Sprint 44|Sprint 45|Sprint 50" decisions/039-insurance-broker-vertical-foundation-multi-compagnies-integration.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "Roadmap Sprints 41-50" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "Roadmap" "WARN" "Verify"

### 10.1.2 Entites Insurance (8 tables) + State Machine

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package insurance-broker-foundation" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 8 tables
TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('policies','quotes','subscriptions','coverages','premiums','beneficiaries','policy_documents','policy_events')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "8" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "8 tables" "PASS" "8/8" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/8"

# RLS strict tenant_id
RLS_COUNT=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename IN ('policies','quotes','subscriptions','coverages','premiums','beneficiaries','policy_documents','policy_events')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS_COUNT" -ge "8" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "RLS 8 tables" "PASS" "$RLS_COUNT/8" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS_COUNT/8"

# UNIQUE policies (insurer, policy_number)
UNIQUE_POL=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='policies' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%insurer_id%policy_number%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_POL" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE (insurer, policy_number)" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# State machine 12 etats
[ -f "repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/state-machine/policy-state-machine.ts" ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "State machine file" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "State machine" "FAIL" "Manquant"

STATES=$(grep -cE "draft|quote_generated|quote_accepted|subscribed|activated|active|renewal_pending|renewed|modified|cancelled|expired|archived" repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/state-machine/policy-state-machine.ts 2>/dev/null)
[ "$STATES" -ge "12" ] && append_to_report "T02-V6" "12 etats state machine" "PASS" "$STATES" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "Etats" "FAIL" "$STATES/12"

# Seeds 6 insurers fictifs
INSURERS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM insurers WHERE name IN ('AssurMaghreb','Atlas Insurance','MediAssur','Maghreb Mutuelle','Royale Assurance','Continental Insurance')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$INSURERS" = "6" ] && append_to_report "T02-V7" "6 insurers fictifs seed" "PASS" "6/6" || append_to_report "T02-V7" "Insurers" "FAIL" "$INSURERS/6"

# Indexes critical
INDEX_POL=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='policies' AND indexdef LIKE '%tenant_id%status%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$INDEX_POL" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V8" "Index policies tenant+status" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V8" "Index" "WARN" "Verify"

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-broker-foundation vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 20 ] && append_to_report "T02-V9" "Tests >=20" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V9" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

# Sprint 7 audit_trail
grep -qE "audit_trail|audit.*push|Sprint 7" repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/services/policy.service.ts 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T03-V5" "Sprint 7 audit_trail" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T03-V5" "Audit" "FAIL" "Manquant"

[ -f "repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/services/quote.service.ts" ] && append_to_report "T04-V1" "QuoteService" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T04-V1" "Service" "FAIL" "Manquant"

for engine in premium-calculator coverage-pricing-rules risk-factors; do

    append_to_report "T04-V-${engine}" "Premium engine ${engine}" "PASS" "OK"
  else

  fi
done

[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 16 ] && append_to_report "T04-V5" "Tests >=16" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T04-V5" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-broker-foundation build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-broker-foundation tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-039
[ -f "decisions/039-insurance-broker-vertical-foundation-multi-compagnies-integration.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/039-insurance-broker-vertical-foundation-multi-compagnies-integration.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-039" "Decision-039" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-039" "Decision-039" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "7" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "5" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "7 services + 5 workers" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS"
fi

# TR-RLS-MULTITENANT (CRITIQUE)
RLS_TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-broker-foundation vitest run tests/integration/rls-multitenant.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$RLS_TESTS" ] && [ "$RLS_TESTS" -ge 8 ] && append_to_report "TR-RLS-MULTITENANT" "RLS strict 8 tables + tests negatives" "PASS" "$RLS_TESTS" || append_to_report "TR-RLS-MULTITENANT" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS_TESTS/8"

# TR-STATE-MACHINE (CRITIQUE)
STATES=$(grep -cE "draft|quote_generated|quote_accepted|subscribed|activated|active|renewal_pending|renewed|modified|cancelled|expired|archived" repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/state-machine/policy-state-machine.ts 2>/dev/null)
if [ "$STATES" -ge "12" ] && [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/state-machine/policy-state-machine.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-STATE-MACHINE" "12 etats state machine" "PASS" "$STATES"
else
  append_to_report "TR-STATE-MACHINE" "State machine" "FAIL" "$STATES/12"
fi

# TR-SUBSCRIPTION-SAGA (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 10|Sprint 11|AssurMaghreb|compensation" repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/services/subscription.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SUBSCRIPTION-SAGA" "Saga Sprint 10/11/34" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SUBSCRIPTION-SAGA" "Saga" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-ASSURMAGHREB-INTEGRATION (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/integrations/assurmaghreb-connector.ts" ] && [ -f "docs/connector-activation-pattern.md" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-ASSURMAGHREB-INTEGRATION" "AssurMaghreb activated + pattern" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-ASSURMAGHREB-INTEGRATION" "AssurMaghreb" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/integrations/acaps-reporting.ts" ] && grep -qE "acaps_reference" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE" "ACAPS compliance broker-side" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE" "ACAPS" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-ADMIN-PORTAL-4TABS (CRITIQUE)
TABS=0
for tab in policies quotes subscriptions premiums; do
  if [ -d "repo/apps/admin-portal/src/app/[locale]/insurance/${tab}" ]; then TABS=$((TABS+1)); fi
done
[ "$TABS" = "4" ] && append_to_report "TR-ADMIN-PORTAL-4TABS" "Admin-portal 4 tabs insurance" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-ADMIN-PORTAL-4TABS" "Admin-portal" "FAIL" "$TABS/4"

# Variables env
VARS=(INSURANCE_QUOTE_DEFAULT_VALIDITY_DAYS QUOTE_EXPIRATION_CRON RENEWAL_ALERTS_CRON RENEWAL_ALERT_DAYS_BEFORE EXPIRATION_PROCESSING_CRON ARCHIVE_CRON ARCHIVE_DAYS_AFTER_EXPIRATION PREMIUM_REMINDERS_CRON SUBSCRIPTION_SAGA_TIMEOUT_MINUTES INSURER_API_TIMEOUT_SECONDS ASSURMAGHREB_API_BASE_URL ACAPS_REFERENCE_PREFIX)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FOUNDATION=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_RLS=$(grep -c "TR-RLS-MULTITENANT.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_SM=$(grep -c "TR-STATE-MACHINE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_SAGA=$(grep -c "TR-SUBSCRIPTION-SAGA.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_ASS=$(grep -c "TR-ASSURMAGHREB-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_ACAPS=$(grep -c "TR-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_ADMIN=$(grep -c "TR-ADMIN-PORTAL-4TABS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FOUNDATION" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_RLS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- RLS MULTI-TENANT FAIL (CRITIQUE SECURITY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_SM" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- STATE MACHINE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_SAGA" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SUBSCRIPTION SAGA FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_ASS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ASSURMAGHREB INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_ACAPS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ACAPS COMPLIANCE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_ADMIN" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ADMIN-PORTAL FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Sprint 41"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Sprint 41"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 41 Insurance Lifecycle Police
- 7 services foundation operational
- 8 entites Policy domain + state machine 12 etats
- Sprint 34 AssurMaghreb activated + pattern replicable
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 4 tabs insurance
- Sprint 13 2 MV insurance
- Sprint 35 ACAPS compliance broker-side foundation
- GO Sprint 41 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-40 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 7 services + 5 workers.

**2** : TR-RLS-MULTITENANT **BLOCKING SECURITY CRITICAL** -- RLS strict 8 tables + tests negatives broker A cannot query broker B policies.

**3** : TR-STATE-MACHINE **BLOCKING** -- 12 etats + transitions validees.

**4** : TR-SUBSCRIPTION-SAGA **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 10/11/34 integration + compensations.

**5** : TR-ASSURMAGHREB-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 34 stub activated + pattern docs.

**6** : TR-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 35 broker-side foundation.

**7** : TR-ADMIN-PORTAL-4TABS **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 28 4 tabs insurance.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 41 Insurance Lifecycle Police.

---

**FIN V-40**

**Verification suivante** : V-41 Sprint 41 Insurance Lifecycle Police.
```

## 41. V-41-sprint-41-verification.md

```md
# V-41 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 41 : INSURANCE LIFECYCLE POLICE

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 2)
**Sprint** : 41 / 50
**Reference** : `B-41`, `C-41`, `G-41`
**Total criteres** : 104 (86 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 41 = **lifecycle insurance complete** + **5 connecteurs compagnies activation** + **InsurerComparison foundation** + **commercial depth value-add**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 5 services + 2 workers + 4 entites
- TR-5-CONNECTEURS-ACTIVATED : Atlas + MediAssur + Maghreb Mutuelle + Royale + Continental operational
- TR-RENEWAL-COMPLIANCE : opt-in customer audit + automatic workflows
- TR-ENDORSEMENT-SNAPSHOTS : previous_state + new_state JSONB comprehensive
- TR-CANCELLATION-PRORATE : refund calculation strict + edge cases
- TR-REINSTATEMENT-GRACE : 30 jours strict + race conditions
- TR-INSURER-COMPARISON : 6 insurers concurrent + foundation Sprint 45
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint41-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 41 : Insurance Lifecycle Police

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 2)
**Sprint** : 41
**Reference B-41** : 12 taches, 104 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

---

## VERIFICATION TACHES

### 10.2.1 Decision-040 + Design Doc + Plan

```bash
[ -f "decisions/040-insurance-policy-lifecycle-complete-multi-insurers-activation.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/040-insurance-policy-lifecycle-complete-multi-insurers-activation.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-040 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-040" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/insurance-lifecycle-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/insurance-lifecycle-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1250 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=25 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

for doc in insurance-lifecycle-plan.md connector-replication-checklist.md; do
  if [ -f "docs/${doc}" ]; then
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done
```

### 10.2.2 Entites Lifecycle (4 tables)

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package insurance-lifecycle" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 4 tables
TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('policy_renewals','policy_endorsements','policy_cancellations','policy_reinstatements')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "4" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "4 tables" "PASS" "4/4" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/4"

# RLS strict
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename IN ('policy_renewals','policy_endorsements','policy_cancellations','policy_reinstatements')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" -ge "4" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "RLS 4 tables" "PASS" "$RLS/4" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/4"

# State machine extensions documented
grep -qE "renewed substates|reinstated transitions" docs/policy-state-machine.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T02-V4" "State machine extensions" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "Extensions" "WARN" "Verify"

# Seeds
RENEWALS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM policy_renewals" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RENEWALS" -ge "3" ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "Seeds renewals >=3" "PASS" "$RENEWALS" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "Seeds" "WARN" "$RENEWALS"

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-lifecycle vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 18 ] && append_to_report "T02-V6" "Tests >=18" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

### 10.2.8 5 Connecteurs Compagnies Activation CRITIQUE

```bash
for connector in atlas-insurance mediassur maghreb-mutuelle royale-assurance continental-insurance; do
  if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/integrations/${connector}-connector.ts" ]; then
    append_to_report "T08-V-${connector}" "Connecteur ${connector}" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T08-V-${connector}" "${connector}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# 4 methods per connecteur (echantillon Atlas)
METHODS_ATLAS=$(grep -cE "createPolicy|cancelPolicy|getPolicyStatus|listPoliciesByCustomer" repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/integrations/atlas-insurance-connector.ts 2>/dev/null)
[ "$METHODS_ATLAS" -ge "4" ] && append_to_report "T08-V1" "Atlas 4 methods" "PASS" "$METHODS_ATLAS" || append_to_report "T08-V1" "Methods Atlas" "WARN" "$METHODS_ATLAS"

# Variables env per connecteur
VARS_MISSING=0
for var in ATLAS_INSURANCE_API_BASE_URL MEDIASSUR_API_BASE_URL MAGHREB_MUTUELLE_API_BASE_URL ROYALE_ASSURANCE_API_BASE_URL CONTINENTAL_INSURANCE_API_BASE_URL; do
  if ! grep -q "^${var}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then VARS_MISSING=$((VARS_MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$VARS_MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "T08-V2" "Vars env 5 connecteurs" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T08-V2" "Vars" "FAIL" "$VARS_MISSING missing"

# Integration tests E2E per connecteur
TESTS_INT=0
for connector in atlas-insurance mediassur maghreb-mutuelle royale-assurance continental-insurance; do
  if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/tests/e2e/${connector}-integration.test.ts" ]; then
    TESTS_INT=$((TESTS_INT+1))
  fi
done
[ "$TESTS_INT" = "5" ] && append_to_report "T08-V3" "Tests E2E 5 connecteurs" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "T08-V3" "Tests E2E" "FAIL" "$TESTS_INT/5"

# Sprint 35 circuit breaker per connecteur
CIRCUIT=$(grep -lE "circuit.*breaker|callWithCircuitBreaker" repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/integrations/*.ts 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$CIRCUIT" -ge "5" ] && append_to_report "T08-V4" "Circuit breaker 5 connecteurs" "PASS" "$CIRCUIT/5" || append_to_report "T08-V4" "Circuit breaker" "WARN" "$CIRCUIT/5"
```

```bash
TOTAL=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-lifecycle vitest run tests/e2e/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge "45" ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=45" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

# 6 connecteurs total verified
CONNECTORS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-broker-foundation/src/integrations/*-connector.ts repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/integrations/*-connector.ts 2>/dev/null | wc -l)

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-lifecycle build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck

[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-040
[ -f "decisions/040-insurance-policy-lifecycle-complete-multi-insurers-activation.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/040-insurance-policy-lifecycle-complete-multi-insurers-activation.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-040" "Decision-040" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-040" "Decision-040" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "5" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "2" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "5 services + 2 workers" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS"
fi

# TR-5-CONNECTEURS-ACTIVATED (CRITIQUE)
CONNECTORS_5=0
for c in atlas-insurance mediassur maghreb-mutuelle royale-assurance continental-insurance; do
  if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/integrations/${c}-connector.ts" ]; then CONNECTORS_5=$((CONNECTORS_5+1)); fi
done
[ "$CONNECTORS_5" = "5" ] && append_to_report "TR-5-CONNECTEURS-ACTIVATED" "5 connecteurs activated" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "TR-5-CONNECTEURS-ACTIVATED" "Connecteurs" "FAIL" "$CONNECTORS_5/5"

# TR-RENEWAL-COMPLIANCE (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "auto_renewal_enabled|opt.in|consent" repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/services/policy-renewal.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-RENEWAL-COMPLIANCE" "Renewal opt-in compliance" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-RENEWAL-COMPLIANCE" "Compliance" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-ENDORSEMENT-SNAPSHOTS (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "previous_state.*JSONB|new_state.*JSONB|snapshot" repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/services/policy-endorsement.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-ENDORSEMENT-SNAPSHOTS" "Endorsement snapshots" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-ENDORSEMENT-SNAPSHOTS" "Snapshots" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-CANCELLATION-PRORATE (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "calculateProrateRefund|prorate|days_remaining" repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/services/policy-cancellation.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-CANCELLATION-PRORATE" "Prorate refund calculation" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CANCELLATION-PRORATE" "Prorate" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-REINSTATEMENT-GRACE (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "REINSTATEMENT_GRACE_PERIOD_DAYS=30" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/workers/reinstatement-grace-period-cron.worker.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-REINSTATEMENT-GRACE" "Reinstatement grace 30 jours" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-REINSTATEMENT-GRACE" "Grace" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-INSURER-COMPARISON (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/services/insurer-comparison.service.ts" ] && grep -qE "Promise\.allSettled" repo/packages/insurance-lifecycle/src/services/insurer-comparison.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-INSURER-COMPARISON" "InsurerComparison concurrent" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-INSURER-COMPARISON" "Comparison" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FND=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CON=$(grep -c "TR-5-CONNECTEURS-ACTIVATED.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_REN=$(grep -c "TR-RENEWAL-COMPLIANCE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_END=$(grep -c "TR-ENDORSEMENT-SNAPSHOTS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CAN=$(grep -c "TR-CANCELLATION-PRORATE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_REI=$(grep -c "TR-REINSTATEMENT-GRACE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CMP=$(grep -c "TR-INSURER-COMPARISON.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_CON" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- 5 CONNECTEURS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_REN" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- RENEWAL COMPLIANCE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_END" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ENDORSEMENT SNAPSHOTS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_CAN" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CANCELLATION PRORATE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_REI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- REINSTATEMENT GRACE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_CMP" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- INSURER COMPARISON FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Sprint 42"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Sprint 42"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 42 Souscription Intelligente
- 5 lifecycle services operational
- 6 connecteurs compagnies operational (1 Sprint 40 + 5 Sprint 41)
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 9 tabs insurance total
- Sprint 13 6 MV insurance total
- Sprint 35 ACAPS extensions cancellations + endorsements
- InsurerComparison foundation Sprint 45
- GO Sprint 42 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-41 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 5 services + 2 workers.

**2** : TR-5-CONNECTEURS-ACTIVATED **BLOCKING** -- 5 connecteurs pattern Sprint 40.

**3** : TR-RENEWAL-COMPLIANCE **BLOCKING** -- opt-in customer audit consent.

**4** : TR-ENDORSEMENT-SNAPSHOTS **BLOCKING** -- previous_state + new_state JSONB.

**5** : TR-CANCELLATION-PRORATE **BLOCKING** -- refund calculation strict.

**6** : TR-REINSTATEMENT-GRACE **BLOCKING** -- 30 jours strict + race conditions.

**7** : TR-INSURER-COMPARISON **BLOCKING** -- 6 insurers concurrent + foundation Sprint 45.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 42 Souscription Intelligente.

---

**FIN V-41**
```

## 42. V-42-sprint-42-verification.md

```md
# V-42 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 42 : INSURANCE SOUSCRIPTION INTELLIGENTE

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 3)
**Sprint** : 42 / 50
**Reference** : `B-42`, `C-42`, `G-42`
**Total criteres** : 106 (88 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 42 = **smart underwriting comprehensive** + **risk scoring composite 6 modules** + **pre-fill intelligent** + **AI recommendations** + **conversion optimization** + **nurture campaigns** + **Sprint 33 ChurnPrediction reuse** + **foundation Phase 11+ AI**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 6 services + 3 workers + 6 entites + scoring engine 6 modules
- TR-UNDERWRITING-THRESHOLDS : auto-approval + manual review + decline + appeal
- TR-RISK-SCORING-COMPOSITE : 6 scoring modules + composite + explanability
- TR-PRE-FILL-CONSENT : Sprint 34 sources + CNDP consent + PII masking
- TR-CONVERSION-FUNNEL : tracking + drop-off detection + recovery workflows
- TR-NURTURE-OPT-OUT : 6 campaign types + CNDP opt-out compliance
- TR-CHURN-PREDICTION-INSURANCE : Sprint 33 patterns reuse adapted
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint42-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 42 : Insurance Souscription Intelligente

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 3)
**Sprint** : 42
**Reference B-42** : 12 taches, 106 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

---

## VERIFICATION TACHES

### 10.3.1 Decision-041 + Design Doc + Plan + Algorithms

```bash
[ -f "decisions/041-insurance-smart-underwriting-risk-scoring-ai-foundation.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/041-insurance-smart-underwriting-risk-scoring-ai-foundation.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-041 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-041" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/smart-underwriting-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/smart-underwriting-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1250 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=25 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

for doc in risk-scoring-algorithms.md smart-underwriting-commercial-plan.md; do
  if [ -f "docs/${doc}" ]; then
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# Phase 11+ AI Anthropic
grep -qE "Phase 11\+|Anthropic AI|partnership" decisions/041-insurance-smart-underwriting-risk-scoring-ai-foundation.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "Phase 11+ AI Anthropic" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "Phase 11+" "WARN" "Verify"

# Bias considerations
grep -qE "bias|fairness|discrimination|ACAPS.*compliance" docs/risk-scoring-algorithms.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V4" "Bias considerations" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V4" "Bias" "WARN" "Verify"

### 10.3.2 Entites Smart Underwriting (6 tables)

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package insurance-smart-underwriting" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 6 tables
TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('underwriting_decisions','risk_scores','pre_fill_sessions','quote_optimizations','conversion_funnel_events','nurture_campaigns')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "6" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "6 tables" "PASS" "6/6" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/6"

# UNIQUE underwriting_decisions quote_id
UNIQUE=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='underwriting_decisions' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%quote_id%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE quote_id" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# RLS strict
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename IN ('underwriting_decisions','risk_scores','pre_fill_sessions','quote_optimizations','conversion_funnel_events','nurture_campaigns')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" -ge "6" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "RLS 6 tables" "PASS" "$RLS/6" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/6"

# Indexes performance
INDEX_RISK=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='risk_scores' AND indexdef LIKE '%customer_id%scoring_date%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$INDEX_RISK" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "Index risk_scores customer+date" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "Index" "WARN" "Verify"

# Seeds
DECISIONS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM underwriting_decisions" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$DECISIONS" -ge "10" ] && append_to_report "T02-V6" "Seeds underwriting >=10" "PASS" "$DECISIONS" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "Seeds" "WARN" "$DECISIONS"

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-smart-underwriting vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 20 ] && append_to_report "T02-V7" "Tests >=20" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V7" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-smart-underwriting build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-smart-underwriting tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-041
[ -f "decisions/041-insurance-smart-underwriting-risk-scoring-ai-foundation.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/041-insurance-smart-underwriting-risk-scoring-ai-foundation.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-041" "Decision-041" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-041" "Decision-041" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
SCORERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/scoring-engine/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "6" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "3" ] && [ "$SCORERS" -ge "6" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "6 services + 3 workers + 6 scorers" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS+$SCORERS"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS Sc=$SCORERS"
fi

# TR-UNDERWRITING-THRESHOLDS (CRITIQUE)
THRESHOLDS=$(grep -cE "UNDERWRITING_AUTO_APPROVAL_THRESHOLD=30|UNDERWRITING_MANUAL_REVIEW_THRESHOLD=70|UNDERWRITING_DECLINE_THRESHOLD=100" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null)
[ "$THRESHOLDS" -ge "3" ] && append_to_report "TR-UNDERWRITING-THRESHOLDS" "3 thresholds" "PASS" "$THRESHOLDS" || append_to_report "TR-UNDERWRITING-THRESHOLDS" "Thresholds" "FAIL" "$THRESHOLDS/3"

# TR-RISK-SCORING-COMPOSITE (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/scoring-engine/composite-scorer.ts" ] && grep -qE "risk_factors|explanability|identifyRiskFactors" repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/services/risk-scoring.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-RISK-SCORING-COMPOSITE" "Composite + explanability" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-RISK-SCORING-COMPOSITE" "Composite" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-PRE-FILL-CONSENT (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "consent_cnde|CNDP|Sprint 27.*PII" repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/services/pre-fill.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-PRE-FILL-CONSENT" "Pre-fill consent + PII" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PRE-FILL-CONSENT" "Consent" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-CONVERSION-FUNNEL (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/workers/drop-off-detection-cron.worker.ts" ] && [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/workers/recovery-campaigns-cron.worker.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-CONVERSION-FUNNEL" "Funnel + recovery workers" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CONVERSION-FUNNEL" "Funnel" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-NURTURE-OPT-OUT (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "optOut|opt_out.*CNDP|opt.out.*compliance" repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/services/nurture-campaign.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-NURTURE-OPT-OUT" "Nurture opt-out CNDP" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-NURTURE-OPT-OUT" "Opt-out" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-CHURN-PREDICTION-INSURANCE (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/services/insurance-churn-prediction.service.ts" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 33|patterns.*reuse" repo/packages/insurance-smart-underwriting/src/services/insurance-churn-prediction.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-CHURN-PREDICTION-INSURANCE" "Sprint 33 reuse insurance" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CHURN-PREDICTION-INSURANCE" "Churn" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(UNDERWRITING_AUTO_APPROVAL_THRESHOLD UNDERWRITING_MANUAL_REVIEW_THRESHOLD UNDERWRITING_DECLINE_THRESHOLD UNDERWRITING_MANUAL_REVIEW_SLA_HOURS RISK_SCORING_VALIDITY_DAYS RISK_SCORING_VERSION PRE_FILL_SESSION_EXPIRY_HOURS DROP_OFF_DETECTION_INACTIVE_HOURS DROP_OFF_DETECTION_CRON RECOVERY_CAMPAIGNS_CRON NURTURE_CAMPAIGNS_CRON NURTURE_CAMPAIGN_TYPES WINBACK_GRACE_PERIOD_DAYS CHURN_PREDICTION_PREMIUM_INCREASE_THRESHOLD_PERCENT)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FND=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_UND=$(grep -c "TR-UNDERWRITING-THRESHOLDS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_RSK=$(grep -c "TR-RISK-SCORING-COMPOSITE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_PFL=$(grep -c "TR-PRE-FILL-CONSENT.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CNV=$(grep -c "TR-CONVERSION-FUNNEL.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NUR=$(grep -c "TR-NURTURE-OPT-OUT.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CHN=$(grep -c "TR-CHURN-PREDICTION-INSURANCE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_UND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- UNDERWRITING THRESHOLDS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_RSK" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- RISK SCORING FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_PFL" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PRE-FILL CONSENT FAIL (COMPLIANCE)"
elif [ "$CRIT_CNV" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CONVERSION FUNNEL FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NUR" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- NURTURE OPT-OUT FAIL (CNDP)"
elif [ "$CRIT_CHN" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CHURN PREDICTION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Sprint 43"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Sprint 43"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 43 Quote Express
- 6 smart underwriting services operational
- Risk scoring composite 6 modules + explanability
- Pre-fill 3 sources + CNDP consent + Sprint 27 PII
- Conversion funnel + drop-off recovery + 2 workers
- 6 nurture campaign types + opt-out CNDP
- Sprint 33 ChurnPrediction insurance reuse
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 14 tabs insurance total
- Sprint 13 11 MV insurance total
- Sprint 35 ACAPS underwriting audit
- GO Sprint 43 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-42 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 6 services + 3 workers + 6 scorers.

**2** : TR-UNDERWRITING-THRESHOLDS **BLOCKING** -- 3 thresholds configured.

**3** : TR-RISK-SCORING-COMPOSITE **BLOCKING** -- composite scorer + explanability.

**4** : TR-PRE-FILL-CONSENT **BLOCKING COMPLIANCE** -- CNDP consent + Sprint 27 PII strict.

**5** : TR-CONVERSION-FUNNEL **BLOCKING** -- funnel tracking + drop-off workers.

**6** : TR-NURTURE-OPT-OUT **BLOCKING CNDP** -- opt-out compliance strict.

**7** : TR-CHURN-PREDICTION-INSURANCE **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 33 patterns reuse.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 43 Quote Express.

---

**FIN V-42**

**Verification suivante** : V-43 Sprint 43 Insurance Quote Express.
```

## 43. V-43-sprint-43-verification.md

```md
# V-43 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 43 : INSURANCE QUOTE EXPRESS

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 4)
**Sprint** : 43 / 50
**Reference** : `B-43`, `C-43`, `G-43`
**Total criteres** : 108 (90 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 43 = **Quote Express ultra-fast < 30s** + **multi-step wizard** + **mobile-first PWA Sprint 18 extension** + **pre-fill ultra-rapid** + **sharing viral** + **A/B testing** + **offline-first**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 5 services + 1 worker + 5 entites + wizard state machine
- TR-WIZARD-STATE-MACHINE : 3-5 steps + transitions + save_draft + resume
- TR-PRE-FILL-ULTRA-RAPID : background concurrent < 5s + 3 sources Sprint 42 reuse
- TR-AUTO-APPROVAL-30S : end-to-end < 30s demonstrable + Sprint 36 monitoring
- TR-PWA-SPRINT18-EXTENSION : service worker + manifest + IndexedDB + Sync API
- TR-MOBILE-FIRST-WCAG : touch 48x48px + WCAG 2.1 AA + input types strict
- TR-SHARING-SECURE : token UUID cryptographic + customer auth + Sprint 27 PII
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint43-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 43 : Insurance Quote Express

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 4)
**Sprint** : 43
**Reference B-43** : 12 taches, 108 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATION TACHES

### 10.4.1 Decision-042 + Design Doc + Plan + UX Research

```bash
[ -f "decisions/042-insurance-quote-express-ultra-fast-pwa-mobile-first.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/042-insurance-quote-express-ultra-fast-pwa-mobile-first.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-042 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-042" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/quote-express-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/quote-express-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1250 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=25 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

for doc in quote-express-ux-research.md quote-express-commercial-plan.md; do
  if [ -f "docs/${doc}" ]; then
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# Mobile-first WCAG AA reference
grep -qE "mobile-first|WCAG 2.1 AA|accessibility|touch.*48" docs/quote-express-ux-research.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "Mobile + WCAG references" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "Mobile/WCAG" "WARN" "Verify"

# Phase 11+ AI roadmap
grep -qE "Phase 11\+|Anthropic AI|voice.*AI|biometric|WebAuthn" decisions/042-insurance-quote-express-ultra-fast-pwa-mobile-first.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V4" "Phase 11+ roadmap" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V4" "Phase 11+" "WARN" "Verify"
```

### 10.4.2 Entites Quote Express (5 tables)

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/quote-express/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package quote-express" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 5 tables
TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('quote_wizard_sessions','quote_shares','wizard_variants','wizard_events','offline_quote_syncs')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "5 tables" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/5"

# RLS strict
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename IN ('quote_wizard_sessions','quote_shares','wizard_variants','wizard_events','offline_quote_syncs')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" -ge "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "RLS 5 tables" "PASS" "$RLS/5" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/5"

# UNIQUE constraints
UNIQUE_SHARE=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='quote_shares' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%share_token%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_SHARE" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE share_token" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE share" "FAIL" "Manquant"

UNIQUE_VAR=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='wizard_variants' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%variant_name%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_VAR" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "UNIQUE variant_name" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "UNIQUE variant" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Check current_step constraint
grep -qE "CHECK.*current_step.*BETWEEN 1 AND 5" repo/packages/quote-express/migrations/ 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T02-V6" "CHECK current_step 1-5" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "CHECK" "WARN" "Verify"

# Seeds
WIZARD_SESSIONS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quote_wizard_sessions" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$WIZARD_SESSIONS" -ge "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V7" "Seeds wizard sessions >=5" "PASS" "$WIZARD_SESSIONS" || append_to_report "T02-V7" "Seeds" "WARN" "$WIZARD_SESSIONS"

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/quote-express vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 20 ] && append_to_report "T02-V8" "Tests >=20" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V8" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```
