### 10.4.12 Sprint 43 Closure

```bash
TOTAL=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/quote-express vitest run tests/e2e/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge "45" ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=45" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

COV=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/quote-express vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

[ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-43-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 44|Portage|GO Sprint 44" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-43-closure-report.md && append_to_report "T12-V3" "Sprint 43 closure" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V3" "Closure" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 15 tabs insurance total
TABS_INSURANCE=$(ls -d repo/apps/admin-portal/src/app/[locale]/insurance/*/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$TABS_INSURANCE" -ge "15" ] && append_to_report "T12-V4" "15 tabs insurance total" "PASS" "$TABS_INSURANCE" || append_to_report "T12-V4" "Tabs" "WARN" "$TABS_INSURANCE/15"

# 15 MV insurance total
MV_INSURANCE=$(clickhouse-client --query "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system.tables WHERE database='analytics' AND name IN ('policy_metrics_mv','quote_conversion_funnel_mv','renewal_metrics_mv','endorsement_revenue_mv','cancellation_reasons_mv','reinstatement_success_mv','risk_scoring_metrics_mv','underwriting_decisions_mv','conversion_funnel_mv','nurture_campaign_performance_mv','insurance_churn_predictions_mv','wizard_funnel_mv','step_drop_off_mv','viral_coefficient_mv','ab_testing_results_mv')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$MV_INSURANCE" -ge "15" ] && append_to_report "T12-V5" "15 MV insurance total" "PASS" "$MV_INSURANCE" || append_to_report "T12-V5" "MV" "WARN" "$MV_INSURANCE/15"

# Benchmarks end-to-end < 30s
grep -qE "end.to.end.*< 30s|end.to.end.*median.*[0-9]+s|p95.*[0-9]+s" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-43-closure-report.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T12-V6" "Benchmarks < 30s" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V6" "Benchmarks" "WARN" "Verify"
```

---

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/quote-express build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

pnpm --filter customer-portal build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD-CP" "Build customer-portal" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD-CP" "Build CP" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/quote-express tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/quote-express/src/ repo/apps/customer-portal/src/app/quote-express/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-042
[ -f "decisions/042-insurance-quote-express-ultra-fast-pwa-mobile-first.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/042-insurance-quote-express-ultra-fast-pwa-mobile-first.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-042" "Decision-042" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-042" "Decision-042" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/quote-express/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/quote-express/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "5" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "1" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "5 services + 1 worker" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS"
fi

# TR-WIZARD-STATE-MACHINE (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/quote-express/src/wizard-state-machine/wizard-state-machine.ts" ] && [ -f "repo/packages/quote-express/src/wizard-state-machine/step-transitions.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-WIZARD-STATE-MACHINE" "Wizard state machine + transitions" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-WIZARD-STATE-MACHINE" "State machine" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-PRE-FILL-ULTRA-RAPID (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "initiatePreFillBackground|Promise\.allSettled" repo/packages/quote-express/src/integrations/pre-fill-integration.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "PRE_FILL_BACKGROUND_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=5" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-PRE-FILL-ULTRA-RAPID" "Pre-fill ultra-rapid background < 5s" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PRE-FILL-ULTRA-RAPID" "Pre-fill" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-AUTO-APPROVAL-30S (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "END_TO_END_TARGET_SECONDS=30" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && [ -f "repo/packages/quote-express/src/integrations/auto-approval-integration.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-AUTO-APPROVAL-30S" "Auto-approval < 30s" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-AUTO-APPROVAL-30S" "Auto-approval" "FAIL" "Manquant"
fi

# TR-PWA-SPRINT18-EXTENSION (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/apps/customer-portal/public/sw.js" ] && [ -f "repo/apps/customer-portal/public/manifest.json" ] && [ -f "repo/apps/customer-portal/src/lib/offline/indexed-db.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-PWA-SPRINT18-EXTENSION" "PWA Sprint 18 extension" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PWA-SPRINT18-EXTENSION" "PWA" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-MOBILE-FIRST-WCAG (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "MOBILE_TOUCH_TARGET_MIN_PX=48|WCAG_COMPLIANCE_LEVEL=AA" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-MOBILE-FIRST-WCAG" "Mobile-first 48px + WCAG AA" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-MOBILE-FIRST-WCAG" "Mobile/WCAG" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SHARING-SECURE (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/quote-express/src/services/quote-share.service.ts" ] && grep -qE "crypto\.randomUUID|cryptographic" repo/packages/quote-express/src/services/quote-share.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SHARING-SECURE" "Sharing token cryptographic secure" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SHARING-SECURE" "Sharing" "FAIL" "Insecure"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(WIZARD_AUTO_SAVE_DRAFT_INTERVAL_SECONDS WIZARD_ABANDON_DETECTION_INACTIVE_HOURS WIZARD_ABANDON_DETECTION_CRON WIZARD_TOTAL_STEPS_DEFAULT WIZARD_MIN_STEPS WIZARD_MAX_STEPS PRE_FILL_BACKGROUND_TIMEOUT_SECONDS END_TO_END_TARGET_SECONDS END_TO_END_DEGRADATION_THRESHOLD_SECONDS SHARE_TOKEN_EXPIRY_HOURS SHARE_METHODS_ENABLED AB_TESTING_STICKY_ASSIGNMENT OFFLINE_INDEXED_DB_ENCRYPTION_ENABLED OFFLINE_SYNC_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS WCAG_COMPLIANCE_LEVEL MOBILE_TOUCH_TARGET_MIN_PX)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FND=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_WSM=$(grep -c "TR-WIZARD-STATE-MACHINE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_PFL=$(grep -c "TR-PRE-FILL-ULTRA-RAPID.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_AUT=$(grep -c "TR-AUTO-APPROVAL-30S.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_PWA=$(grep -c "TR-PWA-SPRINT18-EXTENSION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_MOB=$(grep -c "TR-MOBILE-FIRST-WCAG.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_SHR=$(grep -c "TR-SHARING-SECURE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_WSM" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- WIZARD STATE MACHINE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_PFL" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PRE-FILL ULTRA-RAPID FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_AUT" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- AUTO-APPROVAL 30S FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_PWA" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PWA SPRINT 18 EXTENSION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_MOB" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- MOBILE WCAG FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_SHR" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SHARING INSECURE (PRIVACY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Sprint 44"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Sprint 44"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 44 Portage Portefeuille T7
- 5 quote express services operational
- 5 entites quote express + wizard state machine
- PWA Sprint 18 extension dedie operational
- Sub-30s end-to-end demonstrable (median + p95)
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 15 tabs insurance total
- Sprint 13 15 MV insurance total
- A/B testing + offline-first foundations
- Sprint 14 cross-tenant patterns reuse Sprint 44 ready
- GO Sprint 44 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-43 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 5 services + 1 worker + state machine.

**2** : TR-WIZARD-STATE-MACHINE **BLOCKING** -- 3-5 steps + transitions + save_draft + resume.

**3** : TR-PRE-FILL-ULTRA-RAPID **BLOCKING** -- background concurrent < 5s.

**4** : TR-AUTO-APPROVAL-30S **BLOCKING** -- end-to-end < 30s + monitoring.

**5** : TR-PWA-SPRINT18-EXTENSION **BLOCKING** -- service worker + manifest + IndexedDB + Sync API.

**6** : TR-MOBILE-FIRST-WCAG **BLOCKING** -- touch 48px + WCAG 2.1 AA.

**7** : TR-SHARING-SECURE **BLOCKING PRIVACY** -- token cryptographic + Sprint 27 PII.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 44 Portage Portefeuille T7.

---

**FIN V-43**

**Verification suivante** : V-44 Sprint 44 Insurance Portage Portefeuille T7.
```

## 44. V-44-sprint-44-verification.md

```md
# V-44 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 44 : INSURANCE PORTAGE PORTEFEUILLE T7

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 5)
**Sprint** : 44 / 50
**Reference** : `B-44`, `C-44`, `G-44`
**Total criteres** : 106 (88 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 44 = **Portage T7 comprehensive** + **PortfolioTransfer saga 8 steps** + **TransferConsent CNDP cryptographic** + **Sprint 14 cross-tenant extension** + **CommissionReconciliation** + **BrokerPortfolioAnalytics M&A foundation** + **Sprint 35 ACAPS T7 compliance**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 6 services + 2 workers + 5 entites + 2 state machines
- TR-CROSS-TENANT-SECURITY : Sprint 14 extension + RLS source + target + SELECT FOR UPDATE
- TR-CNDP-CONSENT : cryptographic token + customer auth + Sprint 27 PII + audit
- TR-SAGA-COMPENSATIONS : 8 steps + per-step rollback + idempotency Sprint 15
- TR-ACAPS-T7-COMPLIANCE : T7 form + acaps_reference + Sprint 35 audit
- TR-COMMISSION-RECONCILIATION : Sprint 11 PayoutService + dispute workflow
- TR-PORTFOLIO-ANALYTICS : snapshots daily + valuation + Sprint 42 ChurnPrediction reuse
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint44-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 44 : Insurance Portage Portefeuille T7

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 5)
**Sprint** : 44
**Reference B-44** : 12 taches, 106 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

### 10.5.1 Decision-043 + Design Doc + Plan

```bash
[ -f "decisions/043-insurance-portability-t7-cross-broker-transfers-sprint14-extension.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/043-insurance-portability-t7-cross-broker-transfers-sprint14-extension.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-043 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-043" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/insurance-portability-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/insurance-portability-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1250 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=25 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

for doc in portage-t7-acaps-compliance.md sprint14-cross-tenant-extension-plan.md; do
  if [ -f "docs/${doc}" ]; then
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "PASS" "OK"
  else

  fi
done

# ACAPS T7 references
grep -qE "T7|ACAPS|Programme Emergence|cessation.*activity" decisions/043-insurance-portability-t7-cross-broker-transfers-sprint14-extension.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "ACAPS T7 references" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "ACAPS T7" "WARN" "Verify"

# 5 tables
TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('portfolio_transfers','portfolio_transfer_policies','transfer_consent_requests','broker_portfolio_snapshots','commission_reconciliations')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "5 tables" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/5"

# UNIQUE constraints
UNIQUE_ACAPS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='portfolio_transfers' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%acaps_reference%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_ACAPS" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE acaps_reference" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE ACAPS" "FAIL" "Manquant"

UNIQUE_CONSENT=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='transfer_consent_requests' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%consent_token%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_CONSENT" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE consent_token" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE consent" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# RLS strict source + target
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename IN ('portfolio_transfers','portfolio_transfer_policies','transfer_consent_requests','broker_portfolio_snapshots','commission_reconciliations')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" -ge "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "RLS 5 tables" "PASS" "$RLS/5" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/5"

# State machines
[ -f "repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/state-machine/portfolio-transfer-state-machine.ts" ] && append_to_report "T02-V6" "Transfer state machine" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "Transfer SM" "FAIL" "Manquant"

[ -f "repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/state-machine/consent-state-machine.ts" ] && append_to_report "T02-V7" "Consent state machine" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V7" "Consent SM" "FAIL" "Manquant"

[ "$STATES" -ge "8" ] && append_to_report "T02-V8" "8 transfer states" "PASS" "$STATES" || append_to_report "T02-V8" "States" "FAIL" "$STATES/8"

# 4 consent states

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-portability vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 20 ] && append_to_report "T02-V10" "Tests >=20" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V10" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"

[ "$MV_INSURANCE" -ge "19" ] && append_to_report "T12-V5" "19 MV insurance total" "PASS" "$MV_INSURANCE" || append_to_report "T12-V5" "MV" "WARN" "$MV_INSURANCE/19"

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-portability build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-portability tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-043
[ -f "decisions/043-insurance-portability-t7-cross-broker-transfers-sprint14-extension.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/043-insurance-portability-t7-cross-broker-transfers-sprint14-extension.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-043" "Decision-043" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-043" "Decision-043" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$|extension\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
SM=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/state-machine/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "6" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "2" ] && [ "$SM" -ge "2" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "6 services + 2 workers + 2 SM" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS+$SM"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS SM=$SM"
fi

# TR-CROSS-TENANT-SECURITY (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/sprint14-cross-tenant-framework-extension.ts" ] && grep -qE "SELECT FOR UPDATE|REPEATABLE READ" repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/sprint14-cross-tenant-framework-extension.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-CROSS-TENANT-SECURITY" "Cross-tenant security strict" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CROSS-TENANT-SECURITY" "Cross-tenant" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-CNDP-CONSENT (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "crypto\.randomUUID|cryptographic|consent_token.*UUID" repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/transfer-consent.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "Sprint 27|PII" repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/transfer-consent.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-CNDP-CONSENT" "CNDP cryptographic + PII" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CNDP-CONSENT" "CNDP" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SAGA-COMPENSATIONS (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "compensation|rollback" repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/portfolio-transfer.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "Sprint 15|idempotency" repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/portfolio-transfer.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SAGA-COMPENSATIONS" "Saga + compensations + idempotency" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SAGA-COMPENSATIONS" "Saga" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-ACAPS-T7-COMPLIANCE (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "ACAPS_REFERENCE_PRT_PREFIX=ACAPS-PRT-|T7" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/portability-compliance.service.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-ACAPS-T7-COMPLIANCE" "ACAPS T7 compliance" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-ACAPS-T7-COMPLIANCE" "ACAPS" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-COMMISSION-RECONCILIATION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 11|PayoutService" repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/commission-reconciliation.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "disputeCommission|resolveDispute" repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/commission-reconciliation.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-COMMISSION-RECONCILIATION" "Commission + Sprint 11 + dispute" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-COMMISSION-RECONCILIATION" "Commission" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-PORTFOLIO-ANALYTICS (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/workers/portfolio-snapshot-cron.worker.ts" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 42|ChurnPrediction" repo/packages/insurance-portability/src/services/broker-portfolio-analytics.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-PORTFOLIO-ANALYTICS" "Portfolio analytics + Sprint 42 reuse" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PORTFOLIO-ANALYTICS" "Analytics" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(CONSENT_EXPIRATION_DAYS CONSENT_EXPIRATION_CRON CONSENT_REMINDERS_DAYS_BEFORE_LIST PORTFOLIO_SNAPSHOT_CRON TRANSFER_SAGA_TIMEOUT_MINUTES ACAPS_T7_FORM_VERSION ACAPS_REFERENCE_PRT_PREFIX COMMISSION_RECONCILIATION_TIMEOUT_DAYS COMMISSION_DISPUTE_ESCALATION_DAYS CROSS_TENANT_MIGRATION_BATCH_SIZE CROSS_TENANT_MIGRATION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS PORTFOLIO_VALUATION_MULTIPLE_REVENUE BROKER_PORTFOLIO_MV_REFRESH_CRON)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FND=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CT=$(grep -c "TR-CROSS-TENANT-SECURITY.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CNDP=$(grep -c "TR-CNDP-CONSENT.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_SAG=$(grep -c "TR-SAGA-COMPENSATIONS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_ACAPS=$(grep -c "TR-ACAPS-T7-COMPLIANCE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_COM=$(grep -c "TR-COMMISSION-RECONCILIATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_POR=$(grep -c "TR-PORTFOLIO-ANALYTICS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_CT" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CROSS-TENANT SECURITY FAIL (CRITIQUE)"
elif [ "$CRIT_CNDP" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CNDP CONSENT FAIL (REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_SAG" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SAGA COMPENSATIONS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_ACAPS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ACAPS T7 COMPLIANCE FAIL (REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_COM" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- COMMISSION RECONCILIATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_POR" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- PORTFOLIO ANALYTICS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Sprint 45"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Sprint 45"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 45 Comparaison Multi-Compagnies T8
- 6 portage T7 services operational
- 5 entites + 2 state machines portage
- Sprint 14 cross-tenant framework extension validated operational
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 18 tabs insurance total
- Sprint 13 19 MV insurance total
- Sprint 35 ACAPS T7 compliance comprehensive
- Sprint 11 PayoutService commission reconciliation
- Foundation BrokerPortfolio analytics + valuation M&A
- GO Sprint 45 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-44 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 6 services + 2 workers + 2 SM.

**2** : TR-CROSS-TENANT-SECURITY **BLOCKING CRITIQUE** -- Sprint 14 extension + RLS source + target + SELECT FOR UPDATE.

**3** : TR-CNDP-CONSENT **BLOCKING REGULATORY** -- cryptographic + customer auth + Sprint 27 PII.

**4** : TR-SAGA-COMPENSATIONS **BLOCKING** -- 8 steps + rollback + idempotency.

**5** : TR-ACAPS-T7-COMPLIANCE **BLOCKING REGULATORY** -- T7 form + acaps_reference + Sprint 35.

**6** : TR-COMMISSION-RECONCILIATION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 11 PayoutService + dispute workflow.

**7** : TR-PORTFOLIO-ANALYTICS **BLOCKING** -- worker snapshots daily + Sprint 42 ChurnPrediction reuse.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 45 Comparaison Multi-Compagnies T8.

---

**FIN V-44**

**Verification suivante** : V-45 Sprint 45 Comparaison Multi-Compagnies T8.
```

## 45. V-45-sprint-45-verification.md

```md
# V-45 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 45 : INSURANCE COMPARAISON MULTI-COMPAGNIES T8

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 6)
**Sprint** : 45 / 50
**Reference** : `B-45`, `C-45`, `G-45`
**Total criteres** : 108 (90 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 45 = **Comparaison T8 comprehensive** + **6 insurers concurrent < 10s** + **scoring engine 7 modules** + **recommendation engine 3 modules** + **T8 ACAPS Form** + **customer-portal extension** + **broker analytics** + **bias monitoring**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 6 services + 1 worker + 5 entites + 7 scoring + 3 recommendation + 2 bias modules
- TR-SPRINT41-EXTENSION : Sprint 41 reuse + 6 insurers < 10s + circuit breakers + caching
- TR-COMPOSITE-SCORING : 7 modules + weights + explanability + transparency
- TR-T8-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE : T8 form + acaps_reference CMP + Sprint 35 audit
- TR-CUSTOMER-PORTAL-EXTENSION : Sprint 18 PWA extension + 3-step wizard + WCAG AA
- TR-BIAS-MONITORING : algorithms + worker daily 06h00 MA + Sprint 9 alerts + Sprint 35 audit
- TR-AB-TESTING-COMPARISON : Sprint 43 reuse + 3 variants comparison-specific
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint45-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 45 : Insurance Comparaison Multi-Compagnies T8

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 6)
**Sprint** : 45
**Reference B-45** : 12 taches, 108 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

---

## VERIFICATION TACHES

### 10.6.1 Decision-044 + Design Doc + Plan

```bash
[ -f "decisions/044-insurance-comparison-multi-insurers-t8-acaps-disclosure.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/044-insurance-comparison-multi-insurers-t8-acaps-disclosure.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-044 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-044" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/insurance-comparison-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/insurance-comparison-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1250 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=25 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

for doc in comparison-bias-monitoring-plan.md acaps-t8-form-research.md; do
  if [ -f "docs/${doc}" ]; then
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# Bias monitoring references
grep -qE "bias.*monitoring|ML fairness|Anthropic|Phase 11\+" docs/comparison-bias-monitoring-plan.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "Bias + Phase 11+ references" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "Bias" "WARN" "Verify"
```

### 10.6.2 Entites Comparaison T8 (5 tables)

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/insurance-comparison/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package insurance-comparison" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('comparison_requests','comparison_results','comparison_recommendations','t8_disclosure_documents','comparison_benchmark_snapshots')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "5 tables" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/5"

# UNIQUE acaps_reference
UNIQUE_ACAPS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='comparison_requests' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%acaps_reference%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_ACAPS" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE acaps_reference" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# UNIQUE recommendation_rank
UNIQUE_REC=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='comparison_recommendations' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%comparison_request_id%recommendation_rank%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_REC" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE recommendation_rank" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "UNIQUE rec" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# RLS strict
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename IN ('comparison_requests','comparison_results','comparison_recommendations','t8_disclosure_documents','comparison_benchmark_snapshots')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" -ge "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "RLS 5 tables" "PASS" "$RLS/5" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/5"

# CHECK rank 1-3
grep -qE "CHECK.*recommendation_rank.*BETWEEN 1 AND 3" repo/packages/insurance-comparison/migrations/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T02-V6" "CHECK rank 1-3" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "CHECK" "WARN" "Verify"

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-comparison vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 20 ] && append_to_report "T02-V7" "Tests >=20" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V7" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"

### 10.6.11 Sprint 13 4 MV Comparison

```bash
for mv in comparison_request_metrics comparison_acceptance comparison_revenue_impact insurer_performance_trends; do
  MV_EXISTS=$(clickhouse-client --query "SELECT 1 FROM analytics.${mv}_mv LIMIT 1" 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$MV_EXISTS" ]; then
    append_to_report "T11-V-${mv}" "MV ${mv}_mv" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T11-V-${mv}" "MV ${mv}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# Refresh staggered 05h15
grep -qE "COMPARISON_MV_REFRESH_CRON=15 5|05:15" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T11-V1" "Refresh 05h15 staggered" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T11-V1" "Refresh" "WARN" "Verify"
```

### 10.6.12 Sprint 45 Closure

```bash
TOTAL=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-comparison vitest run tests/e2e/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge "45" ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=45" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

COV=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-comparison vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

[ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-45-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 46|Renouvellement|GO Sprint 46" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-45-closure-report.md && append_to_report "T12-V3" "Sprint 45 closure" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V3" "Closure" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 21 tabs insurance total
TABS_INSURANCE=$(ls -d repo/apps/admin-portal/src/app/[locale]/insurance/ -r 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$TABS_INSURANCE" -ge "21" ] && append_to_report "T12-V4" "21 tabs insurance total" "PASS" "$TABS_INSURANCE" || append_to_report "T12-V4" "Tabs" "WARN" "$TABS_INSURANCE/21"

# 23 MV insurance total
MV_INSURANCE=$(clickhouse-client --query "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system.tables WHERE database='analytics' AND name LIKE '%_mv'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$MV_INSURANCE" -ge "23" ] && append_to_report "T12-V5" "23 MV insurance total" "PASS" "$MV_INSURANCE" || append_to_report "T12-V5" "MV" "WARN" "$MV_INSURANCE/23"
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-comparison build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

pnpm --filter customer-portal build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD-CP" "Build customer-portal" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD-CP" "Build CP" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-comparison tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/ repo/apps/customer-portal/src/app/comparison/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-044
[ -f "decisions/044-insurance-comparison-multi-insurers-t8-acaps-disclosure.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/044-insurance-comparison-multi-insurers-t8-acaps-disclosure.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-044" "Decision-044" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-044" "Decision-044" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$|engine\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
SCORERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/scoring-engine/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
RECS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/recommendation-engine/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
BIAS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/bias-monitoring/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "6" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "1" ] && [ "$SCORERS" -ge "7" ] && [ "$RECS" -ge "3" ] && [ "$BIAS" -ge "2" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "6 svc + 1 worker + 7 scoring + 3 rec + 2 bias" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS+$SCORERS+$RECS+$BIAS"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS Sc=$SCORERS R=$RECS B=$BIAS"
fi

# TR-SPRINT41-EXTENSION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 41|InsurerComparisonService" repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/services/comparison-request.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "COMPARISON_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=10" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT41-EXTENSION" "Sprint 41 extension + < 10s" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT41-EXTENSION" "Extension" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-COMPOSITE-SCORING (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/scoring-engine/composite-comparison-scorer.ts" ] && grep -qE "generateExplanability|explanability" repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/services/insurer-comparison-engine.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-COMPOSITE-SCORING" "Composite scoring + explanability" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-COMPOSITE-SCORING" "Scoring" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-T8-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "ACAPS_REFERENCE_CMP_PREFIX=ACAPS-CMP-|T8" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/services/t8-disclosure-compliance.service.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-T8-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE" "T8 ACAPS compliance" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-T8-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE" "T8 ACAPS" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-CUSTOMER-PORTAL-EXTENSION (CRITIQUE)
if [ -d "repo/apps/customer-portal/src/app/comparison" ] && [ -f "repo/apps/customer-portal/src/app/comparison/wizard/page.tsx" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-CUSTOMER-PORTAL-EXTENSION" "Customer-portal extension" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CUSTOMER-PORTAL-EXTENSION" "Extension" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-BIAS-MONITORING (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/services/comparison-benchmark.service.ts" ] && [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-comparison/src/workers/comparison-benchmark-cron.worker.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-BIAS-MONITORING" "Bias monitoring + worker" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-BIAS-MONITORING" "Bias" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-AB-TESTING-COMPARISON (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "COMPARISON_AB_TESTING_VARIANTS=criteria_emphasis,recommendation_presentation,insurer_ordering" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-AB-TESTING-COMPARISON" "A/B testing 3 variants" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-AB-TESTING-COMPARISON" "A/B" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(COMPARISON_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS COMPARISON_CACHE_TTL_HOURS COMPARISON_SCORING_PREMIUM_WEIGHT COMPARISON_SCORING_COVERAGE_WEIGHT COMPARISON_SCORING_CLAIMS_PAYOUT_WEIGHT COMPARISON_SCORING_CUSTOMER_SATISFACTION_WEIGHT COMPARISON_SCORING_FINANCIAL_STRENGTH_WEIGHT COMPARISON_SCORING_TRANSPARENCY_WEIGHT COMPARISON_RECOMMENDATIONS_TOP_N COMPARISON_BENCHMARK_CRON COMPARISON_BIAS_DETECTION_VARIANCE_THRESHOLD COMPARISON_BIAS_ALERT_FREQUENCY_THRESHOLD ACAPS_T8_FORM_VERSION ACAPS_REFERENCE_CMP_PREFIX COMPARISON_MV_REFRESH_CRON)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FND=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S41=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT41-EXTENSION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CS=$(grep -c "TR-COMPOSITE-SCORING.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_T8=$(grep -c "TR-T8-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CP=$(grep -c "TR-CUSTOMER-PORTAL-EXTENSION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_BM=$(grep -c "TR-BIAS-MONITORING.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_AB=$(grep -c "TR-AB-TESTING-COMPARISON.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S41" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 41 EXTENSION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_CS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- COMPOSITE SCORING FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_T8" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- T8 ACAPS COMPLIANCE FAIL (REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_CP" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CUSTOMER-PORTAL EXTENSION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_BM" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- BIAS MONITORING FAIL (REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_AB" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- A/B TESTING FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Sprint 46"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Sprint 46"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 46 Renouvellement Automatique
- 6 comparison services + 1 worker + 5 entites
- Scoring engine 7 modules + recommendation engine 3 modules + bias monitoring 2 modules
- Sprint 18 customer-portal extension comparison
- Sprint 41 InsurerComparison validation operational complete
- Sprint 43 A/B testing variants reuse
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 21 tabs insurance total
- Sprint 13 23 MV insurance total
- Sprint 35 ACAPS T8 + bias audit comprehensive
- GO Sprint 46 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-45 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 6 svc + 1 worker + 7 scoring + 3 rec + 2 bias.

**2** : TR-SPRINT41-EXTENSION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 41 reuse + < 10s + circuit breakers.

**3** : TR-COMPOSITE-SCORING **BLOCKING** -- 7 modules + composite + explanability JSONB.

**4** : TR-T8-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE **BLOCKING REGULATORY** -- T8 form + acaps_reference CMP + Sprint 35.

**5** : TR-CUSTOMER-PORTAL-EXTENSION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 18 PWA extension + WCAG AA.

**6** : TR-BIAS-MONITORING **BLOCKING REGULATORY** -- algorithms + worker + Sprint 9 alerts + Sprint 35 audit.

**7** : TR-AB-TESTING-COMPARISON **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 43 reuse + 3 variants comparison.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 46 Renouvellement Automatique.

---

**FIN V-45**

**Verification suivante** : V-46 Sprint 46 Insurance Renouvellement Automatique.
```

## 46. V-46-sprint-46-verification.md

```md
# V-46 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 46 : INSURANCE RENOUVELLEMENT AUTOMATIQUE

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 7)
**Sprint** : 46 / 50
**Reference** : `B-46`, `C-46`, `G-46`
**Total criteres** : 108 (90 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 46 = **Renouvellement Automatique Advanced** + **Sprint 41 extension** + **Sprint 42 churn integration** + **Sprint 45 comparison integration** + **DynamicPricing 6 factors** + **RenewalIncentives 4 modules** + **RenewalCampaigns + Sprint 42 nurture reuse**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 6 services + 3 workers + 5 entites + pricing/incentive engines
- TR-SPRINT41-INTEGRATION : Sprint 41 PolicyRenewalService extension + state machine
- TR-SPRINT42-CHURN-INTEGRATION : Sprint 42 ChurnPrediction reuse + incentives logic
- TR-SPRINT45-COMPARISON-INTEGRATION : comparison-triggered + ACAPS T8
- TR-DYNAMIC-PRICING : 6 factors + bias monitoring + transparency
- TR-CAMPAIGN-NURTURE-OPT-OUT : Sprint 42 NurtureCampaign reuse + CNDP cross-channels
- TR-BATCH-PERFORMANCE : 1000+/day batch + Sprint 36 monitoring
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint46-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 46 : Insurance Renouvellement Automatique

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 7)
**Sprint** : 46
**Reference B-46** : 12 taches, 108 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

for module in discount-recommender coverage-upgrade-recommender multi-policy-bundle-recommender personalized-incentive-selector; do
  if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/incentive-engine/${module}.ts" ]; then
    append_to_report "T04-V-${module}" "Module ${module}" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T04-V-${module}" "Module ${module}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# Churn thresholds
grep -qE "CHURN_THRESHOLD_HIGH=0.7|CHURN_THRESHOLD_MEDIUM=0.4|CHURN_INCENTIVE_DISCOUNT_PERCENT_HIGH=10|CHURN_INCENTIVE_DISCOUNT_PERCENT_MEDIUM=5" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T04-V4" "Churn thresholds + discounts" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T04-V4" "Thresholds" "WARN" "Verify"

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-renewal-advanced build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-renewal-advanced tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-045
[ -f "decisions/045-insurance-automatic-renewal-advanced-churn-comparison-integration.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/045-insurance-automatic-renewal-advanced-churn-comparison-integration.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-045" "Decision-045" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-045" "Decision-045" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
PRICING=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/pricing-engine/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
INCENTIVES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/incentive-engine/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "6" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "3" ] && [ "$PRICING" -ge "6" ] && [ "$INCENTIVES" -ge "4" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "6 svc + 3 workers + 6 pricing + 4 incentives" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS+$PRICING+$INCENTIVES"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS P=$PRICING I=$INCENTIVES"
fi

# TR-SPRINT41-INTEGRATION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 41|PolicyRenewalService" repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/services/automatic-renewal.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT41-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 41 integration" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT41-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 41" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SPRINT42-CHURN-INTEGRATION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 42|InsuranceChurnPredictionService" repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/services/churn-based-renewal.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "CHURN_THRESHOLD_HIGH=0.7" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT42-CHURN-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 42 churn integration" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT42-CHURN-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 42" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SPRINT45-COMPARISON-INTEGRATION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 45|InsurerComparisonEngine|ComparisonRequestService" repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/services/comparison-triggered-renewal.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT45-COMPARISON-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 45 comparison integration" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT45-COMPARISON-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 45" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-DYNAMIC-PRICING (CRITIQUE)
if [ "$PRICING" -ge "6" ] && grep -qE "DYNAMIC_PRICING_BIAS_CHECK_ENABLED=true" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-DYNAMIC-PRICING" "6 pricing factors + bias check" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-DYNAMIC-PRICING" "Pricing" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-CAMPAIGN-NURTURE-OPT-OUT (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 42|NurtureCampaignService" repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/services/renewal-campaign.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "opt.out|CNDP" repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/services/renewal-campaign.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-CAMPAIGN-NURTURE-OPT-OUT" "Campaign + nurture reuse + opt-out" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CAMPAIGN-NURTURE-OPT-OUT" "Campaign" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-BATCH-PERFORMANCE (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "AUTOMATIC_RENEWAL_BATCH_SIZE=100|AUTOMATIC_RENEWAL_PARALLEL_CONCURRENCY=10" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "Sprint 36|monitoring" repo/packages/insurance-renewal-advanced/src/services/automatic-renewal.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-BATCH-PERFORMANCE" "Batch + concurrency + Sprint 36" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-BATCH-PERFORMANCE" "Batch" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(AUTOMATIC_RENEWAL_CRON AUTOMATIC_RENEWAL_LOOKAHEAD_DAYS AUTOMATIC_RENEWAL_BATCH_SIZE AUTOMATIC_RENEWAL_PARALLEL_CONCURRENCY CHURN_THRESHOLD_HIGH CHURN_THRESHOLD_MEDIUM CHURN_INCENTIVE_DISCOUNT_PERCENT_HIGH CHURN_INCENTIVE_DISCOUNT_PERCENT_MEDIUM DYNAMIC_PRICING_BASE_WEIGHT DYNAMIC_PRICING_MARKET_WEIGHT DYNAMIC_PRICING_CHURN_WEIGHT DYNAMIC_PRICING_LOYALTY_WEIGHT DYNAMIC_PRICING_CLAIMS_WEIGHT DYNAMIC_PRICING_BIAS_CHECK_ENABLED CAMPAIGN_EXECUTION_CRON RENEWAL_ANALYTICS_SNAPSHOT_CRON RENEWAL_MV_REFRESH_CRON RENEWAL_REMINDERS_DAYS_BEFORE_LIST INCENTIVE_OFFER_EXPIRY_DAYS)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FND=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S41=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT41-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S42=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT42-CHURN-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S45=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT45-COMPARISON-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_DP=$(grep -c "TR-DYNAMIC-PRICING.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CN=$(grep -c "TR-CAMPAIGN-NURTURE-OPT-OUT.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_BP=$(grep -c "TR-BATCH-PERFORMANCE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S41" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 41 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S42" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 42 CHURN INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S45" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 45 COMPARISON INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_DP" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- DYNAMIC PRICING FAIL (BIAS REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_CN" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CAMPAIGN NURTURE OPT-OUT FAIL (CNDP REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_BP" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- BATCH PERFORMANCE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Sprint 47"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Sprint 47"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 47 Modification Contrat
- 6 services renewal advanced + 3 workers + 5 entites
- Pricing engine 6 modules + Incentive engine 4 modules
- Sprint 41 validation operational complete
- Sprint 42 + Sprint 45 integrations validated
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 24 tabs insurance total
- Sprint 13 27 MV insurance total
- Sprint 35 dynamic pricing + bias audit
- Foundation Sprint 47 endorsements complex workflows
- GO Sprint 47 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-46 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 6 svc + 3 workers + 6 pricing + 4 incentives.

**2** : TR-SPRINT41-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 41 delegation + state machine extensions.

**3** : TR-SPRINT42-CHURN-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 42 ChurnPrediction reuse + incentives.

**4** : TR-SPRINT45-COMPARISON-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- comparison-triggered + ACAPS T8.

**5** : TR-DYNAMIC-PRICING **BLOCKING REGULATORY** -- 6 factors + bias check + Sprint 35 audit.

**6** : TR-CAMPAIGN-NURTURE-OPT-OUT **BLOCKING CNDP REGULATORY** -- Sprint 42 reuse + opt-out cross-channels.

**7** : TR-BATCH-PERFORMANCE **BLOCKING** -- 1000+/day batch + parallel concurrency + Sprint 36.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 47 Modification Contrat.

---

**FIN V-46**

**Verification suivante** : V-47 Sprint 47 Insurance Modification Contrat.
```

## 47. V-47-sprint-47-verification.md

```md
# V-47 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 47 : INSURANCE MODIFICATION CONTRAT

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 8)
**Sprint** : 47 / 50
**Reference** : `B-47`, `C-47`, `G-47`
**Total criteres** : 108 (90 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 47 = **Modification Contrat Advanced** + **Sprint 41 endorsements extension** + **Multi-step 6 steps approval** + **Sprint 10 signature mandatory** + **Sprint 46 DynamicPricing reuse** + **Sprint 34 insurer endorsements** + **Sprint 35 ACAPS modification audit**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 6 services + 1 worker + 5 entites + 2 state machines
- TR-SPRINT41-ENDORSEMENTS-EXTENSION : Sprint 41 foundation extension + state machine
- TR-MULTI-STEP-WORKFLOW : 7 etats + 6 steps approval + transitions
- TR-SPRINT10-SIGNATURE-MANDATORY : signature 43-20 inline + Sprint 27 PII + Sprint 35 audit
- TR-SPRINT46-PREMIUM-REUSE : DynamicPricing reuse + 6 factors + bias check
- TR-SPRINT34-INSURER-ENDORSEMENTS : 6 connecteurs + circuit breakers + rollback
- TR-ACAPS-MODIFICATION-AUDIT : ACAPS-MOD- + Sprint 35 audit + retention
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint47-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 47 : Insurance Modification Contrat

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 8)
**Sprint** : 47
**Reference B-47** : 12 taches, 108 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

---

## VERIFICATION TACHES

### 10.8.1 Decision-046 + Design Doc

```bash
[ -f "decisions/046-insurance-contract-modification-advanced-multi-step-signature-mandatory.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/046-insurance-contract-modification-advanced-multi-step-signature-mandatory.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-046 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-046" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/insurance-contract-modification-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/insurance-contract-modification-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1250 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=25 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

for doc in modification-workflow-multi-step.md modification-acaps-compliance.md; do
  if [ -f "docs/${doc}" ]; then
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# Operational efficiency references
grep -qE "operationnel.*efficiency|-50%|broker.*productivity" decisions/046-insurance-contract-modification-advanced-multi-step-signature-mandatory.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "Operational KPIs" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "KPIs" "WARN" "Verify"
```

### 10.8.2 Entites Modification + State Machines

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package insurance-contract-modification" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('contract_modifications','modification_approval_steps','modification_premium_impacts','modification_documents','modification_analytics_snapshots')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "5 tables" "PASS" "5/5" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/5"

# UNIQUE acaps_modification_reference
UNIQUE_ACAPS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='contract_modifications' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%acaps_modification_reference%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_ACAPS" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE acaps_modification_reference" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE ACAPS" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# UNIQUE step_number per modification
UNIQUE_STEP=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='modification_approval_steps' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%modification_id%step_number%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')

# RLS
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename IN ('contract_modifications','modification_approval_steps','modification_premium_impacts','modification_documents','modification_analytics_snapshots')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" -ge "5" ] && append_to_report "T02-V5" "RLS 5 tables" "PASS" "$RLS/5" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/5"

### 10.8.11 Sprint 13 4 MV Modifications

```bash
for mv in modification_pipeline_metrics modification_premium_impact modification_compliance modification_types_analysis; do
  MV_EXISTS=$(clickhouse-client --query "SELECT 1 FROM analytics.${mv}_mv LIMIT 1" 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$MV_EXISTS" ]; then
    append_to_report "T11-V-${mv}" "MV ${mv}_mv" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T11-V-${mv}" "MV ${mv}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# Refresh staggered 05h45
grep -qE "MODIFICATION_MV_REFRESH_CRON=45 5|05:45" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T11-V1" "Refresh 05h45 staggered" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T11-V1" "Refresh" "WARN" "Verify"

# Worker analytics snapshot
[ -f "repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/workers/modification-analytics-snapshot-cron.worker.ts" ] && append_to_report "T11-V2" "Worker analytics" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T11-V2" "Worker" "FAIL" "Manquant"

grep -qE "MODIFICATION_ANALYTICS_SNAPSHOT_CRON=45 3" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T11-V3" "Cron 03h45 MA" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T11-V3" "Cron" "WARN" "Verify"
```

### 10.8.12 Sprint 47 Closure

```bash
TOTAL=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-contract-modification vitest run tests/e2e/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge "45" ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=45" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

COV=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-contract-modification vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

[ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-47-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 48|Flotte|GO Sprint 48" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-47-closure-report.md && append_to_report "T12-V3" "Sprint 47 closure" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T12-V3" "Closure" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# 27 tabs insurance total
TABS_INSURANCE=$(ls -d repo/apps/admin-portal/src/app/[locale]/insurance/ -r 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$TABS_INSURANCE" -ge "27" ] && append_to_report "T12-V4" "27 tabs insurance total" "PASS" "$TABS_INSURANCE" || append_to_report "T12-V4" "Tabs" "WARN" "$TABS_INSURANCE/27"

# 31 MV insurance total
MV_INSURANCE=$(clickhouse-client --query "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system.tables WHERE database='analytics' AND name LIKE '%_mv'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$MV_INSURANCE" -ge "31" ] && append_to_report "T12-V5" "31 MV insurance total" "PASS" "$MV_INSURANCE" || append_to_report "T12-V5" "MV" "WARN" "$MV_INSURANCE/31"
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-contract-modification build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-contract-modification tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/ repo/apps/customer-portal/src/app/modifications/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-046
[ -f "decisions/046-insurance-contract-modification-advanced-multi-step-signature-mandatory.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/046-insurance-contract-modification-advanced-multi-step-signature-mandatory.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-046" "Decision-046" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-046" "Decision-046" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
SM=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/state-machine/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "6" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "1" ] && [ "$SM" -ge "2" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "6 services + 1 worker + 2 SM" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS+$SM"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS SM=$SM"
fi

# TR-SPRINT41-ENDORSEMENTS-EXTENSION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 41|endorsements.*foundation" repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/services/contract-modification.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT41-ENDORSEMENTS-EXTENSION" "Sprint 41 extension" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT41-ENDORSEMENTS-EXTENSION" "Sprint 41" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-MULTI-STEP-WORKFLOW (CRITIQUE)
STATES=$(grep -cE "requested|under_broker_review|customer_signature_pending|insurer_submission_pending|insurer_approved|effective|cancelled" repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/state-machine/modification-state-machine.ts 2>/dev/null)
METHODS=$(grep -cE "submitBrokerReview|submitCustomerSignature|submitInsurerEndorsement|confirmEffectiveDate|regeneratePolicyDocument|logACAPSCompliance" repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/services/modification-approval-workflow.service.ts 2>/dev/null)
if [ "$STATES" -ge "7" ] && [ "$METHODS" -ge "6" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-MULTI-STEP-WORKFLOW" "7 etats + 6 steps" "PASS" "$STATES+$METHODS"
else
  append_to_report "TR-MULTI-STEP-WORKFLOW" "Workflow" "FAIL" "S=$STATES M=$METHODS"
fi

# TR-SPRINT10-SIGNATURE-MANDATORY (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "MODIFICATION_SIGNATURE_43_20_MANDATORY=true" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "Sprint 10|signature_43_20" repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT10-SIGNATURE-MANDATORY" "Signature 43-20 mandatory" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT10-SIGNATURE-MANDATORY" "Signature" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SPRINT46-PREMIUM-REUSE (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 46|DynamicPricingService" repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/services/modification-premium-adjustment.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT46-PREMIUM-REUSE" "Sprint 46 reuse" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT46-PREMIUM-REUSE" "Sprint 46" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SPRINT34-INSURER-ENDORSEMENTS (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/services/modification-insurer-notification.service.ts" ] && grep -qE "Sprint 34|6.*connecteurs|circuit.*breaker" repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/services/modification-insurer-notification.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT34-INSURER-ENDORSEMENTS" "Sprint 34 + circuit breakers" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT34-INSURER-ENDORSEMENTS" "Sprint 34" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-ACAPS-MODIFICATION-AUDIT (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "ACAPS-MOD-|MODIFICATION_ACAPS_REFERENCE_PREFIX=ACAPS-MOD-" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-contract-modification/src/services/modification-compliance.service.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-ACAPS-MODIFICATION-AUDIT" "ACAPS-MOD + Sprint 35" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-ACAPS-MODIFICATION-AUDIT" "ACAPS" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(MODIFICATION_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS MODIFICATION_MULTI_STEP_TARGET_HOURS MODIFICATION_STEP_TIMEOUT_HOURS MODIFICATION_MAX_ACTIVE_PER_POLICY MODIFICATION_ACAPS_REFERENCE_PREFIX MODIFICATION_TYPES_ENABLED MODIFICATION_SIGNATURE_43_20_MANDATORY MODIFICATION_INSURER_SUBMISSION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS MODIFICATION_INSURER_RETRY_ATTEMPTS MODIFICATION_ANALYTICS_SNAPSHOT_CRON MODIFICATION_MV_REFRESH_CRON MODIFICATION_REMINDERS_HOURS_BEFORE_LIST MODIFICATION_PARALLEL_APPROVAL_ENABLED)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FND=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S41=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT41-ENDORSEMENTS-EXTENSION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_MSW=$(grep -c "TR-MULTI-STEP-WORKFLOW.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S10=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT10-SIGNATURE-MANDATORY.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S46=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT46-PREMIUM-REUSE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S34=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT34-INSURER-ENDORSEMENTS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_ACAPS=$(grep -c "TR-ACAPS-MODIFICATION-AUDIT.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S41" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 41 EXTENSION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_MSW" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- MULTI-STEP WORKFLOW FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S10" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SIGNATURE MANDATORY FAIL (REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_S46" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 46 REUSE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S34" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 34 INSURER FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_ACAPS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- ACAPS MODIFICATION AUDIT FAIL (REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Sprint 48"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Sprint 48"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 48 Flotte B2B C6
- 6 services modification + 1 worker + 5 entites
- State machine 7 etats + 6-step approval
- Sprint 41 endorsements validation operational
- Sprint 46 + Sprint 10 + Sprint 34 + Sprint 35 integrations validated
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 27 tabs insurance total
- Sprint 13 31 MV insurance total
- Sprint 18 customer-portal extension modifications
- Foundation Sprint 48 B2B fleet enterprise customers
- GO Sprint 48 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-47 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 6 services + 1 worker + 2 SM.

**2** : TR-SPRINT41-ENDORSEMENTS-EXTENSION **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 41 foundation extension.

**3** : TR-MULTI-STEP-WORKFLOW **BLOCKING** -- 7 etats + 6 steps + transitions controlled.

**4** : TR-SPRINT10-SIGNATURE-MANDATORY **BLOCKING REGULATORY** -- signature 43-20 + Sprint 27 PII.

**5** : TR-SPRINT46-PREMIUM-REUSE **BLOCKING** -- DynamicPricing reuse + bias check.

**6** : TR-SPRINT34-INSURER-ENDORSEMENTS **BLOCKING** -- 6 connecteurs + circuit breakers.

**7** : TR-ACAPS-MODIFICATION-AUDIT **BLOCKING REGULATORY** -- ACAPS-MOD- + Sprint 35.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 48 Flotte B2B C6.

---

**FIN V-47**

**Verification suivante** : V-48 Sprint 48 Insurance Flotte B2B C6.
```

## 48. V-48-sprint-48-verification.md

```md
# V-48 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 48 : INSURANCE FLOTTE B2B C6

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 9)
**Sprint** : 48 / 50
**Reference** : `B-48`, `C-48`, `G-48`
**Total criteres** : 110 (92 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 48 = **Fleet B2B C6** + **CorporateCustomer B2B foundation** + **FleetPolicy multi-vehicle Sprint 40 extension** + **FleetBulkOperation Sprint 46/47 fleet-wide** + **FleetBilling Sprint 11/12 centralized** + **FleetSLA enterprise tiers** + **C6 ACAPS compliance**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 7 services + 2 workers + 7 entites
- TR-SPRINT40-POLICYSERVICE-EXTENSION : Sprint 40 extension fleet-level
- TR-BULK-OPERATIONS-SPRINT46-47 : Sprint 46/47 fleet-wide extensions + saga
- TR-B2B-BILLING-SPRINT11-12 : Sprint 11/12 extensions + procurement_po
- TR-SLA-ENTERPRISE-TIERS : 4 tiers + breach detection + Sprint 9 alerts
- TR-C6-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE : C6 form + acaps_c6_reference + Sprint 35 audit
- TR-CORPORATE-CUSTOMER-FOUNDATION : ICE validation + Sprint 27 PII B2B variant
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint48-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 48 : Insurance Flotte B2B C6

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 9)
**Sprint** : 48
**Reference B-48** : 12 taches, 110 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```
