## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-fleet-b2b build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-fleet-b2b tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/ repo/apps/customer-portal/src/app/fleet-b2b/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-047
[ -f "decisions/047-insurance-fleet-b2b-c6-enterprise-multi-vehicle-billing.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/047-insurance-fleet-b2b-c6-enterprise-multi-vehicle-billing.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-047" "Decision-047" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-047" "Decision-047" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "7" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "2" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "7 services + 2 workers" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS"
fi

# TR-SPRINT40-POLICYSERVICE-EXTENSION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 40|PolicyService.*extension" repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/services/fleet-policy.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT40-POLICYSERVICE-EXTENSION" "Sprint 40 extension" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT40-POLICYSERVICE-EXTENSION" "Sprint 40" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-BULK-OPERATIONS-SPRINT46-47 (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 46|AutomaticRenewalService.*fleet" repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/services/fleet-bulk-operation.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "Sprint 47|ModificationApprovalWorkflowService.*fleet" repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/services/fleet-bulk-operation.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-BULK-OPERATIONS-SPRINT46-47" "Sprint 46/47 fleet-wide" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-BULK-OPERATIONS-SPRINT46-47" "Bulk" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-B2B-BILLING-SPRINT11-12 (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 11|PayoutService" repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/services/fleet-billing.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "Sprint 12|InvoiceService" repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/services/fleet-billing.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-B2B-BILLING-SPRINT11-12" "Sprint 11/12 + procurement_po" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-B2B-BILLING-SPRINT11-12" "Billing" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SLA-ENTERPRISE-TIERS (CRITIQUE)
TIERS=$(grep -cE "FLEET_SLA_BRONZE_RESPONSE_HOURS=24|FLEET_SLA_SILVER_RESPONSE_HOURS=4|FLEET_SLA_GOLD_RESPONSE_HOURS=1|FLEET_SLA_PLATINUM_RESPONSE_MINUTES=15" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null)
if [ "$TIERS" -ge "4" ] && [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/services/fleet-sla.service.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-SLA-ENTERPRISE-TIERS" "4 SLA tiers + service" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SLA-ENTERPRISE-TIERS" "SLA" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-C6-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "ACAPS-C6-|ACAPS_C6_REFERENCE_PREFIX=ACAPS-C6-" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && [ -f "repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/services/fleet-compliance.service.ts" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-C6-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE" "C6 ACAPS + Sprint 35" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-C6-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE" "C6" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-CORPORATE-CUSTOMER-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "CORPORATE_CUSTOMER_ICE_VALIDATION_ENABLED=true" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "Sprint 27|PII" repo/packages/insurance-fleet-b2b/src/services/corporate-customer.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-CORPORATE-CUSTOMER-FOUNDATION" "ICE + Sprint 27 PII B2B" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-CORPORATE-CUSTOMER-FOUNDATION" "Corporate" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(CORPORATE_CUSTOMER_ICE_VALIDATION_ENABLED FLEET_POLICY_MIN_VEHICLES FLEET_POLICY_MAX_VEHICLES FLEET_BULK_OPERATION_BATCH_SIZE FLEET_BULK_OPERATION_TIMEOUT_MINUTES FLEET_BILLING_DEFAULT_PAYMENT_TERMS FLEET_BILLING_LATE_FEES_RATE_PERCENT FLEET_SLA_BRONZE_RESPONSE_HOURS FLEET_SLA_SILVER_RESPONSE_HOURS FLEET_SLA_GOLD_RESPONSE_HOURS FLEET_SLA_PLATINUM_RESPONSE_MINUTES SLA_TRACKING_CRON ACAPS_C6_FORM_VERSION ACAPS_C6_REFERENCE_PREFIX FLEET_ANALYTICS_SNAPSHOT_CRON FLEET_MV_REFRESH_CRON ENTERPRISE_ACCOUNT_MANAGER_PERMISSIONS_ENABLED)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FND=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S40=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT40-POLICYSERVICE-EXTENSION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_BULK=$(grep -c "TR-BULK-OPERATIONS-SPRINT46-47.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_BILL=$(grep -c "TR-B2B-BILLING-SPRINT11-12.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_SLA=$(grep -c "TR-SLA-ENTERPRISE-TIERS.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_C6=$(grep -c "TR-C6-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_CORP=$(grep -c "TR-CORPORATE-CUSTOMER-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S40" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 40 EXTENSION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_BULK" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- BULK OPERATIONS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_BILL" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- B2B BILLING FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_SLA" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SLA TIERS FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_C6" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- C6 ACAPS FAIL (REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_CORP" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- CORPORATE CUSTOMER FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Sprint 49"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Sprint 49"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 49 Telematics PHYD
- 7 services fleet B2B + 2 workers + 7 entites
- Sprint 40 PolicyService validation operational fleet-level
- Sprint 41 + 46 + 47 + 11 + 12 + 35 integrations validated
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 30 tabs insurance total
- Sprint 13 35 MV insurance total
- Sprint 18 customer-portal B2B extension
- Sprint 35 C6 ACAPS compliance comprehensive
- Foundation FleetVehicle ready Sprint 49 IoT integration
- GO Sprint 49 si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-48 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 7 services + 2 workers + 7 entites.

**2** : TR-SPRINT40-POLICYSERVICE-EXTENSION **BLOCKING** -- foundation extension fleet-level.

**3** : TR-BULK-OPERATIONS-SPRINT46-47 **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 46/47 fleet-wide + saga.

**4** : TR-B2B-BILLING-SPRINT11-12 **BLOCKING** -- Sprint 11/12 + procurement_po.

**5** : TR-SLA-ENTERPRISE-TIERS **BLOCKING** -- 4 tiers + breach + Sprint 9 alerts.

**6** : TR-C6-ACAPS-COMPLIANCE **BLOCKING REGULATORY** -- C6 form + ACAPS-C6- + Sprint 35.

**7** : TR-CORPORATE-CUSTOMER-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- ICE + Sprint 27 PII B2B.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 49 Telematics PHYD.

---

**FIN V-48**

**Verification suivante** : V-49 Sprint 49 Insurance Telematics PHYD.
```

## 49. V-49-sprint-49-verification.md

```md
# V-49 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 49 : INSURANCE TELEMATICS PHYD

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 10)
**Sprint** : 49 / 50
**Reference** : `B-49`, `C-49`, `G-49`
**Total criteres** : 112 (94 taches + 18 globaux)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 49 = **Telematics PHYD** + **IoT integration Sprint 48 FleetVehicle** + **High-throughput Kafka + TimescaleDB hypertable** + **DriverBehaviorScoring 7 modules + bias** + **Sprint 46 DynamicPricing extension behavioral** + **Sprint 35 ACAPS PHYD audit** + **Sprint 18 customer-portal driving insights**.

8 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 7 services + 4 workers + 7 entites + scoring/bias engines + TimescaleDB
- TR-SPRINT48-FLEETVEHICLE-INTEGRATION : IoT-ready integration foundation
- TR-HIGH-THROUGHPUT-INGESTION : TimescaleDB hypertable + Kafka + Sprint 36 monitoring
- TR-DRIVER-SCORING-7-MODULES : algorithm + bias check + versioning
- TR-SPRINT46-PHYD-EXTENSION : DynamicPricing extension behavioral_factor
- TR-BIAS-MONITORING-PHYD : 2 modules + worker + Sprint 35 ACAPS PHYD audit
- TR-LOCATION-PII-CNDP : Sprint 27 PII strict + consent + retention
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint49-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 49 : Insurance Telematics PHYD

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 10)
**Sprint** : 49
**Reference B-49** : 12 taches, 112 criteres

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

---

## VERIFICATION TACHES

### 10.10.1 Decision-048 + Design Doc

```bash
[ -f "decisions/048-insurance-telematics-phyd-iot-behavioral-dynamic-premium.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/048-insurance-telematics-phyd-iot-behavioral-dynamic-premium.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-048 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-048" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/insurance-telematics-phyd-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/insurance-telematics-phyd-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1250 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=25 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

for doc in telematics-phyd-bias-monitoring.md telematics-iot-integration.md; do
  if [ -f "docs/${doc}" ]; then
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# Innovation strategique references
grep -qE "PHYD|innovation|behavioral|\+5%|revenue uplift" decisions/048-insurance-telematics-phyd-iot-behavioral-dynamic-premium.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "PHYD KPIs" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "KPIs" "WARN" "Verify"
```

### 10.10.2 Entites Telematics + TimescaleDB (7 tables)

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package insurance-telematics-phyd" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('telematics_devices','telematics_data_points','driver_behavior_scores','phyd_premium_adjustments','driving_trip_sessions','telematics_bias_monitoring_snapshots','telematics_analytics_snapshots')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "7" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "7 tables" "PASS" "7/7" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/7"

# TimescaleDB extension installed
TIMESCALE=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT 1 FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='timescaledb'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TIMESCALE" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "TimescaleDB installed" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "TimescaleDB" "FAIL" "Not installed"

# Hypertable on telematics_data_points
HYPERTABLE=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timescaledb_information.hypertables WHERE hypertable_name='telematics_data_points'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$HYPERTABLE" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "Hypertable telematics_data_points" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "Hypertable" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# Chunk interval 1 day
grep -qE "TELEMATICS_TIMESCALEDB_CHUNK_INTERVAL=1 day|chunk_time_interval.*INTERVAL '1 day'" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T02-V5" "Chunk 1 day" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "Chunk" "WARN" "Verify"

# UNIQUE device_identifier
UNIQUE_ID=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='telematics_devices' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%device_identifier%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_ID" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V6" "UNIQUE device_identifier" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "UNIQUE" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# UNIQUE (driver_id, scoring_period_start)
UNIQUE_SCORE=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='driver_behavior_scores' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%driver_id%scoring_period_start%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_SCORE" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V7" "UNIQUE driver+period" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V7" "UNIQUE score" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# RLS
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename IN ('telematics_devices','telematics_data_points','driver_behavior_scores','phyd_premium_adjustments','driving_trip_sessions','telematics_bias_monitoring_snapshots','telematics_analytics_snapshots')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" -ge "7" ] && append_to_report "T02-V8" "RLS 7 tables" "PASS" "$RLS/7" || append_to_report "T02-V8" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/7"

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-telematics-phyd vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 22 ] && append_to_report "T02-V9" "Tests >=22" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V9" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-telematics-phyd build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-telematics-phyd tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/src/ repo/apps/customer-portal/src/app/driving-insights/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-048
[ -f "decisions/048-insurance-telematics-phyd-iot-behavioral-dynamic-premium.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/048-insurance-telematics-phyd-iot-behavioral-dynamic-premium.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-048" "Decision-048" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-048" "Decision-048" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
SCORING=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/src/scoring-engine/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
BIAS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/src/bias-monitoring/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "7" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "4" ] && [ "$SCORING" -ge "7" ] && [ "$BIAS" -ge "2" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "7 svc + 4 workers + 7 scoring + 2 bias" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS+$SCORING+$BIAS"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS SC=$SCORING B=$BIAS"
fi

# TR-SPRINT48-FLEETVEHICLE-INTEGRATION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 48|fleet_vehicle_id|FleetVehicle" repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/src/services/telematics-device.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT48-FLEETVEHICLE-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 48 integration" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT48-FLEETVEHICLE-INTEGRATION" "Sprint 48" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-HIGH-THROUGHPUT-INGESTION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "TimescaleDB|hypertable" repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/src/services/telematics-ingestion.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "Kafka|TELEMATICS_DATA_INGESTION_KAFKA_TOPIC" repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/src/services/telematics-ingestion.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-HIGH-THROUGHPUT-INGESTION" "TimescaleDB + Kafka" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-HIGH-THROUGHPUT-INGESTION" "Ingestion" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-DRIVER-SCORING-7-MODULES (CRITIQUE)
if [ "$SCORING" -ge "7" ] && grep -qE "DRIVER_SCORING_ALGORITHM_VERSION=v1.0.0-foundation" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-DRIVER-SCORING-7-MODULES" "7 modules + versioning" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-DRIVER-SCORING-7-MODULES" "Scoring" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SPRINT46-PHYD-EXTENSION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 46|DynamicPricingService.*extension|behavioral_factor" repo/packages/insurance-telematics-phyd/src/services/phyd-premium-adjustment.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "PHYD_BEHAVIORAL_FACTOR_MIN=-0.25|PHYD_BEHAVIORAL_FACTOR_MAX=0.30" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT46-PHYD-EXTENSION" "Sprint 46 + behavioral_factor" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT46-PHYD-EXTENSION" "Sprint 46" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-BIAS-MONITORING-PHYD (CRITIQUE)
if [ "$BIAS" -ge "2" ] && grep -qE "BIAS_MONITORING_CRON=0 1|Sprint 35.*ACAPS.*PHYD" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-BIAS-MONITORING-PHYD" "Bias 2 modules + Sprint 35" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-BIAS-MONITORING-PHYD" "Bias" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-LOCATION-PII-CNDP (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "LOCATION_DATA_PII_MASKING_ENABLED=true|Sprint 27|TELEMATICS_DEVICE_PAIRING_REQUIRES_CUSTOMER_CONSENT=true|PHYD_OPT_OUT_DATA_DELETION_DAYS=30" repo/ -r 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-LOCATION-PII-CNDP" "PII + CNDP + retention" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-LOCATION-PII-CNDP" "PII CNDP" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(TELEMATICS_DEVICE_PAIRING_REQUIRES_CUSTOMER_CONSENT TELEMATICS_DATA_INGESTION_KAFKA_TOPIC TELEMATICS_DATA_INGESTION_BATCH_SIZE TELEMATICS_DATA_RETENTION_ACTIVE_DAYS TELEMATICS_TIMESCALEDB_CHUNK_INTERVAL DRIVER_SCORING_ALGORITHM_VERSION DRIVER_SCORING_COMPOSITE_RANGE_MIN DRIVER_SCORING_COMPOSITE_RANGE_MAX DRIVER_SCORING_MONTHLY_CRON PHYD_BEHAVIORAL_FACTOR_MIN PHYD_BEHAVIORAL_FACTOR_MAX PHYD_CUSTOMER_OPT_IN_REQUIRED PHYD_OPT_OUT_DATA_DELETION_DAYS BIAS_MONITORING_CRON BIAS_MONITORING_VARIANCE_THRESHOLD TELEMATICS_ANALYTICS_SNAPSHOT_CRON TELEMATICS_MV_REFRESH_CRON TRIP_DETECTION_STREAMING_ENABLED LOCATION_DATA_PII_MASKING_ENABLED)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FND=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S48=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT48-FLEETVEHICLE-INTEGRATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_HTI=$(grep -c "TR-HIGH-THROUGHPUT-INGESTION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_DSM=$(grep -c "TR-DRIVER-SCORING-7-MODULES.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S46=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT46-PHYD-EXTENSION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_BMP=$(grep -c "TR-BIAS-MONITORING-PHYD.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_LPC=$(grep -c "TR-LOCATION-PII-CNDP.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S48" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 48 INTEGRATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_HTI" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- HIGH-THROUGHPUT INGESTION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_DSM" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- DRIVER SCORING FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S46" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- SPRINT 46 EXTENSION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_BMP" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- BIAS MONITORING FAIL (REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_LPC" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- LOCATION PII CNDP FAIL (REGULATORY)"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Sprint 50"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Sprint 50"
else DECISION="NO-GO"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## Pre-requis Sprint 50 Embedded Cross-Sell (DERNIER Phase 10)
- 7 services telematics PHYD + 4 workers + 7 entites + TimescaleDB hypertable
- Sprint 48 FleetVehicle IoT validation operational complete
- Sprint 46 DynamicPricing extension behavioral validated
- Sprint 28 admin-portal 33 tabs insurance total
- Sprint 13 39 MV insurance total
- Sprint 18 customer-portal driving insights extension
- Sprint 35 ACAPS PHYD audit comprehensive
- Foundation Sprint 50 Embedded Cross-Sell (PHYD behavioral data + commercial scaling)
- GO Sprint 50 (DERNIER) si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-49 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%)"
```

---

## NOTES

**1** : TR-FOUNDATION **BLOCKING** -- 7 svc + 4 workers + 7 scoring + 2 bias.

**2** : TR-SPRINT48-FLEETVEHICLE-INTEGRATION **BLOCKING** -- IoT integration foundation.

**3** : TR-HIGH-THROUGHPUT-INGESTION **BLOCKING** -- TimescaleDB hypertable + Kafka.

**4** : TR-DRIVER-SCORING-7-MODULES **BLOCKING** -- 7 modules + bias check + versioning.

**5** : TR-SPRINT46-PHYD-EXTENSION **BLOCKING** -- DynamicPricing extension behavioral.

**6** : TR-BIAS-MONITORING-PHYD **BLOCKING REGULATORY** -- 2 modules + Sprint 35 ACAPS PHYD.

**7** : TR-LOCATION-PII-CNDP **BLOCKING REGULATORY** -- Sprint 27 PII + consent + retention.

**8** : TR-NO-EMOJI **BLOCKING** -- decision-006.

**9** : Score < 85% NO-GO. Ne pas demarrer Sprint 50 Embedded Cross-Sell (DERNIER).

---

**FIN V-49**

**Verification suivante** : V-50 Sprint 50 Insurance Embedded Cross-Sell DERNIER.
```

## 50. V-50-sprint-50-verification.md

```md
# V-50 -- VERIFICATION SPRINT 50 : INSURANCE EMBEDDED CROSS-SELL + PROGRAMME CLOTURE PHASE 10

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 11 -- DERNIER)
**Sprint** : 50 / 50 -- PHASE 10 FINAL
**Reference** : `B-50`, `C-50`, `G-50`
**Total criteres** : 115 (95 taches + 20 globaux + PHASE 10 FINAL)
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Sprint 50 DERNIER PHASE 10 = **Embedded Cross-Sell + PROGRAMME CLOTURE PHASE 10**.

9 verifications transversales **BLOCKING** (incluant PHASE 10 FINAL) :
- TR-FOUNDATION : 7 services + 4 workers + 7 entites + recommendation/bundle engines
- TR-SPRINT42-49-FUSION : RecommendationEngine fusion churn + behavioral
- TR-SPRINT46-CAMPAIGN-EXTENSION : NurtureCampaign extension
- TR-SPRINT18-CUSTOMER-PORTAL : embedded offers UI compelling
- TR-SPRINT13-43-MV-TOTAL : refresh staggered + 43 MV insurance total
- TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE-PHASE10 : documentation comprehensive 5 docs
- TR-COMMERCIAL-SCALING-LTV : +25% LTV demonstrable
- TR-PHASE-10-FINAL-CEREMONY : 11 sprints + 48 total + roadmap Phase 11+
- TR-NO-EMOJI : decision-006

---

## PHASE DE PREPARATION

```bash
REPORT_FILE="00-pilotage/verifications/reports/sprint50-verify-report-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"
TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
RUN_ID=$(date '+%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$REPORT_FILE")"

cat > "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF
# Rapport Verification -- Sprint 50 : Insurance Embedded Cross-Sell + PROGRAMME CLOTURE PHASE 10

**Date** : $TIMESTAMP
**Run ID** : $RUN_ID
**Phase** : 10 -- Insurance Broker Vertical (Sprint 11 -- DERNIER)
**Sprint** : 50 -- PHASE 10 FINAL
**Reference B-50** : 12 taches, 115 criteres + PHASE 10 FINAL CEREMONY

## Resultats

| ID | Description | Statut | Details |
|----|-------------|--------|---------|
EOF

append_to_report() {
  echo "| $1 | $2 | $3 | $4 |" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
}
```

## VERIFICATION TACHES

### 10.11.1 Decision-049 + Design Doc

```bash
[ -f "decisions/049-insurance-embedded-cross-sell-multi-product-bundle-programme-cloture-phase10.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/049-insurance-embedded-cross-sell-multi-product-bundle-programme-cloture-phase10.md && append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-049 ratifiee" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V1" "Decision-049" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

[ -f "docs/architecture/insurance-embedded-cross-sell-design.md" ] && LINES=$(wc -l docs/architecture/insurance-embedded-cross-sell-design.md | awk '{print $1}') && [ "$LINES" -ge 1250 ] && append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc >=25 pages" "PASS" "$LINES lines" || append_to_report "T01-V2" "Design doc" "FAIL" "$LINES lines"

for doc in cross-sell-recommendations-engine.md programme-cloture-phase10-plan.md; do
  if [ -f "docs/${doc}" ]; then
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "PASS" "OK"
  else
    append_to_report "T01-V-${doc}" "Doc ${doc}" "FAIL" "Manquant"
  fi
done

# Commercial scaling references
grep -qE "\+25%|LTV|PROGRAMME CLOTURE|commercial scaling" decisions/049-insurance-embedded-cross-sell-multi-product-bundle-programme-cloture-phase10.md 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T01-V3" "Commercial KPIs" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T01-V3" "KPIs" "WARN" "Verify"
```

### 10.11.2 Entites Cross-Sell (7 tables)

```bash
[ -d "repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/" ] && append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V1" "Package" "FAIL" "Manquant"

TABLES=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN ('cross_sell_recommendations','product_bundles','cross_sell_campaigns','embedded_offers','cross_sell_engagements','cross_sell_conversions','cross_sell_analytics_snapshots')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$TABLES" = "7" ] && append_to_report "T02-V2" "7 tables" "PASS" "7/7" || append_to_report "T02-V2" "Tables" "FAIL" "$TABLES/7"

# UNIQUE bundle_name
UNIQUE_BUNDLE=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='product_bundles' AND indexdef LIKE '%UNIQUE%bundle_name%'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$UNIQUE_BUNDLE" -ge "1" ] && append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE bundle_name" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V3" "UNIQUE" "FAIL" "Manquant"

# RLS
RLS=$(psql -h $DB_HOST -U $DB_USER -d $DB_NAME -t -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename IN ('cross_sell_recommendations','product_bundles','cross_sell_campaigns','embedded_offers','cross_sell_engagements','cross_sell_conversions','cross_sell_analytics_snapshots')" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
[ "$RLS" -ge "7" ] && append_to_report "T02-V4" "RLS 7 tables" "PASS" "$RLS/7" || append_to_report "T02-V4" "RLS" "FAIL" "$RLS/7"

# CHECK products array
grep -qE "CHECK.*products_included.*ARRAY.*auto.*health.*life.*property" repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/migrations/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T02-V5" "CHECK products array" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V5" "Products" "WARN" "Verify"

# CHECK discount range
grep -qE "CHECK.*discount_percent.*5.*20" repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/migrations/ -r 2>/dev/null && append_to_report "T02-V6" "CHECK discount 5-20%" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "T02-V6" "Discount" "WARN" "Verify"

TESTS=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-embedded-cross-sell vitest run tests/unit/entities.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | head -1)
[ -n "$TESTS" ] && [ "$TESTS" -ge 22 ] && append_to_report "T02-V7" "Tests >=22" "PASS" "$TESTS" || append_to_report "T02-V7" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TESTS"
```

### 10.11.12 Sprint 50 Closure + PHASE 10 FINAL

```bash
TOTAL=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-embedded-cross-sell vitest run tests/e2e/ 2>&1 | grep -oP '\K\d+(?= passed)' | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
[ "$TOTAL" -ge "50" ] && append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests E2E >=50" "PASS" "$TOTAL" || append_to_report "T12-V1" "Tests" "FAIL" "$TOTAL"

COV=$(pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-embedded-cross-sell vitest run --coverage 2>&1 | grep -oP "All files\s*\|\s*\K\d+\.?\d*" | head -1)
[ -n "$COV" ] && [ "$(echo "$COV >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage >= 85%" "PASS" "${COV}%" || append_to_report "T12-V2" "Coverage" "FAIL" "${COV}%"

# 43 MV insurance total Phase 10 finale

[ "$MV_INSURANCE" -ge "43" ] && append_to_report "T12-V5" "43 MV insurance total Phase 10" "PASS" "$MV_INSURANCE" || append_to_report "T12-V5" "MV" "WARN" "$MV_INSURANCE/43"
```

## VERIFICATIONS TRANSVERSALES

```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-embedded-cross-sell build 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-BUILD" "Build" "FAIL" "Error"

# Typecheck
pnpm --filter @insurtech/insurance-embedded-cross-sell tsc --noEmit 2>&1
[ $? -eq 0 ] && append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "PASS" "Clean" || append_to_report "TR-TYPECHECK" "Typecheck" "FAIL" "Errors"

# No emoji
EMOJI=$(grep -rP "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/src/ repo/apps/customer-portal/src/app/offers/ 00-pilotage/reports/phase-10-closure-report.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$EMOJI" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "PASS" "0" || append_to_report "TR-NO-EMOJI" "Aucune emoji" "FAIL" "$EMOJI"

# Decision-049
[ -f "decisions/049-insurance-embedded-cross-sell-multi-product-bundle-programme-cloture-phase10.md" ] && grep -q "Accepte\|Accepted" decisions/049-insurance-embedded-cross-sell-multi-product-bundle-programme-cloture-phase10.md && append_to_report "TR-DECISION-049" "Decision-049" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-DECISION-049" "Decision-049" "FAIL" "Non ratifiee"

# TR-FOUNDATION (CRITIQUE)
SERVICES=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/src/services/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.service\.ts$" | wc -l)
WORKERS=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/src/workers/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.worker\.ts$" | wc -l)
RECO=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/src/recommendation-engine/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
BUNDLE=$(ls repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/src/bundle-engine/ 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.ts$" | wc -l)
if [ "$SERVICES" -ge "7" ] && [ "$WORKERS" -ge "4" ] && [ "$RECO" -ge "6" ] && [ "$BUNDLE" -ge "2" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "7 svc + 4 workers + 6 reco + 2 bundle" "PASS" "$SERVICES+$WORKERS+$RECO+$BUNDLE"
else
  append_to_report "TR-FOUNDATION" "Foundation" "FAIL" "S=$SERVICES W=$WORKERS R=$RECO B=$BUNDLE"
fi

# TR-SPRINT42-49-FUSION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 42|InsuranceChurnPredictionService" repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/src/services/cross-sell-recommendation-engine.service.ts 2>/dev/null && grep -qE "Sprint 49|DriverBehaviorScoringService" repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/src/services/cross-sell-recommendation-engine.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT42-49-FUSION" "Sprint 42 + Sprint 49 fusion" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT42-49-FUSION" "Fusion" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SPRINT46-CAMPAIGN-EXTENSION (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "Sprint 46|NurtureCampaignService" repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/src/services/cross-sell-campaign.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT46-CAMPAIGN-EXTENSION" "Sprint 46 extension" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT46-CAMPAIGN-EXTENSION" "Sprint 46" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SPRINT18-CUSTOMER-PORTAL (CRITIQUE)
if [ -d "repo/apps/customer-portal/src/app/offers" ] && [ "$(ls repo/apps/customer-portal/src/app/offers/ | wc -l)" -ge "4" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT18-CUSTOMER-PORTAL" "Customer-portal 4 pages" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT18-CUSTOMER-PORTAL" "Customer-portal" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# TR-SPRINT13-43-MV-TOTAL (CRITIQUE)
MV_TOTAL=$(clickhouse-client --query "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system.tables WHERE database='analytics' AND name LIKE '%_mv'" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')
if [ "$MV_TOTAL" -ge "43" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT13-43-MV-TOTAL" "43 MV insurance Phase 10" "PASS" "$MV_TOTAL"
else
  append_to_report "TR-SPRINT13-43-MV-TOTAL" "MV total" "FAIL" "$MV_TOTAL/43"
fi

# TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE-PHASE10 (CRITIQUE)
CLOTURE_DOCS=0
for doc in phase-10-closure-report.md phase-11-roadmap.md phase-10-lessons-learned.md demo-client-preparation.md acaps-regulatory-submissions-phase10.md; do
  if [ -f "00-pilotage/reports/${doc}" ]; then CLOTURE_DOCS=$((CLOTURE_DOCS+1)); fi
done
if [ "$CLOTURE_DOCS" -ge "5" ]; then
  append_to_report "TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE-PHASE10" "PROGRAMME CLOTURE 5 docs" "PASS" "$CLOTURE_DOCS/5"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE-PHASE10" "PROGRAMME CLOTURE" "FAIL" "$CLOTURE_DOCS/5"
fi

# TR-COMMERCIAL-SCALING-LTV (CRITIQUE)
if grep -qE "\+25%|LTV|revenue_uplift" repo/packages/insurance-embedded-cross-sell/src/services/cross-sell-conversion.service.ts 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-COMMERCIAL-SCALING-LTV" "+25% LTV demonstrable" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-COMMERCIAL-SCALING-LTV" "LTV" "WARN" "Verify"
fi

# TR-PHASE-10-FINAL-CEREMONY (CRITIQUE)
if [ -f "00-pilotage/reports/sprint-50-closure-report.md" ] && grep -qE "PHASE 10 FINAL|11 sprints|48 sprints total|GO Phase 11" 00-pilotage/reports/sprint-50-closure-report.md 2>/dev/null; then
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE-10-FINAL-CEREMONY" "PHASE 10 FINAL ceremony" "PASS" "OK"
else
  append_to_report "TR-PHASE-10-FINAL-CEREMONY" "Final ceremony" "FAIL" "Incomplete"
fi

# Variables env
VARS=(CROSS_SELL_RECOMMENDATIONS_GENERATION_CRON CROSS_SELL_RECOMMENDATIONS_ALGORITHM_VERSION CROSS_SELL_RECOMMENDATIONS_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD CROSS_SELL_BIAS_CHECK_ENABLED CROSS_SELL_RECOMMENDATIONS_PER_CUSTOMER_MAX PRODUCT_BUNDLE_DISCOUNT_MIN_PERCENT PRODUCT_BUNDLE_DISCOUNT_MAX_PERCENT CROSS_SELL_CAMPAIGN_EXECUTION_CRON OFFER_EXPIRY_DAYS OFFER_EXPIRY_CRON CROSS_SELL_ONE_OFFER_AT_A_TIME CROSS_SELL_ANALYTICS_SNAPSHOT_CRON CROSS_SELL_MV_REFRESH_CRON CONVERSION_ATTRIBUTION_WINDOW_DAYS LTV_IMPACT_CALCULATION_YEARS)
MISSING=0
for v in "${VARS[@]}"; do
  if ! grep -q "^${v}=" 00-pilotage/2-variables-environnement.env 2>/dev/null; then MISSING=$((MISSING+1)); fi
done
[ "$MISSING" = "0" ] && append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "PASS" "OK" || append_to_report "TR-VARS" "Vars env" "FAIL" "$MISSING missing"
```

---

## CALCUL SCORE FINAL

```bash
PASS=$(grep -cE "\| PASS \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
FAIL=$(grep -cE "\| FAIL \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
WARN=$(grep -cE "\| WARN \|" "$REPORT_FILE")
TOTAL=$((PASS + FAIL + WARN))
SCORE=$(echo "scale=2; ($PASS * 100) / $TOTAL" | bc)

# Critical BLOCKING
CRIT_FND=$(grep -c "TR-FOUNDATION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_FUS=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT42-49-FUSION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S46=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT46-CAMPAIGN-EXTENSION.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_S18=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT18-CUSTOMER-PORTAL.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_MV=$(grep -c "TR-SPRINT13-43-MV-TOTAL.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_PC=$(grep -c "TR-PROGRAMME-CLOTURE-PHASE10.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_LTV=$(grep -c "TR-COMMERCIAL-SCALING-LTV.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_PHF=$(grep -c "TR-PHASE-10-FINAL-CEREMONY.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")
CRIT_NE=$(grep -c "TR-NO-EMOJI.*FAIL" "$REPORT_FILE")

if [ "$CRIT_FND" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO Phase 11+ -- FOUNDATION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_FUS" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO Phase 11+ -- SPRINT 42/49 FUSION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S46" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO Phase 11+ -- SPRINT 46 EXTENSION FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_S18" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO Phase 11+ -- CUSTOMER-PORTAL FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_MV" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO Phase 11+ -- 43 MV INSURANCE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_PC" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO Phase 11+ -- PROGRAMME CLOTURE FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_LTV" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO Phase 11+ -- LTV FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_PHF" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO Phase 11+ -- PHASE 10 FINAL CEREMONY FAIL"
elif [ "$CRIT_NE" -gt 0 ]; then DECISION="NO-GO Phase 11+ -- EMOJIS"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 95" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" = "0" ]; then DECISION="GO Phase 11+ -- ANTHROPIC AI + MENA EXPANSION"
elif [ "$(echo "$SCORE >= 85" | bc)" = "1" ] && [ "$FAIL" -le 3 ]; then DECISION="GO_CONDITIONNEL Phase 11+ -- minor cleanup"
else DECISION="NO-GO Phase 11+"; fi

cat >> "$REPORT_FILE" << EOF

## Resume PHASE 10 FINAL
Total : $TOTAL / PASS : $PASS / FAIL : $FAIL / WARN : $WARN
Score : ${SCORE}%
Decision : $DECISION

## PHASE 10 FINAL CEREMONY
- 11 sprints livres complete (Sprints 40-50)
- 48 sprints total Skalean Assurflow (Phase 1-9 + Phase 10)
- 10+ commercial features insurance comprehensive
- 36 admin-portal tabs insurance total
- 43 ClickHouse MV insurance total
- 7 connecteurs insurers stubs operational
- ACAPS regulatory submissions complete (Programme Emergence)
- PROGRAMME CLOTURE PHASE 10 comprehensive (5 docs)
- Foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI + MENA expansion + enterprise

## Pre-requis Phase 11+ Anthropic AI Partnership + MENA Expansion
- Sprint 40-50 complete operational
- PROGRAMME CLOTURE PHASE 10 comprehensive
- Demo client preparation
- ACAPS regulatory complete
- Roadmap Phase 11+ comprehensive
- Engineering team retrospective
- Commercial team alignment
- Anthropic AI team alignment
- GO Phase 11+ si Decision=GO ou GO_CONDITIONNEL
EOF

echo "Score : ${SCORE}% / Decision : $DECISION"
echo ""
echo "=========================================="
echo "PHASE 10 INSURANCE BROKER VERTICAL -- FINAL"
echo "=========================================="
echo "11 sprints livres + 48 sprints total"
echo "Skalean Assurflow market-ready"
echo "Commercial launch Maroc enabled"
echo "Foundation Phase 11+ Anthropic AI + MENA"
echo "=========================================="

git add "$REPORT_FILE"
git commit -m "chore(verifications): V-50 run $RUN_ID -- $DECISION ($SCORE%) -- PHASE 10 FINAL"
```
